Garen.name: tough guy
Garen.description:
If you do not take damage or enemy skills for 5 seconds, recover 1.2% (Lv) of your lost health every second. 
Damage received from minions and non-epic monsters does not affect this effect.

Garen.name: decisive blow
Garen.description:
Removes all slow effects, making you immune to slow effects for 0.5 seconds and increasing your movement speed by 35% for 2 seconds. 
The next normal attack within 3 seconds will be enhanced, dealing an additional 66 physical damage (40 + 40%AD) and silencing the target for 1.5 seconds.

Garen.name: protection of courage
Garen.description:
Passive: Gain 10% bonus magic and physical defense. 
Active effect: Reduces damage received by 30% for 4 seconds. When activated, you will gain 60% resistance to interference for 1 second and gain a 65 durability shield (65 + 20% increased HP) for 2.5 seconds. After 1 second, the shield will gradually disappear.

Garen.name: judgment
Garen.description:
First activation: Spin and swing your sword for 3 seconds, dealing 29 physical damage (13 + 25%AD) up to 8 times during the duration. The number of rotations increases by 1 for every 4 champion levels (up to 11 times). "Judgment" can be reactivated by tapping the skill button 1 second after the first activation. 
Recast: Ends Judgment sooner and reduces the cooldown for the remaining duration. 
Physical Defense Reduced: Champions hit 6 times by this attack have their physical defense reduced by 10% for 4.5 seconds. 
The effect time is refreshed with each hit. 
Damage to targets closest to Garen is increased by 20%.

Garen.name: Justice of Demacia
Garen.description:
Ignite the spirit of Demacia and unleash a deadly blow on the designated enemy champion, dealing true damage equal to 150 + 15% of the target's missing health (15% + 0.12% AD increase). Deals true damage to surrounding enemies equal to 75 + 7.5% of the target's missing health (7.5% + 0.06% AD increase). 
The maximum damage dealt to epic monsters is 600.

MissFortune.name: love tap
MissFortune.description:
Grants "Love Tap" when performing a normal attack on an enemy champion or epic monster. 
- At 3 stacks, deals 15 physical damage (15 + 40% increased AD) x (1 + 0% current critical rate) to the target. 
- Miss Fortune's damage to the target increases by 6% (Lv).

MissFortune.name: double up
MissFortune.description:
The bullet ricochetes behind the first enemy it hits, dealing 125 physical damage (60 + 112%AD + 35%AP) to all enemies hit. The ricochet becomes a critical hit, dealing 120% damage and inflicting 3 stacks of "Love Tap". 

Normal attack effects apply to both targets.

MissFortune.name: strut
MissFortune.description:
Passive: After not taking damage for 4 seconds, your movement speed increases by 30. After an additional 3 seconds, this bonus increases to 80. 

Active effect: Strut's movement speed increases to maximum and attack speed increases by 45% for 4 seconds. When "Love Tap" performs a normal attack on a target with maximum stacks, the remaining cooldown of "Strut" is reduced by 2 seconds.

MissFortune.name: raining bullet
MissFortune.description: Rains bullets in an area for 2 seconds, dealing 15 magic damage (15 + 10% AP) every 0.25 seconds and slowing enemy movement speed by 30%.

MissFortune.name: Bullet time
MissFortune.description:
Fires a large number of bullets 12 times over 3 seconds, dealing 50 physical damage (85%AD + 20%AP) each time. Each hit has a critical hit, and a critical hit deals 130% damage. 

Reactivation: Cancellation of gunfire.

Amumu.name: cursed hand
Amumu.description: Normal attacks cast a "curse" on the target. Targets under the curse will receive an additional 10% true damage when receiving magic damage for 3 seconds. If you apply the curse again, the effect time will be reset.

Amumu.name: Tangled bandage
Amumu.description:
Passive: Gain 1 Tangle Bandage charge every 13 seconds. Stacks up to 2 charges. 
Active effect: Releases a bandage that deals 60 magic damage (60 + 70%AP), stuns the target for 1 second, and draws you towards it.

Amumu.name: sob
Amumu.description: While active: Cry and deal 25 + 1.2% (1.2% + 0.4%AP) of the target's maximum health magic damage to surrounding enemies every second.

Amumu.name: Dadako
Amumu.description:
Passive: Physical damage taken is reduced by (1 + 4% increased AR + 4% increased MR). 
Active Effect: Deals 90 magic damage (90 + 50% AP) to nearby enemy units and slows them by 10% for 0.5 seconds. 
Every time you receive a normal attack, the cooldown of "Dadako" is reduced by 0.5 seconds.

Amumu.name: Curse of Mesomeso Mummy
Amumu.description:
Deals 150 magic damage (150 + 70%AP) to all nearby enemies and stuns them for 1.5 seconds. 
Grants "Cursed Hand".

Caitlyn.name: head shot
Caitlyn.description:
Every 6th normal attack becomes a "headshot", dealing 27 additional physical damage (50% AD + 125% critical chance). 
Enemies caught in traps or nets will receive a "headshot" with twice the range. 
Normal attacks from within the bushes will trigger headshots twice as fast.

Caitlyn.name: peace maker
Caitlyn.description:
Fires a penetrating bullet that deals 128 physical damage (60 + 125% AD). 
The bullet expands when it hits an enemy, but damage to subsequent targets is reduced by 40%. 
Deals 100% damage to enemies caught in traps or nets.

Caitlyn.name: yordle trap
Caitlyn.description:
Sets a trap that will be activated when an enemy champion steps on a specified location. Traps apply a snare effect to trapped champions for 1.5 seconds, making them visible for a short time. 
Traps last for 30 seconds and can place up to 2 traps.

Caitlyn.name: L-90 Caliber Net
Caitlyn.description:
It sends the net flying and knocks you back. 
Net deals 70 magic damage (70 + 80% AP) and reduces movement speed by 50% for 1.5 seconds.

Caitlyn.name: bullseye
Caitlyn.description: Aim at an enemy champion, becoming visible for 1.5 seconds, then snipe, dealing 200 (200+200% increased AD) (+20% of target's missing health) physical damage. Other enemy champions can step in and block the bullet.

Shyvana.name: power of dragon blood
Shyvana.description:
Obtain 8 stacks of Dragon Blood Power by defeating large monsters. 
Gain 15 stacks of Dragonblood Power by getting a kill or assist from a champion, or by defeating a Rift Herald or Baron Nasher. 
Gain 35 Dragon Blood Power by defeating a dragon. 
For every 100 stacks of Dragon Blood Power, one of Shyvana's skills will be strengthened.

Shyvana.name: twin bite
Shyvana.description:
The next normal attack is enhanced and becomes a double attack, dealing 62 (100% of AD) and 13 (20% of AD) physical damage respectively. 
Normal attacks reduce the cooldown of "Twin Bite" by 0.5 seconds. 
Dragon Form: Attacks in a wide area and applies normal attack effects to all targets. 
Obtaining 100 stacks of Dragon Blood Power will grant you Mountain Weight, and while in Dragon Form, Twin Bite will slow enemies by 30%.

Shyvana.name: burnout
Shyvana.description:
Deals 35 magic damage (35 + 30% increased AD) to nearby enemies and increases your movement speed by 30%. Movement speed returns to normal after 3 seconds. Normal attacks increase the duration of Burnout by up to 4 seconds. 
Dragon Form: The flames expand and cause damage over a wide area. 
Obtaining 200 stacks of Dragonblood Power grants Cloud Wings, and Burnout increases Shyvana's movement speed by an additional 25% while in dragon form.

Shyvana.name: flame breath
Shyvana.description:
Shoots a fireball that deals 79 magic damage (60 + 30%AD + 40%AP) to enemies hit and sets them on fire for 5 seconds. 
Basic attacks on a burning enemy deal additional magic damage equal to 3% of the target's maximum health. 

Dragon Form: The fireball explodes upon impact, dealing 141 magic damage (110 + 50%AD + 70%AP) within a certain area and leaving flames in the area for 4 seconds. This flame deals 35 magic damage (28 + 10%AD + 20%AP) to enemies within the area and sets them ablaze. 

When you acquire 300 stacks of Dragon Blood Power, you will acquire ``Breath of the Infernal'', and while in Dragon Form, the damage you inflict on enemies set on fire will become true damage.

Shyvana.name: Dragon bloodline
Shyvana.description:
Passive: Gain 1 Fury per second, 2 Fury with each basic attack. Once you reach 100 Fury, you will be able to activate "Dragon Bloodline", and your Dragon form will continue until all your Fury is consumed. 
Active effect: Transforms into a dragon, increases your physical strength by 350, and leaps to the specified location. Deals 150 magic damage (150 + 80% AP) to enemies touched while moving and knocks them back to the landing point. 
Obtaining 400 stacks of Dragon Blood Power will grant you "Ocean Life", which increases Omnivamp by 20% while in Dragon form.

Sivir.name: Fighting
Sivir.description: Damaging an enemy champion with a basic attack or skill increases your movement speed by 31 levels for 1.5 seconds.

Sivir.name: boomerang blade
Sivir.description:
Throws a cross blade, dealing 54 physical damage (10 + 75%AD + 60%AP) to all enemies hit. 
Damage increases by 0.5% for every 1% critical rate. The higher the attack speed, the shorter the casting time. 
Deals 80% damage to non-champion enemies.

Sivir.name: jumping blade
Sivir.description:
Attack speed is increased by 25% for 4 seconds. Normal attacks now bounce back to nearby enemies, dealing 13 physical damage (4 + 15%AD). If the first normal attack becomes a critical hit, the bounced attack will also become a critical hit. 
Deals 75% damage to minions. 
Each enemy can be hit up to twice by bouncing.

Sivir.name: spell shield
Sivir.description:
Gain a spell shield for 2 seconds. When you block a skill, you will recover 38 (65%AD + 50%AP) health and gain the "Battle Run" effect. 
If you fail to block, the cooldown of this skill is reduced by 50%.

Sivir.name: 戦姫の号令
Sivir.description:
Increases the movement speed of nearby allied champions by 15% for 10 seconds. During the duration of the effect, normal skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%. 
Indomitable Valor: While Warrior Princess's Command is active, you gain 1 stack of Morale every time you damage an enemy champion with a basic attack or skill, and 2 stacks of Morale when you get a kill or assist from a champion. 
Attack power increases by 2 for each stack of "Morale". 8スタックになると、周囲の味方チャンピオンの移動速度が追加で25%増加し、「戦姫の号令」の効果時間がリフレッシュされる。

Ziggs.name: short fuse
Ziggs.description:
Skill deals 24% damage to the tower. 
 " Bound Bomb " is strengthened and deals 20 additional magic damage  (20+15%AP) and deals 32% damage to the tower. 
 Each time you use the skill, the cooldown of "Short Fuse" is reduced by  4 seconds .

Ziggs.name: bound bomb
Ziggs.description: Throws a bomb that bounces on the ground, dealing  magic damage (70 + 65%AP) .

Ziggs.name: engineer bomb
Ziggs.description:
Throw a bomb. The bomb can be detonated within 4 seconds, dealing 70 magic damage (70 + 50%AP) to the enemy and knocking it away. I was also blown away, but I received no damage. 
 Damages towers, and towers with less than 20% health are  destroyed .

Ziggs.name: Hextech Mine
Ziggs.description:
Scatter landmines. Deals 50 magic damage (50 + 35% AP)  to enemies touched by the mine and reduces movement speed by 35%  for 2 seconds. 
 The damage the same enemy receives from the second and subsequent mines will be  40% . The mine lasts  for  5 seconds.

Ziggs.name: Mega Inferno Bomb
Ziggs.description:
Throws a long-range "Mega Inferno Bomb" at the specified location. Upon impact, the bomb explodes and deals 270 magic damage (270 + 85%AP)  to enemies within the surrounding area. 
 When using automatic aim, automatically selects a target within range and throws a bomb at that point (depending on target priority setting).

JarvanIV.name: Rhythm of martial spirit
JarvanIV.description: The first normal attack performed on an enemy deals additional  physical damage  equal to 8% of the target's current health ( 5 second cooldown  per enemy).

JarvanIV.name: dragon strike
JarvanIV.description:
Jarvan IV thrusts his spear in the specified direction, dealing 80 + 130% increased AD physical damage to the enemy hit and reducing physical defense by 10% for 3 seconds. 
 When the spear touches the Demacian flag, Jarvan IV moves to the position of the Demacian flag and knocks up  any enemies it touches for 0.75 seconds .

JarvanIV.name: golden aegis
JarvanIV.description:
Unleash the power of the king, giving a  30% slow  effect to surrounding enemies for 2 seconds, and gaining a  shield  that prevents damage equal to  100 + 1.6%  of maximum health for 5 seconds. 
 If there are multiple enemy champions nearby, prevent additional damage of 1% ( maximum 5) 1.6% per champion.

JarvanIV.name: Seal of Demacia
JarvanIV.description:
Passive effect: Attack speed increases by 25% . 
 Activation effect: Throws "Flag of Demacia". The flag deals 85 magic damage (85 + 80%AD) , remains in place for 8 seconds, and increases the attack speed of nearby friendly champions by 30% . 
 Tap this skill near the "Flag of Demacia" to use "Dragon Strike" against the flag.

rows.label: 発動効果:攻撃速度増加

JarvanIV.name: decisive battlefield
JarvanIV.description:
Leap far towards the enemy champion, dealing 200 physical damage  (200 + 170% increased AD ) to the target and surrounding enemies, and surrounding them with an impenetrable barrier for 3.5 seconds . Within 
 range, damage dealt by enemies is reduced  by 12% . This effect ends when the enemy leaves the barrier or the barrier disappears. 
 Reusing the skill will instantly make the barrier disappear.

XinZhao.name: unyielding
XinZhao.description: Every third normal attack deals an additional 14 physical damage  (22%AD) and recovers your own health by 13HP(7HP + 10%AD + 40%AP).

XinZhao.name: three shots
XinZhao.description:
The next 3 normal attacks are enhanced   and deal an additional  20 physical damage  ( 20 + 40% additional attack power ), and reduce the cooldown of other skills by  1 second . 
 Third normal attack knocks up the target for  0.75 seconds .

XinZhao.name: Thunder and wind roar suddenly
XinZhao.description:
Slash with a spear, dealing 60 physical damage  (40 + 50%AD) and inflicting 50% slow effect  for 1.5 seconds. 
 Then, immediately stab it with a spear, dealing  60 physical damage  ( 40 + 75%AD ) and applying  a 50% slow effect  for 1.5 seconds. 
 The farthest enemy champion or large monster that is hit becomes the " Challenge Target " for 3.5 seconds, and the range of " Gale and Lightning " is increased to that target. 
 Casting time is reduced by attack speed. 
 Deals 50%  damage to minions.

XinZhao.name: Soldiers are expensive and fast
XinZhao.description:
Dash towards the enemy and deal  55 magic damage (55 + 80% AP)  to all surrounding enemies, and  apply a 30% slow effect  for 0.5 seconds. For 5 seconds,  attack speed increases by 45% . 
 
 This skill has increased range for  "Taunt target" .

XinZhao.name: Crescent Spear Guard
XinZhao.description:
Passive effect: The last champion hit by a normal attack or "Hearty God Speed" becomes  "Challenge Target" . 
 Activation effect: Blew away with a spear,  Deals physical damage  equal to 75 (75 + 100% increased AD + 80% AP) + 15% of the enemy's maximum health, and  Knocks back all enemies except the "challenge target" . Blocks damage from a distance for 5 seconds. 
 Maximum damage to monsters is 600.

Sett.name: fighting spirit
Sett.description:
A normal attack that alternates left and right punches. The right punch is a little faster than the left, and deals an additional 9 physical damage (9+50% increased attack power) . 
 For every 5% of decreased physical strength,  0.25 additional physical strength automatic recovery (HP)  is obtained. 
 If 2 seconds pass without a right punch after a left punch, it will be reset to a left punch. The attack speed of the right punch is 8 times that of the left punch.

Sett.name: knuckle down
Sett.description:
Seeking Fight increases your movement speed by 35% when heading towards a champion for 1.5 seconds. 
 Furthermore, the next two normal attacks are  enhanced  and deal  physical damage  of 5 +  1.6% (+0.01%AD)  of maximum health. 
 The upper limit of additional damage against monsters is 100.

Sett.name: Haymaker
Sett.description:
Passive effect: Stores 100% of the damage received as  Fighting Spirit  up to a maximum of 345(100%HP). Fighting Spirit will rapidly decrease after 4 seconds  after receiving damage. 
 Activation effect: Consumes all  Fighting Spirit  and obtains a shield  with  durability equal to 100%  of the consumed  Fighting Spirit. The shield will dissolve in  3 seconds . After that, unleash a powerful punch and deal  confirmed damage  of 80 + 25% of the consumed  fighting spirit  ( 25% attack power  +  0.275% additional attack power ) to the enemy in the center (maximum  167 damage ). Enemies not in the center will receive  physical damage  instead.

Sett.name: face breaker
Sett.description: Hits the enemies on the left and right of you, dealing  88 physical damage   (50 + 60%AD)  and inflicting a slow effect  of 50% for 0.5 seconds . If you grab at least one enemy on each side, it will stun all enemies  for 1 second .

Sett.name: show stopper
Sett.description: Grabs an enemy champion and inflicts  Suppression  effect, and slams him into the ground in front of him, dealing 200/200 + 100% increased  physical damage  + 35%  of the grabbed enemy's bonus health as physical damage, and inflicts  99% slow  effect for 1 second. The further away the set is from where it struck, the less damage the enemy receives.

Sona.name: power cord
Sona.description:
After using a normal skill 3 times, your next normal attack against an enemy champion or epic monster will be enhanced and deal an additional  20 magic damage (20+15%AP)  and  0.5 second stun effect . 
 Code: When you use a normal skill, you will gain an aura for  for 3 seconds . This aura's buffs do not stack. Normal skill cooldown is reduced by  by 2% skill cooldown . 
 When you use a normal skill, other normal skills will go on a  cooldown for 0.54 seconds.

Sona.name: Him of Valor
Sona.description:
Emits a sound wave that deals 40 magic damage (40 + 40% AP) to the two closest enemies (champions prioritized). 
 Aura, acquire an aura that lasts for 3 seconds. The next normal attack of friendly champions within the aura range is  enhanced  and deals an additional 8 magic damage (8 + 20% AP ). 
 Enhanced aura deals 1.2 times the normal damage.

Sona.name: perseverance
Sona.description:
Heals you and one nearby friendly champion with the lowest health for 25 (+ 20%AP). 
 Aura: Wear an aura that gives allied champions within range a shield with durability  (25 + 18%AP)  for 3 seconds. 
A shield given by an enhanced  aura has a durability value that is 1.2 times  of a shield given by a normal aura.

Sona.name: Celerity
Sona.description:
Movement speed increases by 10% (10 + 3%AP)  for 5 seconds. 
 Aura: Gain an aura that lasts for 5 seconds. Increases the movement speed of allied champions within range of the aura by  10% (10 + 3% AP) . 
 The movement speed increased by the enhanced aura is  1.2 times the normal .

Sona.name: crescendo
Sona.description:
Passive effect: After using the skill, your aura will be strengthened for 20 seconds, giving you a stronger buff. 
 Activation effect: Plays  a chord  toward the specified point, and the chord emits sound waves every 0.75 seconds. The sound wave deals  35 magic damage (35 + 15% AP)  and stuns the first enemy hit  for 1 second . Enemies within the chord's effect range will also receive the  slow effect .

Darius.name: Heavy bleeding
Darius.description:
Normal attacks cause enemies to bleed, dealing 18 physical damage  (18 + 40% increased AD ) over 5 seconds. Stack up to 5 times. 
 When the maximum stack is reached, you will gain " Red-Blooded Rage " for 5 seconds,  Attack power  will increase by  32AD , and the maximum stack of " Massive Bleeding " will be applied at once instead of one stack. 
 Deals 180% damage to monsters.

Darius.name: killing ax
Darius.description:
After a short delay, swing your ax and deal 43 physical damage (18 + 35%AD) . 
 When the ax blade hits an enemy, it deals  120 physical damage (50 + 100%AD) , recovers 15% (maximum 45%)  of the  lost health for each champion or large monster hit, and inflicts "heavy bleeding".

Darius.name: leg slash
Darius.description: For 8 seconds, your next normal attack will be  enhanced , dealing an additional 21 physical damage  (30% AD) and reducing your movement speed by 90% for 1 second.

Darius.name: capture
Darius.description:
Passive effect:  Gain 15% physical defense penetration . 
 Active effect: Pulls the enemy in front of you and applies  40% slow effect   for 1.5 seconds .

Darius.name: noxus guillotine
Darius.description:
Jump and execute the champion. Deals 125 confirmed damage  (125 + 75% increased attack power ). This damage increases  by 20%  for each stack of " Major Bleeding " and adds " Major Bleeding ". 
 When you finish off the target with this skill,  Cooldown is removed ,  Mana cost is recovered , and  [T AG18] Acquire " Bloody Fury " and  for 1.5 seconds  make surrounding minions and monsters  run away .

DrMundo.name: carefree house calls
DrMundo.description:
Nullifies the next incapacitating effect. At that time, you will instead lose  3%  of your current health, and a container containing medicine will fall nearby. Collecting the container reduces the cooldown by  by 10 seconds  and restores  by 4%  of  maximum health (40 second cooldown). 
 Automatically recovers  1%  ( Stamina ) of  maximum health  every 5 seconds. If an enemy champion touches the container first, it will be destroyed.

DrMundo.name: bone cutting saw
DrMundo.description:
Throws a saw, dealing  magic damage  equal to 20% of the target's current health, and applying a slow effect of 40% for 2 seconds. 
 (Minimum  90 ) 
 If you hit an enemy, recover  25  of your health, if you hit a champion or monster, recover  50 . 
 Deal maximum 250 damage to monsters.

rows.label: モンスターに対する最大ダメージ

DrMundo.name: heart trembling
DrMundo.description:
Charges the defibrillator for 4 seconds, dealing 20 magic damage  to surrounding enemies every second. 
 Reactivate: Explodes the defibrillator, giving 20 (+ 55% attack power  + 5% increased health ) to surrounding enemies. When you damage an enemy with an explosion, you will recover health equal to 15% of the damage received during the duration of this skill. If the target is a champion or monster, it will restore 30% of health instead.

DrMundo.name: savage pain
DrMundo.description:
Passive effect: Gain 15 (up to 30 depending on your missing health) attack power. 
 Activation effect: The next normal attack is  enhanced  and additionally deals 5 (+5% increased AD + 5% increased HP)  of  physical damage . This damage increases up to 60% according to your reduced health. 
 If the target is killed or the target is a small monster, the target will be bounced away and the enemy hit by the bounced target will receive the same damage.

DrMundo.name: Maximum administration
DrMundo.description:
Recovers 25% of lost health. 
 Also, for 10 seconds, attack power (AD) increases by 0  (4% increase) , movement speed increases  by 15% , and recovers  15%  of maximum health after the effect ends.

Tristana.name: draw & glow
Tristana.description: The range of normal attacks, Yordle Grenade, and Buster Shot increases by 10 per level.

Tristana.name: rabbit fire
Tristana.description: For 7 seconds,  attack speed increases by 50% .

Tristana.name: rocket jump
Tristana.description:
Jump to the specified point and deal 85 magic damage  (+50% AP ) to surrounding enemies and slow them down by 60%  for 1.5 seconds. 
 If you get a kill or assist from an enemy champion or detonate a maximum stack of Yordle Grenades on an enemy champion, the cooldown of Rocket Jump will be removed.

Tristana.name: yordle grenade
Tristana.description:
Passive effect: Killing an enemy with a normal attack creates a grenade that deals 65 magic damage (65 + 25%AP)  to surrounding enemies. 
 Activation effect: Attach a grenade to the enemy or tower and deal  50 physical damage (50 + 75% increased AD + 50% AP)  to surrounding enemies. Every time you perform a normal attack or use a skill on the attached grenade, the grenade's damage increases by  by 30%  and stacks up to  4 times . 
 Immediately explodes when the maximum stack is reached. When attached to a tower, the explosion range will be doubled by  to .

Tristana.name: buster shot
Tristana.description: Fires a huge cannonball at one enemy, dealing 350 magic damage  (350 + 100% AP) and knocking it back.

Nautilus.name: iron anchor
Nautilus.description:
Deals an additional 13 physical damage  (AD) when attacking normally and applies a snare effect to the target for 1 (increases with level) seconds. 
 Same target has a 6 second cooldown.

Nautilus.name: anchor throwing
Nautilus.description:
Throws an anchor forward, dealing 90 magic damage (90 + 75%AP)  to the first target it hits, and moves in the direction of the target while pulling it towards you 
. 

 If the anchor hits the terrain, it will pull you to the terrain, and this skill's cooldown and mana cost 
 will be restored by 50% .

Nautilus.name: Fury of the ocean
Nautilus.description:
Obtains a shield with durability of 159 (65 + 13% max HP ) for up to 6 seconds. 
 While the shield is deployed, normal attacks are strengthened and additionally deals  50 magic damage  ( 50  +  40% AP ) around the target. 
 Deals 200% damage to monsters.

Nautilus.name: crushed water
Nautilus.description:
Emits a wave that deals 70 magic damage (70 + 50%AP) and 35% slow effect . The slow effect takes  1.5 seconds  to return to normal. 
 The damage dealt to the enemy by the second and subsequent waves will be  50% . 
 Deals  175%  damage to monsters.

Nautilus.name: explosive launch
Nautilus.description: Fires a bomb at enemy champions, dealing 150 magic damage (150 + 70%AP) ,  knocking them up , and  stunning them for 1 second . All enemies other than the target touched by the bomb will also be  knocked up ,  stunned  and  will receive 125 magic damage (125 + 40%AP) .

Braum.name: Fist of Han
Braum.description:
Normal attacks inflict  Han's Fist for  for 4 seconds. Enemies with stacks will receive Han's Fist stacks even when their allies attack them normally. 
 When 4 stacks are reached, the enemy will be stunned  for 1.25 seconds  and receive  45 magic damage (AP) . 
 Enemies inflicted with stun will not be able to inflict  stacks for 8 seconds , but Braum's normal attacks will additionally deal  9 magic damage (AP) .

Braum.name: winter frostbite
Braum.description:
Throws ice, dealing 81 magic damage (60 + 3%AP)  and slowing 70%  for 2 seconds. 
 Gives 1 stack of  Frostbite  to the target.

Braum.name: Leave it to me!
Braum.description: Leap up to a friendly champion. After landing, you and your allies gain 10 Physical Defense  (10 + 10% Physical Defense Increase)  and 10 Magic Defense  (10 + 10% Magic Defense Increase)  for 3 seconds.

Braum.name: unbreakable shield
Braum.description:
Raise your shield to block long-range attacks for 4 seconds. 
 The first attack you receive from the direction you are facing is completely nullified, and damage received from subsequent attacks is reduced by 35%. 
 Movement speed increases by 15% while holding a shield.

Braum.name: water river fissure
Braum.description:
Hit the ground hard to create a crack, deal 150 magic damage  (150 + 60%AP), and knock up  for 1 second . Fissures inflict a  40% slow  on enemies, and the slow effect lasts  for  for 4 seconds. 
 Second and subsequent enemy champions hit will be knocked up  for 0.25 seconds .

rows.label: ノックアップ効果時間

Brand.name: up in flames
Brand.description:
The skill sets the enemy on fire  and deals magic damage  equal to 3% of the target's maximum health over 4 seconds. 
 If  Flaming  is stacked 3 times on a champion or large monster, it will explode after 2 seconds, dealing  magic damage  equal to 10% (10% +0.02%AP) of the target's maximum health to surrounding enemies. 
  Burning  will not stack on exploded enemies for 4 seconds.

Brand.name: scorched flame
Brand.description:
Shoots a fireball. The fireball deals 80 (+55%AP) magic damage to the first enemy it hits. 
 If the target is on fire,  stuns it for 1.75 seconds .

Brand.name: pillar of flame
Brand.description:
A moment later after activation, a pillar of fire rises at the specified location, dealing 70 magic damage (70 + 55%AP)  to the enemy. 
 The damage dealt by " Pillar of Fiery " to burning enemies increases  by 30% .

Brand.name: Cauterization
Brand.description:
対象の周囲の敵を燃やして60の魔法ダメージ(60 + 45%AP)を与える。
炎上対象にしている場合は「焼灼」がさらに広範囲に拡散する。

Brand.name: Hellfire
Brand.description:
Releases a torrent of flame. The flame bounces between the enemy and yourself up to 5 times, dealing 100 magic damage (100 + 30% AP) each time. 
  Burning  If the target is on fire, a slow effect of  30%  will be applied for a short time. 
Attempts to bounce towards champions with near maximum stacks of Burning .

Blitzcrank.name: Mana barrier
Blitzcrank.description: When health drops below 35%, gain  shield  that absorbs 90 damage  (30% mana ) for 10 seconds .

Blitzcrank.name: rocket grab
Blitzcrank.description: Fires his right arm, dealing 110 magic damage  (+100%AP) and drawing the target to his position.

Blitzcrank.name: overdrive
Blitzcrank.description:
Gain an increased movement speed  of 35%  that gradually decays for 2.5 seconds. 
 This skill can be reactivated, and when reactivated, you gain an increased movement speed of 140%  that gradually decays for 1.5 seconds . 
 Your movement speed is reduced by 33%  for 1 second after the effect ends. If you reactivate this skill, this slow effect increases to 99%  for 1 second.

Blitzcrank.name: power fist
Blitzcrank.description: The next normal attack is  enhanced  and becomes a critical hit, dealing  105 physical damage  ( 180% ) and knocking up the target.

rows.label: クリティカルダメージ

Blitzcrank.name: lightning field
Blitzcrank.description:
Passive effect: If "Lightning Field" is not on cooldown, normal attacks mark the enemy and deal  40 magic damage  ( 40 + 15%AD ) after 
 1 second. 
 
 Activation effect: Gives  275 + 80% AP  to surrounding enemies and  Silence effect  for 0.5 seconds.

Veigar.name: great power of evil
Veigar.description:
When you attack an enemy champion with a skill, you will receive   1 stack   of   "Great Power of Evil"  . 
 When you kill a minion or monster with a skill, you will receive 1 stack  of  "Great Force of Evil" . 
When you get a kill or assist from a champion, you will get 7 stacks  of  "The Great Power of Evil" . 
 Obtain 1 of  magic power  for each stack of "Great Power of Evil" . 
The  magic power  that Veigar gained through his great power is 0.

Veigar.name: evil strike
Veigar.description: Fires dark energy in the specified direction, dealing 65 magic damage  (65 + 55% AP ) to the first two enemies hit.

Veigar.name: dark matter
Veigar.description:
Drops dark matter and deals 100 magic damage (100 + 95%AP). 
 For every 50 stacks of " Great Force of Evil ", the cooldown of this skill is reduced by 10%. 
 Cooldown is currently reduced by 0%.

Veigar.name: event horizon
Veigar.description:
Creates a cage that stuns enemies that pass through it for 1.75 seconds. The cage lasts for 3 seconds. 
 If Veigar automatically uses " Dark Matter ", priority will be given to the target stunned by " Event Horizon ".

Veigar.name: meteor burst
Veigar.description:
Casts dark magic at the target enemy champion, dealing 185 magic damage (185 + 75% AP) . This damage increases by 0%~100% depending on the target's reduced health. 
 Maximum damage occurs when the enemy's health is less than  35% .

Malphite.name: granite shield
Malphite.description: If you do not take damage for 8 (hours) seconds, you will receive a shield ( 11% of maximum HP ) with durability 76.

Malphite.name: seismic shard
Malphite.description: Throws out rock fragments, dealing  70 magic damage (70 + 45% AP) , reducing the target's movement speed by  15% , and increasing your own movement speed by 15%  for  3 seconds.

Malphite.name: thunderclap
Malphite.description:
Passive effect: Gain 10 physical defense (25% AR) . 
 Active effect: For 6 seconds, normal attacks deal  20 physical damage (10 + 20%AD)  in a fan-shaped area. The first normal attack during the effect period is strengthened   and deals 60 additional physical damage (40 + 40% AR)  to the target.

Malphite.name: ground slam
Malphite.description: Slams the ground and deals  magic damage  (60 + 45%AD + 45%AP) to surrounding enemies, and reduces the target's attack speed by 35%  for 3 seconds.

Malphite.name: unstoppable force
Malphite.description: Rushes to the specified location and deals 200 magic damage  (200 + 90% magic power ) to surrounding enemies, and  knocks them up for 1.5 seconds .

Mordekaiser.name: endless darkness
Mordekaiser.description:
Gain 1% magic defense penetration . Normal attacks deal 30% additional magic damage . 
 When you kill an enemy or hit an enemy champion or large monster with a normal skill or attack, you gain 1 stack of Endless Darkness for 5 seconds. When you reach 3 stacks, you will be surrounded by a negative energy field. 
 Negative energy field deals  magic damage  equal to 5 + 1%  of the target's maximum health every second, and increases own movement speed by 3%  for 5 seconds. 
 Negative energy field duration refreshes when you kill an enemy or when a normal skill or attack hits an enemy champion or large monster. 
 "Endless Darkness" deals up to 24 damage to monsters every second.

Mordekaiser.name: A soul-destroying blow
Mordekaiser.description:
Hits the ground with Nightfall, dealing 84 magic damage (84-150(↑)+70%AP + 120% increased attack power). 
 If only one enemy is hit, the damage is increased by  45%  and deals  122  magic damage ( 122  +  101.5%  AP +  174%  increased attack power).

Mordekaiser.name: immortal armor
Mordekaiser.description:
Automatic effect: Stores 35% of damage dealt and 7% of damage received. For non-champions, store 25% of the damage dealt and damage received instead. 
 Activation effect:  Acquire accumulated damage as a shield  for 4 seconds. When activated again,  35% of the remaining shield amount will be recovered as health . 
 Minimum shield amount:  5% of health  
 Maximum shield amount:  30% of health

Mordekaiser.name: curse of death
Mordekaiser.description: Pulls enemies towards you, dealing 60 magic damage  (60 + 55%AP) and slowing them by 30% for 1 second.

Mordekaiser.name: land of death
Mordekaiser.description:
For 7 seconds, drag the enemy champion with you into  "The Land of the Dead" . During this effect duration: 
 - Takes away 8% of the target's basic status (AD, AP, physical defense, magic defense,  maximum ). 
 - If the target is defeated, the stolen status will be maintained until the target is revived. 
 - If the enemy is not defeated, the stolen status will be returned to the opponent when the skill ends.

Leona.name: sunlight
Leona.description: The skill applies  "Sunlight"  to the enemy for 1.5 seconds. When another friendly champion deals damage to an enemy, the target's  "Sunlight"  is consumed to deal  34 additional magic damage (AP) .

Leona.name: shield of daybreak
Leona.description: The next normal attack is  enhanced , stuns for 1 second and deals  15 additional magic damage  ( + 30% AP ).

Leona.name: eclipse
Leona.description:
For 3 seconds, gain  40 additional physical defense   (40 + 20% increase)  and  40 additional magic defense   (40 + 20% increase) . 
 When the effect ends, deals  80 magic damage   (80 + 40%AP)  to surrounding enemies, and if it hits an enemy, the acquired  additional defense power  is maintained for 3 seconds.

Leona.name: zenith blade
Leona.description:
Deals 60 magic damage  (60 + 40%AP) to enemies in a straight line. 
 Gives a 0.5 second snare effect to the last enemy champion hit and dashes to it.

Leona.name: solar flare
Leona.description: Irradiates light, dealing 150 magic damage (150 + 80%AP) and slowing by 80% for 1.75 seconds. Enemies in the center will be stunned instead of slowed.

Urgot.name: echo flame
Urgot.description:
During normal attacks and when activating "Purge", the leg turrets in that direction will attack sporadically, 
Deals 38 (60% AD) (+3% (Lv) of target's maximum HP) physical damage. (Cooldown 15 seconds (Lv) seconds for each leg) 
Deals up to 100 (Lv) damage to monsters.

Urgot.name: Corrupted Shell
Urgot.description: Fires a high-explosive shell that deals 84 physical damage (40 + 70% AD) and slows you by 45% for 1.25 seconds.

Urgot.name: purge
Urgot.description:
For 4 seconds, perform a ranged attack on the nearest enemy, dealing 23 physical damage (10 + 20%AD) and applying 70% of the normal attack effect. During the duration of the effect, your movement speed is reduced by 125 and you gain 40% slow resistance. 
Reactivation: This skill ends. 
Deals at least 50 damage to minions and monsters, and prioritizes attacking champions most recently hit by your skill. 
When the skill level reaches maximum, the effect time becomes infinite.

Urgot.name: disdain
Urgot.description: Gain a shield with durability 70 (70 + 150% increased AD + 15% increased HP) for 4 seconds and charge forward, dealing 90 physical damage (90 + 100% increased AD) to all enemies in your path and stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Scoops up the first enemy champion and knocks non-champion units aside.

Urgot.name: death grinder
Urgot.description:
Fires a chem drill. The drill deals 100 physical damage (100 + 70% increased AD) to the first champion it hits, sticks for 4 seconds, and slows the target by up to 75% based on the target's missing HP. 
Reactivation: When the HP of the target hit by the drill drops below 25%, chant for 1.5 seconds to pull them towards you and finish them off. When you land a finishing blow, it applies a fear effect to surrounding enemies for 1.5 seconds. 
If the enemy's HP is below a certain level when the effect ends, this skill will be automatically reactivated.

Ahri.name: life suction
Ahri.description:
When the skill hits the target, you will receive a stack of "Vital Suction". With 3 stacks, the next time your skill hits an enemy, recover your  health  by 40  (40 + 20%AP)  . 
 If an enemy champion is defeated within 3 seconds of Ahri dealing damage, absorb their vitality and recover  health   80  (80 + 35% AP)

Ahri.name: orb of illusion
Ahri.description: Sends an orb that goes back and forth, dealing 40  magic damage (40 + 45%AP) , and when it returns, it deals 40  true damage (40 + 45%AP) .

Ahri.name: fox fire
Ahri.description:
Releases 3 foxfires. Foxfire chases the enemy and deals 45 magic damage (45 + 35%AP) . Movement speed increases by 45% and returns to normal over 1.5 seconds. 
 If the enemy is hit by multiple foxfires, the damage from the second and subsequent shots will be 30%. 
 Foxfire prioritizes the champion hit by  Charm , then prioritizes the enemy that was hit with a normal attack immediately before.

Ahri.name: charm
Ahri.description: Throw a kiss, dealing  60 magic damage (60 + 50% AP)  to the first enemy touched, applying  charm , and  making them walk in your direction for 1.4 seconds .

Ahri.name: spirit rush
Ahri.description:
Dash forward and fire an energy bullet, dealing 60 magic damage  (60 + 35%AP) to 3 surrounding enemies. 
 This skill can be reused up to 2 times within 12 seconds. 
 If you deprive a champion of their life with ``Spirit Suction'' during ``Spirit Rush'', the time you can reactivate ``Spirit Rush'' will be extended to a maximum of 10 seconds, and you will gain an additional charge of ``Spirit Rush'' (can be charged up to 3 times). 
 Dash distance increases depending on champion level. Energy bullets attack champions first.

Akali.name: assassin's stamp
Akali.description:
When you damage a champion with a skill, a ring appears for 4 seconds. 
 When you cross the ring boundary, your next normal attack will be  enhanced  and will deal  37 additional magic damage  ( 37 +  60% AP  +  65% AD ). 
 When moving towards the ring,  movement speed increases by 30% . 
 Crossing the ring boundary increases  movement speed by 30%  when moving towards enemy champions for 2 seconds.

Akali.name: Five consecutive kunai
Akali.description: Throws 5 kunai and deals 77 magic damage  (35 + 65%AP + 60%AP). If you hit an enemy at maximum range, it will slow you down by 50% for 0.5 seconds.

Akali.name: veil of twilight
Akali.description:
Generates a smoke screen that gradually spreads for 5.5 seconds and increases  Maximum Energy  by 100. When Akari is inside the smoke screen, she becomes  invisible  and her movement speed increases by  35% . 
 When you attack,  Invisibility  status is removed for 0.67 seconds.

Akali.name: Turn over and hold the sword in your hand
Akali.description:
1st activation: Throws a shuriken while flipping backwards, dealing 46 magic damage  (30 + 25%AD + 30%AP) to the first enemy hit and marking them for 3 seconds. If it does not hit the enemy, the shuriken will instead hit the  Twilight Shade  location and mark it. 
 Reactivate: Dash to the marked target and deal 102 magic damage  (70 + 50%AD + 80%AP).

Akali.name: Completion
Akali.description:
1st activation: Dash past enemy champions, dealing  80 magic damage (80 + 50% AP + 30% additional physical defense) . Can be activated again after 2.5 seconds. 
 Second activation: Dash in the specified direction and deal  70-210 magic damage (70 + 30% AP + 90% additional physical defense)  depending on the enemy's reduced health. 
 When the target's health falls below 35%, the damage dealt becomes maximum.

Akshan.name: dirty fight
Akshan.description:
Deals 25 magic damage (AP) for every 3 hits of normal attacks and skills. 
 If the target is a champion, gain a shield that prevents  40 damage  ( 40 + 40% physical defense ) for 2 seconds (cooldown  12 seconds ). 
 
 Performs a second attack after attacking, dealing  26 physical damage  ( 50% AD ). This attack is cancelable; if canceled, the movement speed increases by 40(Movement speed ) and returns to normal over 1 second. 

 Press and hold the attack button to fire a second attack.

Akshan.name: boomerang of revenge
Akshan.description:
Throws a boomerang and deals 47 physical damage (5 + 80% attack power) . The range increases each time you hit an enemy. 
 If hit, you and your movement speed will increase  by 40%  and return to normal over 1 second. 
 Deals  55% damage  to minions.

Akshan.name: The style of a thief
Akshan.description:
Passive Effect: Enemies who kill a friendly champion become  Rogues  for 40 seconds. If a villain is killed within 3 seconds of dealing damage, you will receive  100 gold  and the killed ally will be revived. 
 Activation effect:  Camouflage for 1.75 seconds . When moving towards  Villain ,  movement speed increases by 80% , and  mana automatic recovery  effect equal to 2% of lost mana is obtained. The duration is infinite while you are near the terrain or in the bushes.

Akshan.name: hero swing
Akshan.description:
Fires a hook, swings around the stuck terrain and attacks the nearest enemy, dealing 30 physical damage  (30 + 15% increased attack power ) per shot. 
 Jump off the rope when you hit an enemy champion or terrain. 
 Reactivate: Jump off the rope. 
 Killing or assisting a champion removes this skill's cooldown. 
 Prioritize the champion you damaged most recently. 
  Normal attack effect  deals  25%  damage. 
 Each attack has a  critical  judgment, and if it becomes critical, it deals  150%  damage.

Akshan.name: deserved reward
Akshan.description:
Lock onto an enemy champion and charge up to 5 attacks over 3 seconds. 
 Reactivation: Release an attack and deal 260 physical damage (20 + 10%AD)  to the first enemy or structure hit. This damage increases depending on the target's missing health up to a maximum of  1010 physical damage (80 + 40%AD) . 
 The damage of each attack increases by a percentage equal to 50% of  Critical Chance . This attack deals the final blow to minions with low health.

Ashe.name: frost shot
Ashe.description:
Normal attacks and damage skills apply a  15%  slow effect to the target hit for  for 2 seconds . 
 Normal attack deals  110%  additional damage according to critical damage ( 10%  +  0% current critical rate ). 
 Critical hits do not deal any additional damage, but instead give the target a slowing effect of  40%  that gradually decreases.

Ashe.name: ranger focus
Ashe.description:
Passive effect: Gain stacks of  Focus  for 4 seconds with normal attacks. 
 When you reach 4 stacks, you can reactivate this skill. 
 Activation effect: Attack speed increases by 20%  for 6 seconds. While the skill is active, normal attacks change into multiple arrows, dealing  115% physical damage .

Ashe.name: volley
Ashe.description:
Fires 5 arrows in a fan shape, dealing 87 physical damage (20 + 115%AD) . 
 Enemies can block multiple arrows, but only take damage from the first one. 
 Volley becomes a critical hit and applies a large slow effect to enemy champions hit.

Ashe.name: scout hawk
Ashe.description:
Releases "Hawk Spirit" and visualizes enemies that pass through it. 
 Reactivation: "Hawk Spirit" spreads and secures visibility within the range for 5 seconds. Units within range become visible for 5 seconds.

Ashe.name: crystal arrow
Ashe.description:
Fires an ice arrow that stuns the first enemy champion it hits and deals 200 magic damage  (200 + 40%AP) to all nearby enemies. The stun effect lasts  1.5-3.5 seconds  and increases depending on the arrow's flight distance. 

 Reactivation: Long press and drag to control the arrow's path. The arrow's direction of travel can only be changed by a certain angle   from the direction in which it was originally fired. Tap the Cancel button to cancel the operation. 

 Ash can still move while controlling the arrow's path, but if he receives an action-disrupting effect that interrupts chanting, arrow control will be automatically interrupted.

Annie.name: I love playing with fire
Annie.description: スキルを4回使用すると、次に行う攻撃スキルが命中した敵を1(レベルに応じて変化)秒間スタンさせる。

Annie.name: fireball
Annie.description:
Throws a fireball. The fireball explodes, dealing 80 magic damage  (80 + 85%AP) in a small area. 
 When you kill an enemy, the mana cost of "Fireball" is restored and half of its cooldown is removed.

Annie.name: burning fire
Annie.description: Releases a fan of flame, dealing 70 magic damage (70 + 70%AP)  to all enemies within the area.

Annie.name: molten shield
Annie.description:
For 3 seconds, you and Tivers gain a shield with durability  (50 + 40%AP) , and your movement speed increases by 25% . 
 Movement speed gradually returns to normal over 3 seconds.

Annie.name: Do it! Tibbers!
Annie.description:
Summons Tibbers and deals 130 magic damage (130 + 60%AP)  to surrounding enemies. For the next 20 seconds, Tibbers' attacks deal  70 magic damage (70 + 20% AP) . 
 Tibbers becomes enraged (movement speed increases by 100%, attack speed increases by 210%) under the following conditions. 
 When summoned, after attacking an enemy, or when Annie falls down. 
 Reactivate: Order Tibbers to attack the target. Attacking moves cannot be blocked. 
 When landing, deals  110 magic damage (110 + 30%AP)  and knocks up the target.

Alistar.name: warrior's roar
Alistar.description:
When you take damage, you recover 27(Health) and the health of nearby friendly champions by 54(Health). 
 Knocking up or stunning a champion with your skill reduces the cooldown by  10 seconds .

Alistar.name: crushing
Alistar.description: Deals 60 magic damage (60 + 50%AP)  to surrounding enemies and knocks them up  for  for 1 second.

Alistar.name: head butt
Alistar.description:
Dash towards the enemy and deal 50 magic damage (50 + 60%AP) and knock them back. 
 Can also target towers and deal 75% damage.

Alistar.name: Break through
Alistar.description:
Stomps on the ground, dealing 10 magic damage  to surrounding enemies every 0.5 seconds for 0.5 seconds.  The upper limit of magic damage is 100 (100 + 40%AP) . 
 When you damage an enemy champion 5 times with "Trade", your next normal attack against the champion within 5 seconds will be  enhanced , deal an additional  40 magic damage (AP) , and  apply a 1 second stun effect . 
 You can only get one stack per hit.

Alistar.name: unyielding will
Alistar.description: Removes the action blocking effect and gains 55% damage reduction effect  for 7 seconds.

Ambessa.name: Drake Hound's Onslaught
Ambessa.description:
Self-Defense: Move the left joystick immediately after using a skill to dash a short distance in that direction. 
 Drake Hound's Onslaught:  The next normal attack within 4 seconds of activating "Self-Defense"  has attack speed 50% , range increased, and 5 additional physical damage (5 + 2.5 AD + Gives 25% increased critical hit rate)  and recovers (↑) 50 Ki (increases at level 1/6/11). Stack up to 3 times.

Ambessa.name: canning sweep
Ambessa.description:
Cunning Sweep: Sweep around yourself with two-handed drake hound, dealing physical damage equal to 30 (30 + 30% bonus attack power)  plus 2% (2% + 0.02% bonus attack power)  of the target's maximum health. For enemies at the edge of the attack range, this damage increases to  60 (60 + 60% increased attack power)  plus  4% of the target's maximum health (4% + 0.04% increased attack power) . 
 When "Cunning Sweep" hits an enemy, after a while  it changes to "Thundering Slam" for 3.5 seconds . 
 Thundering Slam: Attacks relentlessly in a straight line, dealing physical damage equal to  70 (70 + 90% increased attack power)  plus  4% (4% + 0.04% increased attack power)  of the target's maximum health. Inflicts physical damage equal to  35 (35 + 45% increased attack power)  and  2% of maximum physical strength (2% + 0.02% increased attack power)  to other targets. 
 Physical strength percentage damage against monsters is capped at  55% .

rows.label: カニングスイープ: 両手ハウンドのダメージ[対象の最大体力]
カニングスイープ: 外縁部のダメージ[対象の最大体力]
サンダリングスラム: 最初の対象[対象の最大体力]
サンダリングスラム: その他の対象[対象の最大体力]

Ambessa.name: break off diplomatic relations
Ambessa.description:
Preparing for the confrontation, acquires  Durability 95 shield (95)   + 125% increased AD  for 1.5 seconds, and blocks all movement-obstructing effects for 0.5 seconds. After that, it releases a shock wave and deals  70 physical damage   (70 + 80% AD increase)  to surrounding enemies. 
 If the immobilization effect is prevented, the damage of the shock wave increases to  105   (105 + 120% increased AD) .

Ambessa.name: Lacerate
Ambessa.description:
Swings the Drake Hound in both hands around himself, dealing  40 physical damage  (40 +  50% increased attack power ) to the enemy he hits, and applying a  99% slow effect . The slow effect gradually returns to normal over 1 second. 
 Reactivation: If you activate " Drake Hound's Fierce Attack " after "Racereit" is activated, "Rasereit" will be activated again after the dash ends.

Ambessa.name: public execution
Ambessa.description:
Passive effect: Physical defense penetration increases by 10%. Recovers physical strength equal to 12.5% of the damage dealt by the activated skill. 
 When you damage a minion, you recover  25%  of your original health recovery amount, and when you damage a monster, you recover  40%  of your original health recovery amount. 

 Drake Hound's  Enhanced  attack now grants the same recovery bonus. 

 Active effect: Captures the farthest enemy champion in a straight line and blinks to that position, applying  Suppression  to the target for 1 seconds. During this effect period, acquires 30% damage reduction effect and becomes unstoppable. After that, slam the target on the ground, and add 1.2% of  target's reduced physical strength  to 200 (20% + 0.05% attack power + Deals  physical damage  equal to 0.05%Magic Power) and stuns for 0.4 seconds. 

 If Public Execution does not hit an enemy champion, 35% of its cooldown is refunded.

Evelynn.name: shadow of demon
Evelynn.description:
If you do not use normal attacks or skills for 4 seconds, you will acquire  "Shadow of Demon" . When taking damage from enemy champions or towers,  "Shadow of Demons"  goes on a  cooldown for  1.5 seconds. 
 While "Shadow of the Demon"  is active, if your health is below 320 (maximum HP) , you will recover 17 health (17 + 7.5%AP)  every second. 
 After level 5, when  "Shadow of the Demon"  is activated, it becomes  Camouflage .

Evelynn.name: hate spike
Evelynn.description:
Fires two rows of spikes, dealing 40 magic damage (40 + 50%AP)  to all enemies hit. 
 Can be reactivated within 4 seconds. 
 Deals  40% damage  to minions.

Evelynn.name: allure
Evelynn.description:
Cast " Curse " on a champion or monster for 5 seconds. The next normal attack or skill consumes " Curse " and slows the target by 65% for 1 second. 

 If " Curse " continues for more than 2.5 seconds, it will give  charm effect  for 1 second when consumed. If the target is a champion, reduce  magic defense  by  by 20%  for 4 seconds. If the target is a monster, additionally deals 300 of  magic damage (300 + 60% AP). 

 Even if you activate " Allure ", " Bewitching Shadow " will not be canceled.

Evelynn.name: whiplash
Evelynn.description:
Whips the target and deals magic damage equal to  normal attack effect  and 55 + 2% of target's maximum physical strength (2% + 0.01%AP) . Afterwards,  Increases own movement speed by 30%  for 2 seconds . 
 When enveloped in "Bewitching Shadow", the next  "Whiplash"  will be strengthened  , pulling itself towards the target and dealing magic damage to all enemies it comes into contact with for  80 + 4% of the target's maximum health (4% + 0.015%AP) .

Evelynn.name: last caress
Evelynn.description: You will be unable to specify targets for a short period of time, and will deal heavy damage to enemies within range in front of you, then warp a large distance backwards.  Deals 150 magic damage (150 + 75%AP) . This damage increases to 230% if the enemy champion's health is below 35%.

Irelia.name: Ionian Passion
Irelia.description:
When a skill hits an enemy, gain an increased attack speed of 3% for 6 seconds. Maximum  4 stacks . 
 When fully stacked, normal attack effects deal  25 additional magic damage (25 + 30% AP)  to champions and minions. 
 The effect time is updated when performing a normal attack on an enemy champion. 
 Gain multiple stacks if the skill hits multiple champions.

Irelia.name: Shunblade
Irelia.description:
Dash past the enemy, dealing  4% physical damage (10 + 65%AD)  and recovering  7% (11% HP)  of your physical strength. 
 If the target is marked or killed by "Shunblade", the cooldown of "Shunblade" will be removed. 
 When aiming, give priority to the target where "Shunblade" will be reset. 
 Deals 150%  additional damage to minions.

Irelia.name: unyielding dance
Irelia.description:
Hold down for up to 1.5 seconds to block yourself with the sword and reduce damage received by 60% (+7%). 
 Release: Swing the sword forward, dealing  49 physical damage (20 + 50%AD + 40%AP) . This damage increases to a maximum of 100% depending on the charging time. 
 This skill cannot be interrupted midway.

Irelia.name: A flawless dance sequence
Irelia.description:
Fly the blade to the specified position. It can be reactivated within 3 seconds to release a new blade. 
 The two blades fly from each other and converge, dealing  80 + 80%  AP magic damage to the enemy they hit and stunning them for 1 second. Mark enemy champions and large monsters for 5 seconds.

Irelia.name: vanguard blade
Irelia.description:
Fires a large amount of blades, dealing 125 magic damage  (125 + 70%AP ) and marking enemy champions and large monsters for 5 seconds . 
 When the blade hits an enemy champion, it spreads out in a radial pattern and  disarms  the enemy for 3 seconds . The wall of blades deals 100 magic damage  (100 + 70% AP ) and  reduces movement speed by 90% for 1 second .

Vi.name: Metta hit
Vi.description:
Every 3 normal attacks on the same target, 4.8% (4.8%) of the target's maximum health +0.03% increased attack power ) deals additional  physical damage , reduces the target's  physical defense  by 20%  for 4 seconds, and increases own  attack speed  by 27% . 
 Maximum  300 damage  against monsters.

Vi.name: Go straight and blow away
Vi.description:
Hold: Charges a powerful punch, slows it by 15%, and increases punch damage and dash distance. 
 Release: Dash forward and deal 60-120 physical damage  (60 + 80%AD + 120 + 160%AP) to the enemy hit, and inflict  "Meta Strike" . When it hits an enemy champion, it stops and knocks back the target enemy champion. 
 Deals 75% damage to minions and monsters. 
 Overcharging cancels use and restores 50% of cooldown and 50% of mana cost.

Vi.name: Etiquette for a fight
Vi.description:
Passive: Gain a stack of Fighting Etiquette when you hit an enemy with a normal attack or skill. Maximum 5 stacks. 
 Active effect: Gain a shield that prevents 60 damage  for 3 seconds. Shield protects against damage by increasing (1.5% Max Health) with each stack consumed, and movement speed increases by  by 47%  at maximum stack. 
 Stacks of "Fighting Etiquette" decrease by 1, gaining a maximum of 1 stack for each normal attack or skill.

Vi.name: A ruthless attack
Vi.description:
The next normal attack is  enhanced  and deals 30 additional physical damage (20 + 15% attack power + 70% magic power)  to the target and enemies behind it. 
 Gain a new charge  every 11 seconds  and can hold up to 2 charges  .

Vi.name: intrusion investigation
Vi.description:
Chases enemy champions and knocks them up for 1.25 seconds, dealing 150 physical damage  (150 + 140% increased physical attack power (AD)). 
 Visualizes the target and cannot be stopped from moving while chasing it. Enemies in the path are blown away and receive 75% damage .

Varus.name: personification of revenge
Varus.description:
When you get a kill or assist from a champion, you get: 
 - Attack Speed  55%  (this effect can exceed the attack speed cap) 
 - Attack Power  0 (20x increased AD)  
 - Magical Power  0 (20x increased AP)  
 Get a kill or assist from a non-champion: 
 - Attack Speed  20%  
 - Attack Power  0 (10x increased AD)  
 - Magic Power  0 (10x increased AP)  
 These bonuses last  for  5 seconds.

Varus.name: Throw the universe
Varus.description:
Press and hold to draw the bow, gradually increasing the range and damage of your next attack. While preparing to attack, you will be slowed by 20%. 
 Release: Shoot an arrow, dealing 80-120 physical damage  (80 + 110%AD + 165%AP). 
 Damage is reduced by 15% for each enemy hit (minimum 33%).

Varus.name: quiver of death
Varus.description:
Passive Effect: Normal attacks deal 15 additional magic damage  (15 + 35%AP) and apply stacks of  "Death Curse"  for 6 seconds (up to 3 stacks).  "Curse of Blight"  If your other skill hits an enemy, the curse will be activated and inflict  magic damage  equal to 3% (3% + 0.012%AP) of the target's maximum health. If you activate  "Curse of Blight"  on an enemy champion or epic monster, the cooldown of the normal skill will be removed for  for 1 second  for each stack. 
 Activation effect: Varus' next  Kenkon blow  deals  additional magic damage  equal to 6%-9% (+AP) of the target's reduced health. Damage increases from 0% to 50% depending on the charging time. 
 When a monster's  "Curse of Blight"  is activated, it deals up to  120 damage for each stack.

Varus.name: rain of arrows of destruction
Varus.description:
Shoots multiple arrows at the specified location, dealing  70 physical damage   (70 + 90% increase)  to enemy units within the area, and causing hatred to the soil for 4 seconds. Enemies who step on hated soil are given a  25% slow  and  40% severe injury . 
  Serious injuries  reduce the received recovery effect and automatic recovery effect.

Varus.name: chain of defilement

 "Vine of Filth" spreads to surrounding enemy champions, and applies the same  snare effect  when touched. The immobilized unit will receive 3 stacks of " Curse of Blight " for  for  for 3 seconds .

Viego.name: king's rule
Viego.description:
The soul of a champion defeated within 3 seconds of Viego dealing damage turns into a ghost and stays there for  for 8 seconds .  You can chant  for 1 second, and  you can possess a ghost for 10 seconds . While possessed: 
 - Cannot be targeted 
 - Can use "Heartbreaker" once  at no cost  
 - Increases movement speed when moving towards enemy champions increases  by 10%  
 - Can use the possessed champion's normal skills, normal attacks, and items 
 -  7% of the target's maximum health  (7 + 4% increased attack power  + 2% increased magic power  + 5% per 100% increased health ) Recovery 
 The activation effect of the possessed champion's enchantment item cannot be used.

Viego.name: sword of destruction
Viego.description:
Passive effect: Deals  additional physical damage  equal to 3% of the current health  of the target  hit by the normal attack. After damaging an enemy with a skill, the first normal attack against that enemy within 5 seconds  will be  2 consecutive attacks , and  physical damage  of 10 (15%AD + 15%AP) give. Also, recovers   by 135%  of the damage dealt. Passive bonuses are maintained while possessed. 
 Activation effect: Pierce the front, dealing 70 physical damage  (20 + 80%AD) x (1 + 0% current critical rate ). 
 Normal attack deals  additional damage  over  10 . 
 The casting time of this skill is reduced according to attack speed.

Viego.name: ghost's whisper
Viego.description:
Charge: Collect "black mist" and charge it for up to 3 seconds. While charging,  will be slowed down by 10% . 
 Activation: Dash forward and send out the collected "black mist" balls, dealing  80 + 90% AP  magic damage to the first enemy hit, and stuns  0.4-1.25 seconds  depending on charge time.

Viego.name: Wandering agony
Viego.description:
Send out a ghost and cause "black mist" to pass over the first terrain it hits for 8 seconds. 
 While you are in the "black mist", you enter the  camouflage  state, and your movement speed increases by  25%   (+0.04% magic)  and your attack speed increases by  45% .

Viego.name: heart breaker
Viego.description:
Teleports to a specified nearby location and deals  physical damage  equal to 110-165% (1 + 0% current critical rate) x 110%AD to all champions within range. 
 The enemy champion with the lowest percentage of health  The target's reduced health (14 + Deals  additional damage  equal to (6% increase)% ,  applies a  slow effect  of 99%  for 0.25 seconds, and knocks back   enemies around it. 
 "Heartbreaker" gives  normal attack effect  to the main target, and  skill effect  to other targets.

MonkeyKing.name: rock skin
MonkeyKing.description: Gain a stack of Rock Skin each time you damage an enemy champion (up to 3 times). Each stack increases  physical defense  by 10, and recovers 0.35% of maximum health (regeneration) every second.

MonkeyKing.name: golden nyoibō
MonkeyKing.description:
Passive effect: 
 Every 10.5 seconds, the normal attack blow of " Golden Rui Stick " is further strengthened   and deals 50% additional damage. After using a skill, the range of your next normal attack increases. 
 Kills or assists from champions reduce the cooldown of this skill's passive by 2 seconds, and killings refresh the cooldown. 
 
 Activation effect: 
 The next normal attack is  enhanced  and deals  83 additional physical damage (60 + 35%AD) . 
 Wukong and his clone's normal attacks reduce the cooldown of " Golden Ruyi Stick " by 0.5 seconds.

MonkeyKing.name: Warrior's Illusion
MonkeyKing.description:
Become  invisible  for 1 second and dash forward, leaving your clone in its original location. 
 The clone moves in the direction of the left joystick when using the skill. The clone automatically attacks surrounding enemies, imitating Wukong's  "Golden Ruyi Stick"  and  "Whirlwind Attack" . The clone deals 20% of Wukong's  damage . 
 The damage received by the clone increases by  by 50% , and even if you imitate the "Golden Nyoi Stick", you will not receive the  strengthening effect of its automatic effect .

MonkeyKing.name: Ranzo Monkey Technique
MonkeyKing.description:
While moving toward the target, send a clone to 2 additional nearby enemies, dealing 70 physical damage to each. Deals 
 damage (70 + 80%AD). 
 After attacking the target enemy,  increases your attack speed by 25% ,  for 4 seconds .

MonkeyKing.name: Whirlwind monkey dance

Extends the Nyoi stick and rotates, increasing movement speed by 20%  and inflicting  physical damage  equal to  10%  of the enemy's maximum health for  for 2 seconds. Knocks up the target only the first time when it hits the enemy. 
 Can be reactivated within 8 seconds.

Vayne.name: night hunter
Vayne.description:
Movement speed increases by 10 when moving towards enemy champions. 
 Final Hour : Movement speed increases by 70 instead.

Vayne.name: Tumble
Vayne.description:
Dash forward and the next normal attack will be strengthened and will additionally deal 19 physical damage (35%AD). 
 Final Hour: Becomes invisible for 1 second when activated. 
 You cannot go over walls using "Tumble."

Vayne.name: silver bolt
Vayne.description:
Passive effect: If you hit the same target three times in a row with a normal attack or skill, deal additional true damage equal to 2% of the target's maximum health.

Vayne.name: Banishment
Vayne.description: Fires an arrow at the enemy, dealing 50 physical damage  (60 + 55% increased AD) and knocking the target back. If the knocked back enemy hits a wall, it will additionally deal  105 physical damage  (105 + 75% increased AD) and be stunned for 1.5 seconds.

Vayne.name: final hour
Vayne.description:
Gains 15 attack power  for 8 seconds and strengthens "Night Hunter" and "Tumble". 
 If the enemy champion you damage is defeated within 3 seconds, the duration of "Final Hour" is extended by 4 seconds (up to an additional 8 seconds).

Vex.name: Fukou and Yuutsu
Vex.description:
22  (decreases with skill level) You will be plagued by Fuukou every second, and your next normal attack will block your dash and inflict  Fear  effect on the enemy for  0.75 seconds .

 Consumes the energy of the enemy hit.

Send shadow to  specified point .  Upon arrival at the specified point ,  deals 50 magic damage  (50 + 40%AP),  gives ,  30% slow effect  for 2 seconds.

 Enemies affected by this skill's  Fear  effect move away from the center of the skill's area of ​​effect, rather than from the Vex's position. The size of the area of ​​effect increases depending on the distance from the vex at the time of activation.

Vex.name: shadow master
Vex.description:
Shadow gets excited and charges forward, dealing  75 magic damage  (75 +  20% AP ) to the first enemy champion it hits, and marking  for  4 seconds.

If a marked  champion is defeated within 6 seconds  after being damaged by this skill, this skill's  cooldown  will be  temporarily reset .

 Normal attack refreshes the effect time of  Decomposition .

Velkoz.name: electromagnetic explosive bullet
Velkoz.description:
Fires a plasma bullet, dealing 80 magic damage  (80 + 75%AP) and 70% slowing effect . This slow effect takes  1 second  to return to normal. 
 When the maximum range is reached or the target is hit, the plasma bullet splits 90 degrees. Reactivating this skill instantly splits the plasma bullet. 
 Killing an enemy with this skill will restore  20 mana .

Velkoz.name: Rift of the Void
Velkoz.description:
Opens a rift into the void and deals 30 magic damage (30 + 20%AP)  to enemies above it. After that, the rift explodes after a short while, dealing  45 magic damage (45 + 25% AP) . 
 Charge:  Gain 1 charge every 16 seconds  and can hold up to a maximum of  2 charges .

Explodes the specified point, deals 70 of  magic damage  (70 + 30%AP), and knocks up  for 0.75 seconds.

 Analyzed enemies receive  same amount of confirmed damage  instead.

Aatrox.name: posture of death

For 24 seconds, the next normal attack will be strengthened, dealing  additional physical damage  equal to 4% (maximum HP)  of the target's maximum health, and recovering  the same amount of health . Hitting a champion or large monster with a basic attack or skill reduces the cooldown of this skill by 3 seconds. 
 Up to 50 damage against monsters. 
 If the target is a minion, the amount of recovery will be reduced to 60%.

Aatrox.name: darkin blade
Aatrox.description:
Swings a huge sword and deals 57 physical damage  (10 + 75% attack power ). This skill can be activated two additional times, and the damage dealt increases by 25% each time it is activated. 
 If you hit an enemy with the tip of your sword (sweet spot),  knocks you up for 0.25 seconds  and deals  60%  additional damage.

 Deals  70%  damage to monsters.

Aatrox.name: chains of hell

 Deals double damage to minions.

Aatrox.name: Shoot down the shadow

  does not apply the effect continuously to the same target for  5 seconds.

Ekko.description:

The fused area remains active for 5 seconds, and Aurora gains the  Area Jumper status , allowing her to move from one end of the area to another.

 If the enemy in the center falls below  5% health (5 + 2.1% reduced health of stardust stacks) , immediately deal the final blow.

If you defeat an enemy within the range of the black hole, you will receive 5 stacks of Stardust for each champion or epic monster, 3 stacks for each bombardment minion and large monster, and 1 stacks of Stardust for each minion or small monster.

 Collapsing Sky: Rains the fury of the universe on the ground, dealing  188 magic damage (188 + 82%AP)  in a wide area, and knocking up   for 1 second on the target hit. At the same time, a huge shockwave is generated, dealing  150 magic damage (150 + 65% AP)  to enemy champions and epic monsters, and slowing all hit enemies by  50%  for 1 second.

Khazix.name: invisible threat

The next basic attack against an enemy champion is  enhanced , deals an additional 23 magic damage  (23+50% increased AP ), and reduces movement speed by  by 25%  for 2 seconds. 
 When Karjix disappears from the enemy's sight,  "Invisible Threat"  is refreshed.

Khazix.name: Predatory instinct
Khazix.description:
Automatic effect: Each time the skill level of "Predatory Instinct" increases, you can evolve one skill. 
 
 Activation effect: For 1.25 seconds, becomes  invisible  and increases movement speed by  40% .  You can use "Predatory Instinct" again within 10 seconds . 
 
 Evolutionary Adaptation State:  The effect duration of invisible state  is increased to  for 2 seconds ,  for 14 seconds , and "Predatory Instinct" can be activated up to  three times  in succession.

KSante.name: indomitable instinct
KSante.description:
Damage skills mark enemies with the "Indomitable Instinct" mark. When performing a normal attack on a target with a mark, it deals physical damage  (1%-2%AD)  equal to  plus 1%  of the target's maximum health and consumes the mark. 
 All Out: Normal attacks, active skills, and unique skills deal additional physical damage equal to  1% of the target's maximum physical strength (1% + 0.01% increased physical defense + 0.01% increased HP) . 
 Health percentage damage against minions is set to a minimum damage of  15-85 (AD) . 
 The maximum damage of  25-95 (AD)  is set for physical strength percentage damage against monsters.

KSante.name: Entofo of Destruction
KSante.description:
Slams the enemy with  80  of  physical damage  ( 80 + 35% increased physical defense ), and  gives ,  80% slow effect  for 0.5 seconds. 

 Entofo of Destruction: If you hit the target, you will receive  and  stacks of "Entofo of Destruction" for 6 seconds  . 
 When 2 stacks are reached, a  shock wave  is released instead, stunning the target  for 0.75 seconds  and pulling it towards them. 

 All Out: The cooldown of this skill is reduced by 30% . 
 Cooldown reduced according to bonus physical defense and bonus magic defense: 0/120

KSante.name: Progress that opens up
KSante.description:
Raise your weapon and charge for 0.3-0.75 seconds. 
 During this time, you become unstoppable and reduce the damage you receive by  by 30% . 
 
 Dash forward when reactivated or after charging: 
 -  Deals physical damage  of 50 plus 8% of the target's maximum health  (8% +  0.02% increase in maximum HP  +  0.02% increase AD ) . 
- Knocks back the target. 
-  Stuns  for 0.5-1.65 seconds (increases according to charge time). 

 All Out: 
- The cooldown of this skill is removed. 
-  Deals additional guaranteed damage of 10%-80%  (depending on charge time). 
- Damage reduction rate increases to 75% and dash speed increases. 
- No longer knocks back or stuns. 

 The maximum damage dealt to monsters is 180.

rows.label: モンスターに対する最大ダメージ

KSante.name: Cinnabar footsteps
KSante.description:
Dash and gain a shield  (75 + 15% increased health)  with durability 75 for 2 seconds. 
 When dashing towards a friendly champion: 
- Dash distance is greatly increased. 
- Allies receive a shield with the same durability. 
 All Out: 
- Cooldown of this skill is reduced by 50%. 
- Increases dash speed.

KSante.name: all out
KSante.description:
Shatters Entofa, knocking back enemy champions, dealing 80 physical damage , then dashing behind him and becoming All Out for 15 seconds. 
 Destruction Strike: 
 If the enemy hits a wall, it will be knocked back over the wall. Furthermore, attack again to deal 80 physical damage  (80 + 5% increased physical strength ). 
 All Out: 
- Normal skills are upgraded. 
-  Attack speed increases by 40% . 
-  Gain 50% increased physical defense penetration . 
-  Obtain 20% Omnivamp . 
-  Maximum health is reduced by 25% . 
-  Increased physical defense is reduced by 70% . 
-  Increased magic defense is reduced by 70% . 
 While this skill is active, it becomes unstoppable and gives a snare effect to the target.

Kaisa.name: void skin
Kaisa.description:
Symbiotic Weapon: Kai'Sa's skills evolve when you upgrade items to the maximum. 
 Corrosion Marks: Your normal attacks inflict a stack of plasma for 4 seconds and deal 5 additional magic damage  (5+15%AP). The plasma explodes in 5 stacks, dealing additional magic damage equal to 15% (15% +0.025%AP) of the target's missing health. 
 When a nearby ally immobilizes a champion, a stack is added. 
 The plasma explosion deals  up to 400 damage  to monsters.

Kaisa.name: Icacia rain
Kaisa.description:
Fires 6 missiles. The missiles scatter to surrounding enemies, dealing 40 physical damage  (40 + 50% increased AD + 30% AP)  to each enemy. If multiple missiles hit the same champion or monster, the damage dealt will be 25%. 
 Symbiotic Weapon: Fires 12 missiles. 
Minions with health below 35% will take 150% damage. 
 Monster receives  50%  damage instead.

Kaisa.name: Void Seeker
Kaisa.description:
Fires energy and makes the first enemy hit  visible , applies 2 stacks of  plasma  and deals  magic damage  (30 + 110%AD + 60%AP). 
 Adds 3 stacks of symbiotic weapon, and if it hits a champion, the cooldown is reduced by 70% .

Kaisa.name: super charge
Kaisa.description:
Charges for 1 second and increases movement speed by 50%  + 80% . After charging, attack speed increases by 40% for 4 seconds. 
 Symbiotic Weapon: Becomes  Invisible  while charging. 
 The cooldown of "Super Charge" on normal attacks is reduced by 0.5 seconds. 
 Charge time increases and movement speed increases according to attack speed.

Kaisa.name: killer void
Kaisa.description: Dash near an enemy champion with Plasma Stack to receive a  shield  that absorbs 137 damage  (75 + 100% bonus AD + 75%AP) for 2 seconds.

Kassadin.name: void stone
Kassadin.description: When you use a skill near a visible enemy champion, you gain  a  shield  that absorbs ,  50 magic damage  ( 50 + 30% AP ) for 1.5 seconds (9 second cooldown).

Kassadin.name: void sphere
Kassadin.description: Fires a sphere and deals  magic damage  (80 + 80%AP ) to the first enemy hit and  applies a silence effect  for 1 second.

Kassadin.name: nether blade
Kassadin.description:
The range of your next basic attack within 4 seconds is increased by 250, deals an additional 50  magic damage  (50 + 50%AP), and restores 5% of lost mana (15% if the target is a champion). 
 Killing the target with this normal attack reduces the remaining cooldown of this skill by 50%.

Kassadin.name: void pulse
Kassadin.description:
Deals magic damage (60 + 60%AP) to the enemy and applies a slow effect of 30% for 1 second. 
 This skill will be strengthened   when other skills are used  6 times  in the surrounding area, increasing the damage by  40%  and giving a slow effect of  90%  instead.

Kassadin.name: lift walk
Kassadin.description:
Instantly moves to the specified location and deals  magic damage  (80 + 30% magic attack power + 1.5% maximum health) to surrounding enemies. 
 The next time you use this skill within 12 seconds, the damage dealt will be increased by  by 50%  and the mana cost will be increased by  by 200%  (stacks 3 times).

Katarina.name: greedy assassin
Katarina.description:
If an enemy champion is killed within 3 seconds of Katarina dealing damage, the cooldowns of Katarina's remaining skills are reduced by 15 seconds. 
 Katarina picks up the dagger and slashes all nearby enemies, dealing  55 magic damage  ( 55 + 100% increased AP + 34.5% AP ).

Katarina.name: bound knife
Katarina.description:
Throws a dagger, dealing 75 magic damage (75 + 30%AP)  to the target and two nearby enemies. The  dagger then rebounds  and falls behind the first enemy it hit. 
 The time it takes for the dagger to fall to the ground does not change depending on the number of bounces.

Katarina.name: breveration
Katarina.description: Throws a dagger into the air, increasing movement speed by 50% .

Katarina.name: Shunpo
Katarina.description:
Blink to a position near the dagger or unit and deal  magic damage  (20 + 50%AP + 30%AD) to the nearest enemy. 
 Picking up a dagger will greatly reduce the cooldown of "Shunpo".

Katarina.name: death lotus
Katarina.description:
Over 2.6 seconds, quickly throw 20 daggers at the 3 closest enemy champions, dealing 20 magic damage. 
 Storm of Blades deals up to 400 magic damage (400 + 260%AP + 290%AD), and inflicts 60% severe damage  on hit. You can move while throwing the blade. 
 "Serious injury" reduces the recovery effect and automatic recovery effect received.

Camille.name: adaptive defense
Camille.description:
Basic attacks against enemy champions grant you a shield that absorbs 138 physical/magical damage  (20% Max HP ) for 2 seconds. 
 The type of shield is determined by the type of damage dealt by the attacked target.

Camille.name: precision protocol
Camille.description:
The next normal attack is  enhanced  and deals 81  physical damage  (30%AD) and increases movement speed by 25% for 1.5 seconds. 
 After 1.6 seconds have passed since the first attack, the normal attack is automatically strengthened again, and instead deals  40%  of that damage as  confirmed damage . 
 Has no critical rate.

Camille.name: tactical sweep
Camille.description:
Slices in the specified direction and deals  physical damage  equal to [100 + 110% increased AD] ​​ and  3%  of the target's maximum health. 
 Enemies in the outer half of the attack range are given a  80% slow effect  (recovers over 2 seconds) and recovers  health  and   equal to  80%  of the damage dealt to the champion. 
 Deals 95%  damage to monsters.

Camille.name: hook shot
Camille.description:
1st activation: Fires a hookshot that pulls you towards a wall if it hits it. If you miss, there will be a 3 second cooldown. 
 Second activation: Dash from the wall and deal  60 physical damage  ( 60 + 75% increased attack power ) when landing.
