Regardless of the state upon landing, your next basic attack against an enemy champion within 3 seconds increases attack speed by 50%  for 5 seconds. Hitting an enemy champion with your dash will stun them for 0.75 seconds and reduce the cooldown of Hookshot by 5 seconds.

Camille.name: Hextech Ultimatum
Camille.description:
Dash towards the enemy champion and deal  magic damage  of  30 +  15%  of the target's current health , knocking away enemies other than the target and creating an area from which escape is impossible for  for 2 seconds. 
 "Hextech Ultimatum" ends when Camille leaves the area.

Galio.name: Blow of the Colossus
Galio.description: The next normal attack is strengthened, attack speed is increased by 40%, and deals 73 magic damage (15 + 100%AP + 45%MR + 60% increased MR) to surrounding enemies. Hitting an enemy champion or epic monster with a skill reduces the cooldown of this skill by  by 3 seconds . This effect only activates once per use.

Galio.name: whirlwind of war
Galio.description:
Releases two gusts of wind that deal 70 magic damage (70 + 75%AP). When gusts of wind meet, they turn into a tornado. 
 Tornado deals magic damage equal to 3% (3% + 2%AP) of the target's maximum health over 1.5 seconds.

Galio.name: Durand's protection
Galio.description:
Passive: After not taking damage for 12 seconds, gain a shield that prevents 53 magic damage (8% AP) for 3.5 seconds. 
 Defense (hold to charge): While in defense mode for up to 2 seconds depending on charge time, becomes 15%  slow  and magic damage increases by  25%  (+ 4% magic defense  +  1% ) Physical damage is reduced by 12.5%  (+2% physical defense  + 0.5% increase ). 
 Taunt (released): Applies  Taunt  effect to nearby enemy champions, dealing  40  magic damage (+55%  AP ) for  0.5-1.5 seconds  depending on charge time.

Galio.name: iron fist of justice
Galio.description:
If you dash and hit an enemy champion or terrain, you will stop, deal  90  magic damage  (90 + 80% AP) , and  knock up  for 0.75 seconds. 
 Deals  85% damage  to minions and monsters.

Galio.name: The hero arrives
Galio.description:
Gives  the passive effect of  "Durand's Protection"  shield  to all friendly champions around the target for 5 seconds, and specifies that position as the landing location. 
 After 2.5 seconds, land in the area and deal 150  magic damage  (150 + 70% AP) to surrounding enemies, and  knock them up  for 0.75 seconds.

Kalista.name: actions of war
Kalista.description:
If you move the left joystick during the pre-attack motion of a normal attack, after throwing the spear, you will dash in that direction for a short 
 distance. 
 When the match begins, you can select one ally and make it " Soul Alliance Comrade ". 
 " Soul Alliance Comrades " cannot be changed. 
 Kalista's normal attack cannot be interrupted once launched. 
 Dash speed and distance increase depending on boot tier.

Kalista.name: Throw of piercing soul
Kalista.description:
Throws a spear, dealing 130  physical damage (70 + 110%AD) to the first target hit. If you defeat the target with this, the spear will continue to penetrate and apply the target's stack of  "Tearing Pursuit"  to the next enemy it hits. 
 After activating this skill, you can dash using  "Battle Posture" .

Kalista.name: spirit of obsession
Kalista.description:
Passive effect: If the distance between you and  "Comrade of the Covenant"  is less than 800, and both of you attack the same target with the normal attack  "Throw of Vengeance"  within 4 seconds, Kalista will deal  additional magic damage  equal to 16% of the target's maximum health. This effect has an 8 second cooldown per target. 
 Activation effect:  "Spirit"  is sent out to scout a certain area. When you spot an enemy champion,  "Spirit"  will follow you for 4 seconds and  will become visible  for 4 seconds.  "Spirit"  will disappear after three scouts. 
 Charge: Gain 1 charge every 45 seconds and can hold up to 2 charges. 
 This skill's passive effect deals at least 75 damage to minions, and if the minion's health  is less than 125, it will deliver a finishing blow.

Kalista.name: tearing grudge
Kalista.description:
Passive Effect: On normal attacks, the spear remains on the target for 4 seconds and applies a stack of Rending Grudge. 
 Activation effect: Explodes the spears of surrounding enemies, dealing  68 physical damage  (30 +  70%AD ) +  32 physical damage  (12 +  36% AD ) for each spear from the second onwards. Gives a 15% slow effect  to the enemy hit for  for 2 seconds. 
 Killing one or more targets with this skill removes the cooldown of this skill and restores 12 mana . 
 Deals 50% damage to epic monsters.

Kalista.name: call of destiny
Kalista.description:
For up to 4 seconds, " Soul Alliance " is put into a unique standstill state and drawn to you. 
 " Alliance of Souls " launches itself in any direction, and when it first hits an enemy champion, it knocks up   for 1 second. After that, " Alliance of Souls " will bounce a distance according to the maximum range.

rows.label: ノックアップ効果時間

Karma.name: mantra
Karma.description: Obtain a stack of " Mantra " each time you use a skill. When it reaches 3 stacks, it becomes " Mantra state " and the next normal skill is strengthened  .

Karma.name: heart inflammation
Karma.description:
Fires an energy wave that deals  60 magic damage (60 + 40% AP)  to the first target and surrounding enemies, and  inflicts a 35% slow effect  for 1.5 seconds. 
 Mantra: The destructive power of the energy wave increases, dealing  65 magic damage (65 + 50% AP)  to the first target hit and surrounding enemies. The energy wave generates a  force field  for 1.5 seconds ,  that slows the enemy by 42.5% , and then explodes, dealing  40 magic damage (40 + 50% AP) .

Karma.name: Soul bondage
Karma.description:
Chains together up to 2 nearby enemy champions, dealing 35 magic damage  (35 + 40%AP) and becoming visible for 1.75 seconds. If the target does not break the chain, deal 40 magic damage  (40 + 45%AP) and apply a snare effect for 1.5 seconds. 
 Mantra: A new chain will appear between the chained target and another enemy. If only one target is chained, a new chain extends to additional nearby enemy champions. If the target does not break the chain, deal 40 magic damage  (40 + 45%AP) and increase the snare effect for 1.5 seconds.

Karma.name: excitation
Karma.description:
Grants  a 60 durability shield (60 + 65% AP)  to allied champions for 3 seconds and increases  movement speed  by  by 30%  for 1.5 seconds. 
 Increase your mantra concentration to strengthen  and  power, and obtain   of  Durability 120 shield (120 + 65% AP) . This shield gradually decreases over 4 seconds.  Movement speed  also increases  by 60% , and returns to normal after 20% of the same effect time.  An additional ring  will appear around the shielded target, and the first friendly champion that enters the ring  will also receive the same shield and bonus movement speed .

Karma.name: supreme embrace
Karma.description:
Instantly go into a mantra state. 
 Generates a ring of spiritual energy at the specified location. After 1 second, the ring explodes , dealing 170 magic damage   (170 + 80% AP)   to all enemies within the range , and inflicting a 35% slow effect  for 1.5 seconds . Enemies outside the area of ​​effect will be thrown towards the center.

Kindred.name: Mark of Kindred
Kindred.description:
Mark the target with the mark of hunting with "Seal of Kindred". Deals 30% additional damage  to small monsters with markings, Red Brambleback, and Blue Sentinel. 
 There are multiple ways to mark an object. 
1. Automatic update: Every 25 seconds, the stamp on the monster expires and a new stamp is automatically added. The engravings on monsters are displayed on the minimap. 
2. Activation effect: Tap the engrave button above the spell to engrave an enemy champion, making the target visible for a short period of time. 
 When you get a kill or assist from a hunted target with a mark, you will receive a stack of "Mark of Kindred" and become stronger. 
 The first 3 stacks   obtained will increase  range by 75 , and after that, every 3 stacks   will increase  range by 25 . 
 Also, "Mark of Kindred" strengthens skills and gives the following effects. 
 "Rondo of Arrows": Attack speed increases by 0%  (5% of the number of stacks of "Mark of Kindred") . 
 "Wolf's Fury":  Deals additional damage equal to 0%  (1% of the number of stacks of "Mark of Kindred")  of current physical strength . 
 "Creeping Fear":  Deals additional damage equal to 0%  (0.5% of the number of stacks of "Mark of Kindred")  of reduced physical strength .

Kindred.name: Rondo of arrows
Kindred.description:
Roll towards the target and fire arrows at up to 3 enemies, dealing 50 physical damage  (50 + 70% increased AD ) and increasing attack speed by 25%  (25 + 5% of the number of stacks of Mark of Kindred ) for 4 seconds. 
 During the duration of "Lone Wolf's Rage", the cooldown of this skill is reduced to 3.5 seconds.

Kindred.name: wolf's rage
Kindred.description:
Passive effect: Gain stacks of  "Hunter's Vitality"  with movement and basic attacks. When you reach 100 stacks, your next normal attack will restore 25  health . The amount of health recovered increases according to  lost health  and champion level. 
 Activation effect: Asserting dismay,  Wolf  bites the target immediately in front of the lamb. 
 Wolf's bite deals  (25 + 20% increased AD + 20% AP)  +  (1.5 + magic damage equal to 1% of the number of stacks of [Mark of Kindred])  of the target's  current health . 
 The wolf deals  100% damage  to the monster with the mark and other monsters around it, and  applies a 50% slow effect  for 2 seconds. 
 The amount of recovery is maximum when the physical strength is  less than 30% . 
 Deal up to 300 damage to monsters.

Kindred.name: creeping fear
Kindred.description:
Gives enemy a  50% slow effect (50 + 5%AP)  for 1 second. 
 On the third normal attack performed on the same enemy within 4 seconds, the  beast  attacks the target, and the target's  reduced health  becomes  (90 +  80% AD increase )  +  (6 + 0.5 x Deals  physical damage  corresponding to the number of stacks of "Mark of Kindred") . 
The attack of the beast  will cause (90 +  80% AD increase )  +  (12 + 0.72 x number of stacks of "Mark of Kindred")  Deals  additional physical damage . 
 Deals up to 300 damage to monsters. Damage is based on the target's  reduced health .

Kindred.name: sheep probation
Kindred.description:
Lamb blesses the ground, creating a zone where all units within the area cannot be defeated for 3 seconds. If the  health of a unit in the 
 zone falls below 10% , that unit will no longer receive damage as long as it remains in the zone, and will not be able to recover health during that time. 
 When the blessing ends, the  health of units in the zone will recover 150 , and you will recover  50  health. 
 This skill has no effect on buildings.

Gwen.name: cutting
Gwen.description:
Normal attack deals  additional magic damage  equal to 1% (1% + 0.005%AP) of the target's maximum health. 
Recovers  health equal to 70% of the damage dealt by this skill to the champion (up to a maximum of 12(12AP + 7%AP)). 
 Deals up to 2 of  magic damage  (2 + 3% AP) to monsters.

Gwen.name: Chokichoki!
Gwen.description:
Passive: Gain 1 charge for each normal attack that hits (lasts up to 4, 6 seconds). 
 Active effect: Slash twice with the scissors, and slash once more for each charge consumed. Each slash deals  14 magic damage (14 + 7%AP) , and the last slash deals  70 magic damage (70 + 35%AP) . 
 The center of each attack deals  confirmed damage  and applies " Cutting " to the enemy hit. 
 Deals  105%  damage to monsters.

Gwen.name: holy fog
Gwen.description:
Summons "Holy Mist" for 4 seconds. As long as Gwen is inside the fog, she will no longer be targeted by enemies outside the fog. 
 Physical defense and magic defense increase by  (18 + 5%)  while in the fog. 
 When you first try to step out of the fog, the fog will move to your location.

Gwen.name: Skip Slash
Gwen.description:
Dash and strengthen your normal attacks for 4 seconds. 
 The enhanced normal attack's attack speed increases  by 20% , the normal attack effect deals  10  magic damage ( 10 + 18% AP ), and the range increases by  100 . 
 The first time your enhanced basic attack hits an enemy champion or minion, this skill's cooldown is removed by 50% .

Gwen.name: needlework
Gwen.description:
1st activation: Shoots a needle, dealing 35 magic damage (+10%AP) to all enemies hit. Applies  35% slow effect  for 1.5 seconds. This skill can be reactivated up to two additional times. 
 2nd activation: Shoots 3 needles and deals  105 magic damage   (+30% AP) . 
 3rd activation: Shoots 5 needles, dealing a total of  175 magic damage   (+50% AP) .

Gragas.name: happy hour
Gragas.description: Use the skill to recover 62 health  (8.5% health ).

Gragas.name: barrel rolling
Gragas.description:
Roll the barrel to the designated spot. The barrel will explode 3 seconds after being reactivated. Deals  65 magic damage (65 + 70% magic attack power)  to enemies hit by the explosion and  reduces movement speed by 30%  for 2 seconds. 
 For the first 1.5 seconds,  damage and slow effect increase by up to 150% . 
 Taru maintains his peripheral vision while fermenting and deals 90% damage  to minions.

Gragas.name: Be careful not to drink too much
Gragas.description:
Reduces damage taken by 11% + 0.04% Physical Defense (AR) for 2.5 seconds. 
 Normal attacks performed within 5 seconds of drinking alcohol are strengthened   and deal  (65 + 90% AP)  magic damage to surrounding enemies and  additional magic damage equal to 7%  of the target's maximum health.

Gragas.name: body slam
Gragas.description:
Charges forward and deals  magic damage (70 + 70%AP) to the first enemy it hits and those around it, and the enemies it hits are bounced  backwards  and are stunned for 1 second . 
 When hitting an enemy, the cooldown of "Body Slam" is reduced by  by 3 seconds . 
 The cooldown of this skill can only be reduced to  1.3 seconds .

Gragas.name: It's my luxury!
Gragas.description:
Throwing a barrel containing strong liquor. When the barrel hits the ground, it explodes, dealing 200 magic damage  (200 + 70%AP) to the enemy, and knocking them outward from the center of the explosion. 
 The distance does not change depending on the time it takes for the barrel to land.

Graves.name: new destiny
Graves.description:
Shotguns have unique characteristics: 
 Double Barrel: If you run out of bullets, you must reload. Attack speed greatly reduces the time between normal attacks, but only slightly reduces reload time. 
 12 Gauge: Normal attack fires 4 bullets. The second and subsequent bullets inflict 72% physical damage (AD)  + 24% critical rate . When a critical hit occurs, 6 bullets are fired, and the damage per bullet increases by  by 30% . Deals only 75% damage  to buildings. 
 Scatter: Bullets do not penetrate enemy units. If multiple bullets hit a target other than the champion, they will be knocked back a little.

Graves.name: end line
Graves.description:
Fires a bullet filled with explosives that deals 70 physical damage (70 + 80%AD)  and explodes after 1 second, dealing an additional 80 physical damage (80 + 110%AD) . 
 If the bullet hits terrain, it will explode after 0.25 seconds. Deals 110% damage to monsters.

Graves.name: smoke screen
Graves.description:
Throws a smoke bomb to create a smoke screen for 4 seconds. Enemies inside the smoke screen lose external vision. 
 Upon impact, deals  60 magic damage  ( 60 + 60% AP ) to enemies within range and reduces movement speed by  50%  for 0.5 seconds.

Graves.name: quick draw
Graves.description:
Dash in the specified direction and reload, gaining " Firm Faith " for 4 seconds. Gain  13 physical defense  with " Firm Conviction " ( stacks 6 times ), and the effect is refreshed when dealing damage to non-minions. 
 Get 2 stacks of " Firm Faith " when dashing towards an enemy champion. Reduces the cooldown of "Quick Draw" by 0.5 seconds  for each bullet that hits.

Graves.name: Collateral damage
Graves.description:
Fires an explosive bullet that deals 300 physical damage (300 + 150% increased AD) and knocks you back with the recoil. When the 
 bullet hits an enemy champion or reaches its maximum range, it explodes and deals 200 physical damage (200 + 120% increased AD ) in a fan-shaped area. 
 Enemies who are damaged by the first bullet will not be damaged by the fan-shaped explosion.

Kayle.name: holy ascension
Kayle.description:
As the champion level increases, Cale's powers are unlocked. 
 Champion level 1: Normal attacks increase attack speed by 4%(4%+1%AP) for 5 seconds. This stacks up to 5 times. At maximum stack, movement speed increases by 8%. 
 Champion level 5: Range increases to 525. 
 Champion level 9: At maximum stack, a wave of flame is fired, dealing damage from the automatic effect of " Starflame Blade ". 
 Champion level 13: Range increases to 575. The maximum stack bonus is always activated.

Kayle.name: light of judgment
Kayle.description: Fires a sword of the sky, dealing 70 magic damage (+60%AP + 50%AP). The enemy hit will be slowed by 26% for 2 seconds, and their physical defense and magic defense will be reduced by 20% for 4 seconds.

Kayle.name: heaven's blessing
Kayle.description: Recovers health for you and an ally champion by 65 + 40% and increases movement speed by 25% + 0.08% for 2 seconds.

Kayle.name: Starfire Blade
Kayle.description:
Passive effect: Deals an additional 3 magic damage  (8 + 5% bonus attack power + 15% magic power ) when attacking normally. 
 Active effect: The next normal attack becomes a ranged attack and deals  magic damage  equal to 7%  (7% + 0.02%AP) of the target's  reduced health. 
 When Cale reaches level 9, this skill will affect all enemies around the target. 
 Deals  60%  damage to monsters.

Kayle.name: holy judgment
Kayle.description:
Makes a friendly champion invincible for 2.5 seconds. 
 Swords rain down around the target, dealing  150 magic damage (150 + 85%AP + 60%AD) .

Kayn.name: scarlet-eyed scythe
Kayn.description:
Kain of " Shadow Assassin " and Raast of " Darkin Slayer " fight for control. 
 Dealing damage to ranged champions will charge  Shadow Assassin , and dealing damage to melee champions will charge  Darkin Slayer . When it reaches maximum charge, you can permanently transform at the spawn point. 

Shadow Assassin : If you take no damage from an enemy champion or use Shadow Invasion for 5 seconds, your basic attacks and skills will deal an additional 52% magic damage (AP)  to the enemy champion for 3 seconds. 
 Darkin Slayer : When you deal damage to an enemy champion, you recover health (HP)  equal to 24% of the damage dealt.

Kayn.name: Hieizan
Kayn.description:
Dash and deal 70 physical damage  (70 + 60% increased AD ), then swing the scythe and deal the same damage. 

Instead of Dark Slayer, deals physical damage of 42%(60% increased AD)(+7% of target's maximum health )(+0.06% increased AD). 

 Deals  35 additional physical damage  to minions and monsters.

rows.label: モンスターに対する最大ダメージ

Kayn.name: Blade Strike
Kayn.description:
Raise the scythe and inflict  105 physical damage (105 + 120%AD)  and  90% slow effect  to the enemy hit. This slow effect will return to normal over 1.5 seconds. 
 Shadow Assassin : Allows movement while using this skill, increasing range. 
  Darkin Slayer : Additionally knocks up the enemy hit for 1 second.

Kayn.name: Shadow removal
Kayn.description:
For 5 seconds,  movement speed increases by 35%  and you can move inside terrain. When you first enter the terrain,  health  recovers  100   (+50% increase) . 
 This skill ends early if you are immobilized, are out of terrain for more than 1.2 seconds, or are in combat with an enemy champion. 
 Shadow Assassin:  Movement speed  increases  by 75%  and is immune to slow effects.  Cooldown  is reduced to  7 seconds .

Kayn.name: True Shadow Invasion
Kayn.description:
Enters the enemy champion's body and becomes untargetable for 2.5 seconds. At the end of the invasion, deal  physical damage (200 + 165% increased attack power)  to the target. 
 End reactivation/intrusion early. 
 Shadow Assassin: The range of this skill and the distance that Kain jumps out are increased, and the cooldown of " Shadow Scythe " is removed when it exits the body. 
 Darkin Slayer: Instead,  deals physical damage equal to 15% of the target's maximum health (15% + 0.13% bonus attack power) , and  recovers health equal to 12% (12% + 0.1% bonus attack power)  of the target's maximum health.

Kennen.name: Storm's Mark
Kennen.description:
When the skill hits an enemy, it will apply "Storm Mark"  for 6 seconds . With 3 stacks, stun the enemy  for 1.25 seconds  and obtain  Ki for 25. 
 If the same target is stunned again within 6 seconds, the effect time will be reduced to  0.5 seconds .

Kennen.name: Raiton Shuriken
Kennen.description: Throws a shuriken, dealing  magic damage  (75 + 75% AP ) to the first enemy hit.

Kennen.name: torrent of lightning
Kennen.description:
Passive effect: Every 5th normal attack deals  55 magic damage (55 + 70% increased attack power + 30% AP)  and grants  "Storm Mark" . 
 Activation effect: Gives an electric shock to surrounding enemies with  "Storm Mark" , dealing  70 magic damage (70 + 80% AP) .

Kennen.name: Thunder and lightning
Kennen.description:
Turns into lightning for 2 seconds and cannot make normal attacks, but increases movement speed by 100% and deals 70 (+ 70%AP) magic damage to enemies touched. For the first 0.5 seconds, the increased movement speed will be  times . 
 Attack speed increases by  50%  for  3 seconds when "Shippudenrai" ends. 

When you first damage the enemy with "Shippudenrai", obtain  and 40 at once. Damage dealt to minions is 50% .

Kennen.name: thunder storm
Kennen.description:
Summons a thundercloud around himself, gains 20 physical defense and magic defense , and deals 20 magic damage  (20 + 13% AP) to enemies within range every 0.5 seconds for 3 seconds. 
 If multiple lightning hits the same target, the damage will increase by 10% for each hit from the second time onwards. 

 Up to 3 " Mark of the Storm " can be given to one enemy.

Corki.name: hextech shrapnel
Corki.description:
Hextech Shrapnel: Normal attacks and follow-up attacks deal 16% additional true damage. 

 Custom item: If you hit an enemy champion with the "Mail Missile" 6 times  , a "custom item" will be delivered to Corki. 
 If you pick this up, you will get  4  "Dodeca Missiles". 
 "Special order item" will disappear after 15 seconds  .

Corki.name: flashbang grenade
Corki.description: Fires a bomb, dealing 65 magic damage (65 + 125%  bonus attack power  + 80%  magic power ) and gaining vision within range.

Corki.name: Valkyrie machine line
Corki.description: Fly a short distance and leave a flame in the area you pass for 2.5 seconds. The flames burn enemies within the area, dealing  60 magic damage (60 + 60% increased AP + 60% AD)  per second, up to  150 magic damage .

Corki.name: gatling gun
Corki.description:
Fires the "Gatling Gun", dealing 20 physical damage  (20 + 55% increased attack power ) every second, and dealing a total of 80 physical damage  over 4 seconds. Reduces physical defense and magic defense by up to 10  for 2 seconds. 
 "Gatling Gun" automatically fires at the current target.

Corki.name: continuous missile
Corki.description:
fire a missile. The missile explodes upon hitting the first target, dealing 70 physical damage (70 + 70% increased AD)  to surrounding enemies. 
 Dodeka Missile: Every third missile becomes a "Dodeka Missile", deals  140 physical damage (140 + 140% increased AD) , and increases the effective area and explosion range. 
 Charge: Gain 1 charge every 16 seconds and can hold up to 3 charges. Basic attacks on champions reduce the time between charges by  2 seconds (2 + 200% current critical chance) .

KogMaw.name: Icathia's self-destruction
KogMaw.description: Icathia's Gift: Even after death, you can continue to move for 4 seconds , and your movement speed increases by 10% . This movement speed bonus increases to 50% during the effect duration. Explodes when the effect ends, dealing 140 confirmed damage  (105 + 35 AP) to surrounding enemies.

KogMaw.name: corrosive slime
KogMaw.description: Splashes a caustic slime, dealing 90 magic damage  (90 + 65%AP ) to the first enemy hit, and reduces  physical defense  and  magic defense  by 20%  for 4 seconds.

KogMaw.name: Organic magic gun
KogMaw.description:
For 8 seconds, the range of normal attacks increases by 90 and additionally deals  magic damage (2% + 0.01%AP) equal to 2% of the enemy's maximum health . 
 Damage to minions and monsters is capped at  100 .

KogMaw.name: Void secretion
KogMaw.description: Spit bile, dealing 80 magic damage  (80 + 55%AP) and leaving  mucus in its wake for 3.5 seconds. Enemies inside the slime are slowed by  by 45% .

KogMaw.name: living air gun
KogMaw.description:
Master of Corrosion (passive effect): Attack speed increases by 10%. 
 Acid Shot (Active Effect): 
 Sprays acid in the specified area and makes the area visible for 2 seconds. Then, deals 100 magic damage  (100 + 25%AP + 75%AP) to enemies within range and makes them visible for 2 seconds. 
 Damage increase amount: 
 The damage of this skill increases according to  the target's lost physical strength ,  0%~50%  increases  0%~50%  according to the target's decreased physical strength. 
 Enemies with less than 40% health will receive  200 magic damage  ( 200 + 50%AP + 150%AP ) instead. 
 Second and subsequent attacks within 8 seconds increase mana cost by 40 (maximum 400). 
 The range of this skill increases by 200 units as the rank increases.

Sion.name: death with honor
Sion.description:
Permanently gain 5 bonus health  every time you kill a unit. Increase  by 20  when you kill a large unit or when you get a kill or assist from a champion. 
 When you receive damage that reduces your health to zero, you will be revived and will apply  Fear effect  and  90% slow effect  to surrounding enemies for 1 second. After being revived, you can still move and perform normal attacks, but your physical strength will rapidly decrease.  Revives with 100% health , performs normal attacks at a rate of 1.75 times per second,  gains 100% physical vamp , and normal attacks deal  magic damage  equal to  10% of maximum health . Additional damage to monsters is capped at 75, and buildings receive 50% damage . 
 All of your skills change to " Wave of Death ". This skill increases movement speed by 67% and returns to normal over 2.38 seconds.

Sion.name: ax of destruction
Sion.description:
Charges a powerful attack for up to 1.75 seconds. 
 Reactivation:  Slams the ax and applies a 50% slow effect  to the enemy hit for 0.25 seconds . Deals  (75 + 45%AD + 18% increased physical defense) (100 + 135% increased physical defense)  physical damage depending on the charging time.  If charged for more than 0.75 seconds , the enemy will be knocked up and stun  for 1-2 seconds depending on the charging time . 
 Deals  60%  damage to minions, and deals  120%  damage to monsters.

Sion.name: heart of the soul
Sion.description:
Obtains a shield with durability  138 (75 + 40% max HP)  for 6 seconds. 
 If the shield remains after 2 seconds, activate it again to explode the shield and deal  60 (+40% AP) (+10% of target's maximum health)  damage to all surrounding enemies. 
 Additional damage against monsters is capped at 400. The shield will automatically explode after 6 seconds.

Sion.name: roar of murderous intent
Sion.description:
Releases a shock wave that deals  magic damage  of 75(+55%AP) and deals 2.5 to the enemy it hits. Gives a  slow  effect of  50%  for  seconds, and reduces physical defense by 20%  for  for 4 seconds. If it hits a non-champion, it will cause  knockback . 
 Enemies hit by the knocked back unit also receive the same damage and effects.

Sion.name: Rushing forward
Sion.description:
Becomes unable to stop  and rushes in the specified direction. While charging, you can change the direction of movement by inputting movement. 
 Stops when hitting an enemy champion, structure, terrain, or recasting the skill. 
 When stopped, slams the ground as hard as it will crack, and depending on the time you charge at the enemy,  150 (150 + 40% increase AD)  to  400 (400 + 80% increase AD)  inflicts  physical damage , stuns  for  for 0.5-1.5 seconds and  knocks up  depending on the charging time.

Zyra.name: thorn paradise
Zyra.description:
When " Root of Capture " hits an enemy champion for the first time, " Thornweed " with health  30 (30 + 22%)   AP  grows. If you do not hit the enemy champion, " Thornweed " will grow at the end of " Root of Capture ". 
 The grown " Spiny Blossom " automatically attacks the target for  6 seconds  and deals  10 magic damage (10 + 15%)   AP . 
 For each enemy champion, large monster, or epic monster hit by " Thorns of Death " or " Cradle of Thorns ", one additional " Thorn Blossom " grows by  . 

 " Spiny grass " deals  23 additional damage  to monsters  AP . 
The damage dealt by the second and subsequent  " Spiny Blossom " to the same target will be 50% . 
 The damage dealt by the enemy champion's skills to " Thorn Blossom " will be  35% . 
 The damage that monsters other than epic monsters inflict on " Spiny Blossom " will be  35% .

Zyra.name: Death Flower Thorn
Zyra.description: The vines spread and thorns pop out, dealing  60 magic damage  ( 60% AP ), and one "thornweed" grows.

Zyra.name: crazy bloom
Zyra.description: The surrounding potted plants become excited, the effect time is reset, and you gain  35% increased physical strength  and  50% attack speed .

Zyra.name: root of capture
Zyra.description: Releases binding vines forward, applies a snare effect for 1 second to the enemy hit, and deals 60 magic damage  (60 + 40% AP ). When this skill first hits an enemy champion or ends,  "Thorn Blowing Grass"  grows (large monsters and epic monsters are considered champions).

Zyra.name: cradle of flame
Zyra.description:
Awakens the anger of nature and causes thorns to grow, dealing 150 magic damage  (150 + 50%AP) to the specified location. After 2 seconds, the vines will jump up and knock up the enemy hit for 1 second. 
 For each enemy champion, large monster, or epic monster hit, an additional  Elite Grass  will be generated.

Samira.name: daredevil impulse
Samira.description:
Increase your combo by damaging enemy champions consecutively with attacks or skills that are different from the previous one. Each time you deal damage in a row, the style increases from "E" grade to  "S" grade (6 types in total) . Movement speed increases by 4% as the grade increases. 
 Normal attacks and skills within melee range deal an additional 9 magic damage  (6 + 3.5% AP ). This damage increases to 17 magic damage  (12 + 7% AP) based on the target's missing health. 
 If you hit an enemy with a normal attack that has been affected by the immobilization effect , they will dash to within the range of the normal attack. If the enemy is  knocked up , it will remain in the knocked up state  for at least  0.5 seconds.

Samira.name: flare
Samira.description:
Shoot and deal  physical damage (15 + 100%AD) to the first enemy hit. 
 If used against an enemy within melee attack range, it will instead slash a fan-shaped area, dealing the same damage to all enemies within the area. 
 Both attacks have a  critical hit  and deal  25%  additional damage. 
 If used during " Wild Rush ", it will attack all enemies in the path when completed.

Samira.name: blade wall
Samira.description: Slashes surrounding enemies for 0.75 seconds, dealing 20 physical damage  (20 + 80% increase ) twice, and destroying enemy flying objects that come within range.

Samira.name: wild rush
Samira.description:
Dash past enemies (including buildings) and slash enemies you touch, dealing 45 magic damage  (+20% additional attack power) and increasing  attack speed  by 35%  for 3 seconds. 
 Obtaining a kill or assist resets the cooldown of "Wild Rush". 
 Tap this skill while dashing to use “Flare”

Samira.name: inferno trigger
Samira.description:
This skill cannot be used unless the current skill grade is S. 
 Fires a gun, reduces own movement speed by 30%, and performs 10 fierce attacks on up to 5 nearby enemies over 2.23 seconds, dealing  physical damage  (5 + 60% AD ) to each enemy. Each attack has  critical judgment . 
 Deals 25% damage to minions.

Xayah.name: clean cut
Xayah.description:
After using the skill, the next three normal attacks will damage all enemies in orbit and drop  feathers  that can be recalled. Up to 5  feathers  remain in the map. 
 "Leap of Love" - ​​ Xayah  and  Rakan  can participate in each other's recall. In that case, both players can start first or return to their spawn point at the end of the call.

Xayah.name: double dagger
Xayah.description: Throws two feather blades, each deals 50 physical damage  (50 + 50% increased attack power ), and drops two feathers. Deals 50% damage to enemy units other than the first hit.

Xayah.name: Deadly Bloom
Xayah.description:
For 4 seconds, creates a feather sword blade that increases  attack speed by 45%  and  increases normal attack damage by 20% . 
 If "Deadly Bloom" hits an enemy champion, gain  25% increased movement speed  for 1.5 seconds. 
 If Rakan is nearby, he also gains the effect of this skill.

Xayah.name: blade caller
Xayah.description:
Recalls all dropped "feathers" and deals 60 physical damage (60 + 90% increase)  to the enemy. When three "feathers" hit an enemy, they will be stunned for 1.25 seconds. 
 "Blade Caller" deals 50% damage to minions.

Xayah.name: feather storm
Xayah.description: Fly into the air, become untargetable, throw multiple feather blades that deal 125 physical damage  (125 + 100% increase ), and  drop "feathers" in a line . You can move while in the air.

Jayce.name: hextech capacitor
Jayce.description: When switching between "Mercury Hammer" and "Mercury Cannon", gain an increased movement speed  of 30 for 1.25 seconds.

Jayce.name: sky buster
Jayce.description:
Jumps at the enemy and deals 0 physical damage (70 + 140%AD) and slows surrounding enemies by 35% for 2 seconds. 
 Deals 80% damage to monsters.

Jayce.name: lightning
Jayce.description:
Passive: Regular attacks with Mercury Hammer restore 12 mana. 
 Activation effect: Surround yourself with an electric aura and deal  160 magic damage  ( 160 + 100%  AP) to surrounding enemies over 4 seconds. 
 Deals  70%  damage to monsters.

Jayce.name: thunder blow
Jayce.description:
Knocks back the target and surrounding enemies, and deals  magic damage  equal to 10% of the target's maximum health + (0% bonus attack power) . 
 Deals up to 150 damage to monsters.

rows.label: モンスターに対する最大ダメージ

Jayce.name: mercury cannon
Jayce.description:
"Mercury Hammer" switches to "Mercury Cannon", and his skills change, allowing him to perform ranged normal attacks. 
 The next normal attack from "Mercury Cannon" will be  enhanced  and additionally deals  13 magic damage (+AP)  +  10% increase (+AP) , and reduces the target's physical defense and magic defense by  11%  for 5 seconds.

Shen.name: Inner Qigong
Shen.description:
After completing the skill, obtain a shield with   51  durability ( 51  +  14% increased HP ) for 2.5 seconds after completing the skill. If the skill affects at least  one  champion, the cooldown of " Internal Qigong " is reduced by  4 seconds . 
 When you damage an enemy with a skill, you will gain  Ki  and  10 .

Shen.name: Blade guard summoned
Shen.description:
Summons the Spirit Blade to himself, and his next three normal attacks deal 12 (+2.5% of the target's maximum physical strength magic damage (2.5 + 1.5%AP)) . If the Spirit Blade passes through an enemy champion, the damage bonus increases to 12 (+5% of the target's maximum health magic damage (5 + 2% AP))  and attack speed increases by 50% . 
 Enemy champions touched by the Spirit Blade are slowed by  15%  for 2 seconds when they try to move away from Shen. 
 Deals 150%  damage to monsters. 
 Maximum damage dealt to monsters is 225. 
 Deals  150%  damage to minions.

Shen.name: guardian's book
Shen.description: Sends a spirit blade to the position of an ally champion, creating a field that blocks  and  enemy normal attacks  for 1.75 seconds.

Shen.name: murderous rush
Shen.description:
Dash forward and deal  60 physical damage  ( 60  +  15% increased attack power ) to enemy champions and monsters, and apply 
 taunt effect for 1.5 seconds.

Shen.name: Instant body protector
Shen.description:
Cast for 3 seconds to give one friendly champion a  shield  that prevents 370 damage (170 + 15% increased health ) for 5 seconds. 
 This shield amount increases by 0% - 60% based on the target's missing health. 
 When the chant is complete, you will be teleported to the target ally's location.

Jax.name: assault attack
Jax.description: Basic attacks against champions and minions increase attack speed by 6% (↑) for 3 seconds . (Maximum  5 times  stack)

Jax.name: leave strike
Jax.description: Leap toward the target, and if it is an enemy, deal 0 physical damage  (70 + 100% increased attack power ).

Jax.name: power bash
Jax.description:
The next normal attack or  Leap Strike  is  enhanced  and deals an additional 55 magic damage (55 + 60%AP). 
 Deals  175%  damage to monsters.

Jax.name: counter strike
Jax.description:
For up to 2 seconds, take a defensive stance and avoid all normal attacks, reducing area damage taken from champions by 25% . When this effect period ends, it will  stun  surrounding enemies for 1 second and deal 35 of  magic damage  (35 + 70%AD + 3.5% of the target's maximum health ). This damage increases  by 20%  for each normal attack avoided (up to a maximum of  100% ). 
 Reactivation: Quickly releases the defensive posture and immediately deals damage to the enemy.

Jax.name: weapon grandmaster
Jax.description:
Passive: Deal 75 magic damage (75 + 70% AP) for every 3 consecutive normal attacks within 3 seconds. 
 Active effect: Swings your weapon, dealing 100 magic damage (100 + 100% AP) to surrounding enemies, and increasing physical defense and magic defense based on the number of champions hit. 
 Hitting a champion increases physical defense by 30 (30 + 50%AD) and magic resistance by 18 (18 + 30%AD). 
 If you hit multiple champions, each additional champion you hit increases your physical defense by 15 (15 + 10% bonus attack power) and magic defense by 9 (9 + 6% bonus attack power) for 8 seconds. During this time, your size increases by 10%, and each second normal attack deals additional magic damage. 
 Deals 110% damage to monsters.

Janna.name: tailwind
Janna.description: Automatic effect increases movement speed by 5%. Allied champions nearby also gain this effect.

Janna.name: howling gale
Janna.description:
Summons a powerful tornado that can charge up to  for up to 0.75 seconds. The tornado deals 50 magic damage  (50 + 50%AP ) to the enemy it touches and knocks them up  . The tornado reaches its maximum range in 0.5 seconds . 
 This skill accumulates one charge every  14 seconds , up to a maximum of  2 charges .

Janna.name: zephyr
Janna.description: Movement speed is increased by 10% for 2 seconds. Wind Spirit automatically tracks the closest 3 champions within range, giving allies  increased movement speed  and enemies dealing  50 magic damage  ( + 50% increased AP ).

Janna.name: storm breath
Janna.description:
Creates a wind of protection and grants a shield  with durability  (65 + 45% AP) to yourself and the ally champion with the lowest health, and while the shield lasts, the target's attack power  increases by 10  (10 + 10% AP)  while the shield lasts. Shield lasts for 3 seconds. 
 If there is a tower within range, the tower will also receive a shield.

Janna.name: monsoon
Janna.description: Generates a strong wind of salvation that knocks back nearby enemies and restores 50 (50 + 30% AP)  health to allies within range every second for 3 seconds.

Zilean.name: time in bottle
Zilean.description:
Saves time as experience points at the rate of  experience points 20  every 5 seconds. If you have enough experience points to level up the nearest allied champion, you can tap the minion button to grant this experience point. When you do this, Gillian also gains the same amount of experience points. Experience points can only be given to allies who can level up. 
 If Gillian takes damage or receives an action blocking effect while giving experience points, the giving of experience points will be interrupted.

Zilean.name: time bomb
Zilean.description:
Throw a time bomb at the specified location. The bomb will attach to the first unit it hits, and a small area will appear around it. After 3 seconds , the bomb explodes, dealing 70 magic damage (70 + 75%AP) to the target and surrounding enemies. 
 Bombs prioritize champions and units that have already been bombed. 
 Early explosion: If you attach a  second  bomb to the same target, the first bomb will explode and stun surrounding enemies  for 1.2 seconds . 
 Charge: Can charge up to 2  .

Zilean.name: twisted time flow
Zilean.description:
Speed ​​up the flow of time, apply " Freeding Time " to yourself, and obtain a shield (45 + 45%) with a durability value of 45. Also applies " Frieding Time " to the nearest friendly champion for  for 3 seconds , giving them the same shield. 
 " Frieding Time ": Increases the speed of projectiles by 60% , and increases the movement speed by 25% (25 + 6%) . 
 While " Freeding Time " is active, normal skill haste increases  by 80% .

Zilean.name: mirage of space and time
Zilean.description: Creates a force field that bends time for 2.5 seconds. While inside the force field, enemy champions are slowed by 20% (20 + 5%AP) and flying objects are slowed by 80%.

Zilean.name: chrono shift
Zilean.description:
Gives you or an allied champion an hourglass mark of protection that lasts for 5 seconds. If a champion who has earned the Hourglass Seal receives critical damage during the duration of the effect, he will be teleported back in time, become  untargetable  for 3 seconds, then recover 600 health  (600 + 200% AP ) and revive. 
 If a champion who has earned the Hourglass Seal does not activate the rune's resurrection effect, the cooldown of "Chrono Shift" will be reduced by  by 10% . 

 While being revived, the target becomes  Untargetable  and  Invincible , but cannot take any action.

Jhin.name: The name of this gun is "Whisper"
Jhin.description:
Jin's gun "Whisper" requires reloading every 4  shots , and the firing interval is fixed. (Attack speed is converted to  attack power ). The last bullet becomes  critical  and deals additional  physical damage  ( AD ) equal to 11%  of the target's  reduced health. When "Whisper" causes a  critical hit , Jin gains  15% increased movement speed  for 2 seconds ( 15%  +  0.55% AD  for every 1% increase ). 
 Attack power increases with critical rate and increased attack speed.

Jhin.name: Explosive fruit
Jhin.description: Throw a special grenade at the enemy, dealing 66 physical damage (45 + 35%AD + 60%AP). The grenade bounces towards nearby targets that have not yet been hit. The grenade can hit up to 4 targets, dealing 44% more damage for each target it kills.

Jhin.name: Madness of the Dead
Jhin.description: Fires long-range bullets. The bullet deals 34 physical damage (60 + 40%AD) to the first enemy champion it hits, and also deals 75% damage to minions and monsters it hits before. If  "Footprints of the Goddess"  or an attack by yourself or an ally hits the target champion in the previous 4 seconds,  applies a snare effect for 1.25 seconds , and Jin's movement speed increases to the same amount as when a critical hit occurs.

Jhin.name: goddess's embrace
Jhin.description:
Places  "Footprints of the Goddess"  in an invincible state, and makes surrounding enemies visible when they pass over it.  Gives a 30% slow effect  to the enemy, then  90 magic damage  (20 + 120%AD + 100%AP). 
 When you kill an enemy champion,  "Footprints of the Goddess"  will appear and explode at that location. 
 Deals  65% damage  to units other than champions and champions that were previously damaged by another  "Footprints of the Goddess" .

Jhin.name: Closing -Finale-
Jhin.description:
Can sing a poem and fire 4 special bullets at long range in a fan pattern. The bullet does not penetrate, and inflicts 80% slow  and 90 physical damage  (75 + 25%AD) to the first enemy hit for 0.75 seconds. This physical damage increases by  3%  for every 1%  of the target's  reduced physical strength. The fourth bullet becomes  critical  and deals 200%  damage. 
 Tap the cancel button to cancel chanting

Jinx.name: Super exciting!
Jinx.description:
When a damaged enemy champion, epic monster, or structure is killed or destroyed by your team within 3 seconds, you gain the following: 
-  140% gradual movement speed  
-  12% additional attack speed  
-  Recovers 10% of consumed mana  
 This effect lasts  for 6 seconds . 
 While under the effect of "Super Exciting!", you can exceed the  attack speed limit .

Jinx.name: Switching!
Jinx.description:
Switch weapons. 
 Fishbone: The  range of normal attacks increases  by 80 , and each hit deals  112%  damage to surrounding enemies, but it also consumes mana. 
 Paw Paw Gun: Normal attack increases attack speed for  for 2.5 seconds . This effect stacks up to  3 times , total bonus  35% . 
 The stack of "Paw Paw Gun" will decrease by one over time. If you switch to "Fishbone", the effect will only be applied to the first normal attack.

Jinx.name: Sibilaser!
Jinx.description: Fires an electric shock, dealing 97 physical damage (10 + 160%AD) to the first enemy hit. Adds  30% slow effect  to the target for 2 seconds and makes the target visible.

Jinx.name: Pack'n Chopper!
Jinx.description:
Throw 3 choppers and activate them after a short delay. Chopper explodes on contact with enemy champions, stopping them from dashing and applying a snare effect for 1.45 seconds. The explosion deals 70 magic damage (70 + 100% AP). 
 Chopper lasts for 5 seconds and automatically explodes if the champion does not touch it.

Jinx.name: Super Megadeth Rocket!
Jinx.description:
Fires an extremely large rocket. Damage and speed gradually increase for 1 second after firing. When the rocket hits an enemy champion, it explodes and deals 25-250 physical damage (25 + 15% increase AD)(250 + 150% increased  AD ), and further takes physical damage  equal to 25% of the target's  reduced health, and surrounding enemies receive  damage equal to 80% . 
 The maximum damage dealt to epic monsters is  500 .

Singed.name: slipstream
Singed.description:
Use nearby champions to reduce air resistance and gain ,  20%  bonus movement speed for  2 seconds. 
 Each champion has a  10 second  cooldown.

Singed.name: trail of poison
Singed.description: Active: Spreads poisonous gas wherever you pass, dealing 20 magic damage per second (20 + 30% AP) to enemies you touch.

Singed.name: Strong adhesive
Singed.description:
Throw the adhesive. The adhesive remains on the designated spot for 3 seconds. When falling inside the adhesive, it explodes and deals  50 magic damage  (50 + 25% AP) and  35% slow effect . Enemies within the range will be pinned  and unable to use movement skills. 
 Scooping the target onto the adhesive will also give it a  snare effect .

Singed.name: scooping throw
Singed.description:
Raise your shield and dash toward your target, knocking enemies in your path aside. 
 If you hit the target, throw the enemy backwards and deal  magic damage  equal to (40 + 50% AP) +  5%  of the target's maximum health. 
 
 Throwing the target onto the strong adhesive will give it a snare effect for an additional  1.25 seconds . 

 Damage to non-champions is  Maximum 500 .

Singed.name: madman's potion
Singed.description:
Drink a powerful concoction and gain a buff for 20 seconds, granting the nearest allied champion a 30% potency buff. 
 Additionally, magic power increases by 30. 
- Automatic health recovery and automatic mana recovery increase by 15. 
 Dealing magic damage while the potion is active will inflict  40%  of  "Serious Injury"  for 1 second.

Syndra.name: tremendous magical power
Syndra.description:
Every time you deal skill damage to an enemy champion, collect 1  "Fragment Shard"  and recover 13 (+Mana). Each time you increase the skill level, you will receive 4  "Fragments of Rage" .  Up to 120 "Fragments of Anger" can be collected . 
 Tremendous magical power:  Collecting 40, 60, and 80 "Fragments of Fury"  will strengthen  normal skills . 
 Collecting 100 "Fragments of Fury"  will strengthen  "Torrent of Magical Power" . 
 Overflowing magical power:  If you collect 120 "Fragments of Fury" ,  magical power will increase by 12% .

Syndra.name: dark sphere
Syndra.description:
Creates a "Dark Sphere" and deals  magic damage (70 + 65%AP) to the enemy. 
 "Dark Sphere" lasts for 6 seconds and can be controlled with other skills. 
 Tremendous magical power: Obtain 1   charge of "Dark Sphere" every 7 seconds (maximum 2). 
 This skill can be used while moving.

Syndra.name: dark force
Syndra.description:
Grab the nearest "Dark Sphere" and throw it at the specified location, dealing 60 magic damage (60 + 45%AP + 35%AP) to enemies within the area, and slowing them by 20% for 1.5 seconds. 
 If there is no "Dark Sphere" nearby, create one and throw it at the specified location. The damage of this "Dark Sphere" is reduced to 80% . 
 
 Tremendous Magic Power: This skill additionally deals  12%  true damage  (12 + 2% AP) .

Syndra.name: wave of darkness
Syndra.description:
Releases a fan-shaped wave, knocking back enemies and Dark Sphere, and dealing 70  magic damage (70 + 35%AP) . 
 The knocked back "Dark Sphere" stuns the enemy hit for 1.25 seconds and deals 70  magic damage (70 + 35% AP) . 
 Great magical power : The angle of the wave increases by 50% and the range expands to 720. 
 This skill can only damage and knock back the same enemy once per activation.

Syndra.name: torrent of magic
Syndra.description:
In addition to  3  "Dark Spheres" circling around you, send up to 4  nearby "Dark Spheres"  at enemy champions. Each "Dark Sphere" deals 60 magic damage (60 + 15% AP). 
 Tremendous magical power:  Range increases by 100. This skill will now deal the final blow to enemies with  less than 10% health . 
 When you defeat an enemy champion with this skill, a "Dark Sphere" explodes at that location, dealing 50 magic damage (60 + 15% AP) to surrounding enemy champions.

Swain.name: Terror Raven
Swain.description:
Obtain  Soul Fragment  when " Eye of the Empire " hits an enemy champion, when " Binding Claws " pulls an enemy champion, or when a nearby enemy champion is killed. 
 Soul Fragment : Recovers 3% of physical strength (3%AP + 0.5%AP) and increases maximum physical strength by 16 with each stack.

Swain.name: hand of death
Swain.description:
Extends the demon's arm and fires a bolt of unearthly power at the enemy, dealing 55 magic damage (55 + 32%AP)  to enemies within range. 
 Each subsequent lightning bolt that hits deals  10 magic damage (10 + 12%AP)  (maximum 95 damage).

Swain.name: eye of empire
Swain.description:
Summons the Devil's Eye. The eye explodes after a short while, dealing 80 magic damage (80 + 55% AP). 
 Gives a slow effect of  30%  for 2.5 seconds and makes the hit target visible for 4 seconds. If you damage an immobilized champion with Eye of the Empire, it becomes a  critical hit  and deals  50% damage . 

 Receive 1 "Soul Fragment" from the champion you hit.

Swain.name: claws of bondage
Swain.description:
Fires a demonic wave, dealing 35 magic damage (35 + 25%AP)  to enemies it touches. The wave then returns when it reaches its 
 maximum range, dealing  35 magic damage (35 + 25% AP)  within the range, and inflicting  snare effect  for 1.5 seconds 
. 

 Reactivate: Attract champions with the snare effect and obtain 1  "Soul Fragment"  from each.

Swain.name: Coronation of Demon Emperor
Swain.description:
First activation: Releases a demon, deals 10 magic damage  (10 + 15%AP) to surrounding enemies every second, and recovers 20/20%AP of own health. 
 This skill can be reactivated after 2 seconds. While active, the time until it can be activated again will be reset every 6 seconds. 
 Reactivation:  Deals 150 magic damage  ( 150 + 45% AP ) and  60% slow effect . This slow effect will revert over 2 seconds. 
 Recovers  10%  of health from non-champion units. 
 When transforming, the demon's energy gradually decreases, but it can be recharged by damaging or killing enemy champions. Restores to max when you get a kill or assist from a champion.

Smolder.name: fledgling dragon
Smolder.description:
When you hit an enemy champion with a skill or kill an enemy with " Super Burnt Breath ", you will receive a stack of " Fledgling Dragon ". This stack usually improves skills. 
 Enhancement effect of " Fledgling Dragon " 
 -  Super Kogekoge Breath : Deals additional magic damage of  30% AP , and acquires a new effect when reaching 25, 100, and 175 stacks. 
-  Kushun! : Explosion deals additional magic damage of 55%AP. 
-  Pata Pata Pata : Deals 12%AP of additional magic damage on each hit and gains an additional bolt for every 65 stacks. 
 Smolder also gains stacks of  Fledgling Dragon  when nearby friendly champions kill minions with the Spirit's Scythe or Relic Shield.

Smolder.name: Super dark breath
Smolder.description:
Breathes out flames, dealing 45 physical damage  (45 + 110%AD) and 0%AP magic damage. 
 If the target is defeated, recover  15 mana  only once per skill use. 

 Enhancement effect of "Starring Dragon" 
-  25 stacks : Deals damage to all enemies around the target. 
-  100 stacks : Causes  2-layer explosion  (2 + 1.1%AD) on the other side of the target, dealing 50% of the damage of this skill. 
-  175 stacks : Sets the target on fire and deals true damage of maximum health 0% (0.025%AP + 0.005%MR) over 3 seconds. Enemy champions who are on fire will die instantly if they reach less than 6.5%  of their  maximum value. 

 The damage of this skill increases according to  Critical rate  and  Critical damage  (up to 65.25%). 
 Deals 110% damage to minions and monsters.

Smolder.name: Kushyun!
Smolder.description:
Breathe out flames with a sneeze, dealing 65 physical damage  (65 + 60% increased attack power ) and slowing 35%  for 1.5 seconds. 
 Sneeze Blast: 
 - Hitting a champion causes an explosion, dealing  10 physical damage  (10 +  55% increased attack power  +  80% ability power ) and  55% ability power  magic damage. 
- If explosions occur consecutively, each explosion deals 75% damage. 
- Gain 1 stack of " Fledgling Dragon " for each champion hit. 
 Deals  130%  damage to minions and monsters.

Smolder.name: Flapping around
Smolder.description:
Increases your movement speed by 75% and allows you to move through terrain for 1.25 seconds. 
 Boom! :
 While flying, automatically locks onto the enemy with the lowest physical strength within range and performs a 5 ( + 1.54% attack power ) attack. 
 Each time it hits, it deals  32 physical damage  (+  30% attack power  and  12% magic power ) and  magic damage . 
Dragon's field of vision: 
Dragon's field of vision expands while in flight. 
- Give priority to champions and attack.

Smolder.name: Mama! !
Smolder.description:
The mother dragon breathes flames from above, dealing 200 physical damage  (200 + 110%  bonus attack power + 100%  AP) to enemies within range. 
 Instead, inflict  300 physical damage  ( 300  +  165%  increased attack power +  150%  AP) to the enemy in the center, and apply  40% slow effect  for 2 seconds. 
 When Smolder receives this flame, he recovers 100 (100 + 50% bonus attack power + 75%AP). 
 Deals 50% damage to minions and monsters.

Thresh.name: soul bondage
Thresh.description:
Collect the souls of fallen enemies nearby and obtain  Physical Defense 2  and  Magic Power 2  for each soul. 
 Thresh's physical defense does not increase by leveling up.

Thresh.name: death sentence
Thresh.description:
Throws a sickle, stunning the first enemy unit hit and pulling them towards you for 1.5 seconds. The sickle deals 80 magic damage (80 + 50%AP) and grants true vision for the duration of the effect. 
 Reactivate: Dash to the enemy you hit. 
 If you hit an enemy, the cooldown will be reduced by 3 seconds.

Thresh.name: mourning soul lantern
Thresh.description:
Throw a lantern at the specified location. Allies can now dash to Thresh by tapping the minion button near the lantern. 
The Lantern also grants Thresh and the first ally that comes near him a shield with durability of 65 (+2 per soul) for 4 seconds.

Thresh.name: chain of despair
Thresh.description:
Passive effect: Normal attacks deal an additional 0-47 magic damage  (2 + 80% AP per distance). This increases depending on the amount of time you have not used a normal attack. 
 Activation effect: Swings the chain and draws the enemy in or pushes them back  depending on the direction of the swing . Also, inflicts  20% slow effect  for 1 second and  85 magic damage  ( 65 + 40% AP ) to the enemy hit.

Thresh.name: prison of the soul
Thresh.description:
Creates a wall of spiritual prison that slows enemy champions who touch it by 99% for 2 seconds and deals 250 magic damage  (250 + 100% AP). When touched, the wall breaks, the remaining walls do no damage, and the duration of the slow is halved. 
 Multiple walls cannot affect one enemy at the same time.

Zed.name: The weak will fall
Zed.description: Basic attacks on enemies below 50% health deal additional  magic damage  equal to 7%  AP of the target's maximum health (10 second cooldown per enemy).

Zed.name: Fuuma shuriken
Zed.description:
Me and my shadow throw shuriken. The first enemy hit by each shuriken will receive 70 + 110% increased attack power  physical damage, and the second and subsequent enemies will receive 49 physical damage (49 + 77% increased attack power) . 
 Deals  80%  damage to monsters.

Zed.name: shadow clone
Zed.description:
Passive Effect: Zed gains 40 Ki every time his skill hits the same enemy twice. Ki can only be obtained once per skill use. 
 Active effect: Shadow dashes forward and remains in place for  4.5 seconds.  If you reactivate "Shadow Clone" , the positions of Zed and the shadow will be swapped.

Zed.name: shadow gnawing
Zed.description:
You and your shadow perform a spinning slash, dealing  physical damage  (65 + 70%AD) to surrounding enemies, and giving  a 25% slow effect  for 1.5 seconds. 
 If you hit the same enemy multiple times,  deals 50% damage  and  slow effect becomes 50% . 
 Every time your spinning slash hits an enemy champion, the cooldown of " Shadow Clone " is reduced by  by 2 seconds . 
 Deals  60% damage  to monsters.

Zed.name: mark of death
Zed.description:
No longer targeted, Dash towards the specified enemy champion and apply the Mark of Death. 
 This mark will explode after 2.8 seconds, dealing  64 (100% AD)  physical damage, and dealing physical damage equal to  30%  of the total damage dealt to the target while the mark was applied. 
 Casts a shadow for 6 seconds when dashing. If you reactivate "Mark of Death", the positions of you and the shadow will be swapped.

Senna.name: forgiveness of the soul
Senna.description:
Mist Eater (Soul Harvester): 
 Attacks the soul that appears from a dead enemy and absorbs the mist. 
 If you do not attack, souls near Sena will be automatically absorbed when they disappear. 
 
 Mist Eater (Taking the Living): 
 If you absorb fog from an enemy champion you hit twice within 4 seconds, you will deal an additional  physical damage  equal to  1.2%  (current HP) of that champion's current health. 
 (Cooldown  6 seconds per target ) 
 
 Additional effects of fog: 
 - Increases attack power  by  1.25 per stack. 
 -  For every 20 stacks ,  15 range  and  Critical rate  increase by  15% . 
 -  35% 's excess  critical rate  is converted to  Physical Vamp . 

 Relic Artillery: 
- Requires additional time to fire normal attacks. 
- Deals additional  physical damage  of 10 with normal attacks. 
- When using a normal attack, temporarily gain 10%  of the target's  movement speed . 

 Attack power does not increase when leveling up. Critical damage is reduced by 25%.

Senna.name: piercing darkness
Senna.description:
Fires a shadow beam towards the target that penetrates all objects, dealing 50 physical damage (50 + 60% increase AD) and 15%(15% + Gives a slow effect of 0.1% maximum HP ), and allied champions recover  health  by 40 (40 + 40% increased AD + 25% AP ). 
 Performing a normal attack reduces the cooldown of "Piercing Darkness" by 1 second. 
 The range of this skill matches the range of Sena's normal attack, and the casting time is reduced by the attack speed. Apply  normal attack effect  to enemy champion.

Senna.name: last hug
Senna.description: Releases a wave of "black mist" in front of you, dealing 90 physical damage (90 + 70% increased physical defense)  to the first enemy hit. After 1 second, the target and surrounding enemies will receive a snare effect  for 1.3 seconds .

Senna.name: curse of black fog
Senna.description:
For 6 seconds, disappear into the "fog" and become  Honorable . Friendly champions who enter the "fog" become  camouflaged , and when they exit the "fog" they take on the appearance of  Benevolence , their movement speed increases  by 20% , they cannot be targeted, and their true identity is hidden unless there are enemy champions nearby. 
----------
 Camouflage : Hidden from view. Nearby enemy champions or towers, visible through true vision.

Senna.name: dawning shadow
Senna.description: Fires a wave with infinite range, giving friendly champions a shield with durability of  120 (120 + 40% Max HP + 50% AP)  for 3 seconds, giving 4 shields per  "Fog" , and dealing  250 physical damage (250 + 120% increased AD +) to enemy champions in the center of the wave. 50%AP)  and  "Fog" .

Seraphine.name: stage presence
Seraphine.description:
Echo: Every time you use a normal skill 3 times, it will echo  and become available for activation again. 
 Harmony: When you chant the skill, give   " Note " to surrounding allies for 5 seconds. For each " note ", Seraphine's range increases by 30 and additionally deals 4 magic damage  (4+4% AP).

Seraphine.name: high note
Seraphine.description:
Deals 60 magic damage (60 + 45%AP)  to the specified area. Damage increases by 0% - 50%  according to the enemy's reduced health. 
 If the target's health is less than  25% , the damage will be maximum.

Seraphine.name: surround sound
Seraphine.description:
Gives all nearby friendly champions a  shield  that protects them from 50 damage (+30%AP) for 2.5 seconds, and increases their movement speed by 20%  for 2.5 seconds. 
 If Seraphine has acquired  Shield , surrounding allies will recover 5%  (+0.01%AP)   of the  lost health. This healing amount is increased by 50% for each friendly champion.

Seraphine.name: beat drop
Seraphine.description:
Deals 60 magic damage (60 + 40%AP) to the enemy and applies 99% slow effect  for 1 second. 
 If the enemy is already under the slow effect, apply  snare effect  instead. If you are under the snare effect, stun  and .

Seraphine.name: encore
Seraphine.description:
Deals  150 magic damage   (+ 150% AP)  to the enemy, and  applies a 40%  charm effect and slow effect for 1 second. 
 This skill's duration is extended when it touches an ally or enemy champion.

Zeri.name: biological battery
Zeri.description:
Fires 6 bullets in the target direction with a normal attack, dealing 74 physical damage  (13+105%AD) to the first enemy hit. 
 Zeri's attack speed is capped at 1.5 times per second. 50% of the attack speed that exceeds the upper limit is converted to  increased attack power .

Zeri.name: Electro cute!
Zeri.description:
Fires an electric shock at the specified location, dealing 97 magic damage  (35 + 55%AD + 30%AP) to the enemy, and applying a 14% slow  effect. This effect gradually decays over  for 2 seconds . 
 Defeating an enemy champion with this skill removes the cooldown 50% and restores 100% of the mana cost.

Zeri.name: ultra shock laser
Zeri.description:
Fires an electromagnetic pulse that deals 70 physical damage (30 + 80% + 40%AD) to the first enemy hit and applies a 30% slow  effect for 2 seconds. 
 When the pulse hits a wall, it fires a wide, long-range laser from the point of impact. This attack deals damage equal to the pulse to enemies within range and applies  Slow  effect. Against champions and monsters, it becomes  critical .

Zeri.name: spark surge
Zeri.description: Dash a short distance and be electrocute for 6 seconds! Accumulate. The next three normal attacks will be  enhanced  to  penetrate  the enemy, and the first target hit will receive  20% additional magic damage  (20 + 10%AP )  increase  + 20%AD  + 20%AP.

Zeri.name: lightning crash
Zeri.description:
Releases electrical energy and deals  magic damage (150 + 70%AD + 80%AP)  to surrounding enemies. 
 Hitting an enemy champion increases  movement speed by 10%  and  attack speed by 30%  (for 5 seconds). You can exceed the attack speed limit. 
 While the effect is active, your normal attack will be a quick burst of 3 shots, which will chain to surrounding enemies and deal  150 physical damage (25% AD) . 
 When a basic attack or skill hits an enemy champion, Overcharge increases by stacking for 1.5 seconds.  When critical  increases by 2 additional stacks. Each stack increases movement speed by 0.5%.

Zoe.name: Sparkle!
Zoe.description:
After using the skill, the next normal attack deals an additional 9  magic damage  (9-128 + 20% AP). 
 This skill deals instant damage, and deals 50% damage to structures.

Zoe.name: paddle star
Zoe.description:
Shoots a star and deals magical damage to the first enemy hit, depending on the distance, (30 + 60%AP) - 82.5 (75 + 150%AP) + 150%AD + 35% physical defense. 
 Deals  80%  damage to enemies around the target. 
 If you activate it again, you can change the direction of the star.

Zoe.name: spell thief
Zoe.description:
Passive: When an enemy uses a spell or boots enchantment, they drop  spell shards . If you or a nearby ally defeats a specific minion and pick up a  spell shard , you can use that skill only once. 
 Passive Effect: When this skill uses a spell, it gains 25% movement speed for 2 seconds and fires 3 missiles at the target that was previously attacked. Each of these missiles deals  25 magic damage (25 + 15% AP) . 
 Activation effect: Uses the skill of the picked up  spell fragment . 
 Spell shards  remain in place for 20 seconds. 
 Each missile applies  Sparkle .

Zoe.name: sleeve bubble
Zoe.description:
Jump kick and send the "bubble" flying. "Bubble" deals 30 magic damage (30 + 50%AP) , and if nothing hits, it becomes a trap and remains in place. The flying distance of the "bubble" increases when you throw it over a wall. 
 Enemies that touch the "bubble" will fall into a  2-second sleep  after a while. If you are hit by a normal attack or skill, you will wake up, but you will receive additional guaranteed damage of 200% of the damage, up to a maximum of 30(30 + 50%AP). 
 Target becomes drowsy and suffers a gradually increasing slow (up to 15%) before falling into "sleep".

Zoe.name: portal jump
Zoe.description: Teleports to a nearby location for 1 second. It will then teleport back to its original position. During this time, you can use skills and perform normal attacks, but you cannot move.

Soraka.name: footsteps of salvation
Soraka.description: When moving towards a friendly champion whose  health  is below  35% ,  movement speed  increases by  100% .

Soraka.name: whisper of stars
Soraka.description:
Calls a star to deal 60 magic damage  (60 + 40%AP) and apply a 30% slow effect for 2 seconds. Hitting an enemy champion reduces the cooldown of  "Celestial Healing"  by 2 seconds. Also gains  "Regeneration"  and recovers 60 (60 + 45%AP) of physical strength over 2.5 seconds. 
 After healing an ally champion three times,  "Star Whisper"  will be  strengthened , its area of ​​effect will be expanded, and it will deal 140% damage.

Soraka.name: Celestial Spirit Healing
Soraka.description:
Restores the health of allied champions by 50 + 55% AP. 
 Excess recovery amount is converted to  shield up to (50 + 55%AP)  of maximum durability.

Soraka.name: the silence of the stars
Soraka.description:
Creates a zone that deals 70 magic damage  (70 + 40%AP ) and  silence effect . 
 Zone disappears after  1.5 seconds  and  70 magic damage  ( 70 + 40%AP ) and  gives   snare effect  for 1.25 seconds.

Soraka.name: wish upon a star
Soraka.description: Restores 150 + 45%AP health to all allied champions. If the target's physical strength is below 35%, the amount of recovery will increase by 50%.

Diana.name: Sengetsu no Yaiba
Diana.description:
After using the skill, attack speed increases by 30% (▲) for 4 seconds. 
 Every third normal attack deals an additional  35 magic damage  to surrounding enemies. 
 Deals  100%  damage to monsters.

Diana.name: moon shadow
Diana.description: Releases an arc of energy that deals 60 magic damage  (60 + 70%AP) and grants moonlight for 3 seconds.

Diana.name: Oborozuki Hagoromo
Diana.description:
For 5 seconds, 3 moonlight balls revolve around you. When the ball comes into contact with an enemy, it explodes and deals 20 magic damage (20 + 20% AP). 
 Also obtains a shield with durability 50(50 + 40%AP). When the third ball explodes, the durability of this shield increases by 50 + 40% AP.

Diana.name: Moonlit beauty blade
Diana.description:
Dash close to the enemy, deal 40 magic damage (40 + 30%AP), and remove  Moonlight  within a certain range. 
 If you remove  Moonlight  from an enemy, the cooldown of "Moonlight Beauty Blade" will be reduced to  0.5 seconds .

Diana.name: Collapse of the moon
Diana.description:
Summon the moon to illuminate the expanding area. Gives 20% slow effect  to enemies within range. During this time, Diana charges up to 1 second. When charging is complete,  Shine of the Fallen Moon  will be activated. While charging, you can move and use skills and spells. This skill cannot be activated if there are no enemy champions nearby. 
  Shine of the Falling Moon : Strike the enemy with moonlight and mark the enemy with  Moonlight , dealing  (100 + 40%AP) ~ 200 magic damage (200 + 80%AP)  depending on the charge time. Gives a  20% slow effect  to the target for 2 seconds.

Taliyah.name: rock surfing
Taliyah.description: When you are near a wall outside of combat,  movement speed increases by 10%  (◆).

Taliyah.name: thread volley
Taliyah.description:
Throws 5 rocks  in the specified direction . Each rock deals 50 magic damage (50 + 50%AP)  around the first enemy it hits. This creates a ``processed ground'' under your feet. 
 If you hit the same target repeatedly, the damage will be reduced by 60% . 
 
 If you activate Thread Volley on  "On processed ground" : 
 - The cost becomes  10 mana , and  "Worked ground"  is consumed. 
- Cooldown is reduced by 50%. 
 - Throws a large rock, dealing  100 magic damage (100 + 80% AP)  to the first target hit, and slowing the hit enemy by  25%  for  1.5 seconds . 
- Monsters hit by the large rock will be stunned for  3 seconds . 

 Each rock deals 20 additional magic damage to monsters. 
 Each large rock deals 36 additional magic damage to monsters. 
 Taliyah can move and use other skills while throwing boulders.

Taliyah.name: seismic sharp
Taliyah.description: A certain area of ​​the ground rises up, and after a short while, enemies within the area are thrown away in the specified direction  .

Taliyah.name: unravel earth
Taliyah.description:
Scatter unstable stones in a certain area, dealing 65 magic damage  (65 + 55% AP ) to enemies touched, and applying a 20%  slow effect  for 0.5 seconds. 
 When an enemy dashes or is bounced over the scattered stones, the stones explode: 
 -  Deal 30 magic damage  ( 30 + 30% AP ). 
- Stun  for the remaining movement time plus 0.75 seconds . 
 Damage and Stun Limitations: 
- Each enemy can only be damaged by explosions up to 5 times. Explosions that exceed this limit do no damage. 
- Each enemy will only be  stunned  once per skill use. 
 Against monsters, the effect duration of  Stun  is always maximized (1 second). Deals 190% damage to monsters. 
 Damage dealt by stones from the second time onward is reduced by 50%.

Taliyah.name: weaver wall
Taliyah.description:
Creates a huge earth wall for 4 seconds. 
 The wall knocks back nearby enemies as it forms. 
 Once the wall has been formed, you can destroy it faster than the duration by reactivating it. 
 If reactivated immediately: 
- Move along the formed wall. 
- If you move or receive the  incapacitated  effect, you will get off the wall. 
 This skill cannot be used for 3 seconds after receiving damage from a champion or structure.

Talon.name: bloody mercy
Talon.description:
Talon's skill applies stacks of  "Wounds"  to enemy champions and large monsters hit for 6 seconds (up to 3 times). If you damage the same target again, the effect time of  "Wound"  will be reset. 
  If you perform a normal attack on a target with 3 stacks of "Wound" , all the stacks of  "Wound"  will be consumed and the target will enter the  Bleeding  state, dealing 100 physical damage  (100AD +  Gives 210% ) of increased attack power. If the target is a monster, the damage will be 90% of this amount. 
 The target will not be given stacks of  "Wounds"  during this effect period. 
 When a bleeding  enemy champion is defeated, your movement speed increases and gradually returns to normal over 2 seconds.

Talon.name: blade of noxus
Talon.description:
Ranged: Dash toward enemy champions, dealing 75 physical damage (75 + 100% bonus attack power) . 
 When used at close range: Pierce the target, dealing  113 physical damage (113 + 150% bonus attack power) . 
 When you defeat a target with this skill, Talon will  recover 35 health  and reduce the cooldown of this skill by  by 65% ​​. 

 The higher the physical defense penetration, the faster the dash speed and activation speed of this skill will be. 
 Damage when used at close range is amplified to  Critical damage .

Talon.name: Hien Shuriken
Talon.description: Throws a blade in a fan shape in the specified area, dealing 40 + 50% increased physical damage  to the enemy it hits.When the blade reaches its maximum range, it stays in place for 0.75 seconds  before returning. Deals  60 + 100% increased physical damage  to enemies hit on the way back, and  applies a 40% slow effect  for 1 second. Deal 80% damage  to monsters.

Talon.name: assassin's leap
Talon.description:
Jump over the terrain or structure closest to you. 
 Once you jump over the same place, you will not be able to jump over it for  1.35 seconds  (this time will be shortened by skill haste).

Talon.name: shadow assault
Talon.description:
First activation: Releases a ring of blades around you, dealing 90 physical damage  (90 + 110%  increase) to nearby enemies. 
 Also,  becomes   invisible for 2.5 seconds , and  movement speed increases by 40% . 
 How to reactivate:  1 second after the first activation  Tap the skill,  When the invisible state  ends, the skill will automatically reactivate. 
 Reactivation:  Ends the invisible state , calls back the blade, and deals  90 physical damage  ( 90 + 110%  increase) to enemies on the way back. 
 When you exit  Invisibility  while using a normal attack or "Noxus Blade", the blades will instead converge towards the target enemy.

TwistedFate.name: Ikasama Dice
TwistedFate.description:
When you kill a unit, you will receive 1-9 additional gold . 
 Swindled gold: 0

TwistedFate.name: wild card
TwistedFate.description: Throw 3 cards and deal 60 magic damage (+70%AP).

TwistedFate.name: draw
TwistedFate.description:
1st activation: Shuffle the cards. 
 Second activation: Pick a card, and the next normal attack will be enhanced  . 
  Red card  deals  82 magic damage (30 + 60%AP + 100% critical rate)  within a certain area and applies a 35% slow effect for 3 seconds. 
 Blue card  deals 92 magic damage (40 + 75%AP + 100% critical rate)  to the target and recovers 60 of own mana. 
 Gold card  deals 67 magic damage (15 + 50%AP + 100% critical rate)  to the target and stuns the target for 1.25 seconds.

rows.label: レッドカードのダメージ
ブルーカードのダメージ
ゴールドカードのダメージ

TwistedFate.name: stack deck
TwistedFate.description:
Passive effect: Attack speed increases by 15% . Every 4th normal attack deals 50 additional magic damage  (50 + 45% AP ). 
 Activation effect: Attack speed increases by 20%  for 3 seconds. If you attack an enemy champion during this period, roll a cheat die. 
*Gold earned: 0

rows.label: 自動効果による攻撃速度

TwistedFate.name: destiny
TwistedFate.description:
1st activation:  Makes all enemy champions visible for 6 seconds . 
 Second activation:  Chant for 1.5 seconds  and teleport to the specified location.

Teemo.name: Poisonous blowgun
Teemo.description: When a normal attack hits, deals 8 additional magic damage  (8 + 20%AP), then deals an additional 8 magic damage  (8 + 9%AP) every second for 4 seconds.

Teemo.name: blind darts
Teemo.description:
Deals 50 magic damage  (50 + 50%AP ) and applies blinding effect  to the target for  1.25 seconds. 
 The normal attacks of enemies affected by the blind effect will no longer hit the target, will not cause any damage, and will not apply normal attack effects.

Teemo.name: Rushing!
Teemo.description:
Passive: If you have not taken damage from enemy champions or towers for 5 seconds, your movement speed increases by  by 15% . 
 Activation effect: Roll a short distance and dash for 3 seconds. During this effect period, the automatic effect of "Running!" will be doubled  to , and the effect will not be lost due to damage.

Teemo.name: Yordle from the bush
Teemo.description:
After a while, it becomes camouflaged. This effect ends if you move outside the bushes  for more than 3 seconds. 
When camouflage state  ends, attack speed  increases by 30% for 3 seconds. 
Hide from champions outside Teemo's detection range in camouflage . Enemy towers will make nearby  camouflaged units  visible.  Camouflage status  ends quickly when receiving normal attacks and attack skills.

rows.label: 増加攻撃速度効果時間

Teemo.name: poisonous mushroom
Teemo.description:
Set up a mushroom trap. When stepped on by an enemy, the trap explodes, dealing  225 magic damage (225+50%AP)  over 3 seconds, and inflicting a 30% slow  effect for  3 seconds. 
 Trap lasts for 2 minutes.

rows.label: クールダウンリセット

Twitch.name: Amazing poison!
Twitch.description:
Normal attack poisons the enemy, dealing 1 true damage (1 + 2.5%AP) over 5 seconds. This effect stacks up to 5 times. 
 If the enemy champion's "Sugoi Poison Da!" is at its maximum stack, your attack speed increases by 30% for 5 seconds. 
 Monsters receive 130%  more damage from "Sugoi Poison!".

Twitch.name: It's me!
Twitch.description:
Turns into camouflage and increases movement speed by 10% for 8 seconds. Increased by 20% if nearby enemy champions do not have Twitch's vision. 
 Applies an additional stack of  "Sugoi Poison!"  for 3 seconds after the camouflage state is removed. If an enemy champion is defeated while receiving  "Sugoi Poison!" , the cooldown of  "Oh no!"  will be reset. 
 While in camouflage, hide from champions outside of Twitch's detection range. The camouflage state ends quickly when receiving normal attacks and attack skills.

Twitch.name: Eat this guy!
Twitch.description:
Throws a container of poison, applying a stack  of  "Sugoi Poison!" to the enemy, slowing the enemy by  30% (30% + 0.06%AP)  for 3 seconds.
