 Casting time is reduced by Twitch's attack speed.

Twitch.name: Bone!
Twitch.description:
Inflicts  25 physical damage  to all enemies affected by " Sukoi Poison! ", and inflicts  20 damage (20 + 42%AD + 18%AP)  to enemies for each stack. 

 When the enemy reaches the maximum stack, it spreads the damage to targets within the range and inflicts " Sukoi Poison! " up to the maximum stack. 
 
 When the stack reaches maximum, it deals  125 physical damage . 
 Damage dealt against monsters increases  by 80% .

Twitch.name: Hey haha!
Twitch.description:
For 6 seconds, your range increases by 225, you gain 30  additional attack power , and your normal attacks will pierce all enemies in a straight line. 
 Damage dealt to subsequent targets will be reduced by 15%, to a minimum of 40%.

Tryndamere.name: Battlefield Roar
Tryndamere.description:
Critical rate increases by 0.32%(◆) per Fury. 
 Performing a normal attack on a champion increases  attack speed  by  30%  for  5  seconds (cooldown  6  seconds). 
 Gain  5  Fury every time you perform a normal attack. You get 10 from a critical hit, and 15 from a kill. If you are out of combat for 
8 seconds, you will lose 5 Fury every second. 
 The increased attack speed of "Battlefield Roar" increases according to the skill level of "Immortal Fury". 
The critical rate exceeding 100% is converted to  attack power  of 1 per 1%.

Tryndamere.name: blood lust
Tryndamere.description:
Passive effect: Gain an additional 7 attack power , and additionally gain 0.35 attack power  for every 1%  of reduced health. 
 Activation effect:  Consumes all Fury  to restore  (55 + 30%AD)  +  1.5AP  +  (1.5 + 1.2% reduced health)  of health per  Fury .

rows.label: 1フューリーあたりの体力回復

Tryndamere.name: cry of cry
Tryndamere.description: Reduces the attack power of nearby enemy champions by 40% for 3 seconds. Gives a slow effect of 25% to targets far away from you.

Tryndamere.name: spin slash
Tryndamere.description:
Dash and deal 80 physical damage  (80 + 135% increased AD  + 100% critical rate ). 
 When a critical hit occurs against a minion, the cooldown of "Spin Slash" is reduced by 1 second. If the target is a champion, it will be doubled. 
 Gain  Fury  every time you hit an enemy.

Tryndamere.name: undead rage
Tryndamere.description:
Passive effect: The  bonus attack speed  of " Enemy Heart "'s roar increases to  45% . 
 Activation effect:  Become immortal for 5 seconds  and gain  50 Fury . 
 Can be used even while under the action blocking effect.

Draven.name: league of draven
Draven.description:
When you kill a unit or catch a  spinning slashing axe , you will gain  1 stack  of  Fame . 
 Killing a champion consumes all  Fame stacks  and gives you  80 gold , plus   4 gold  per fame stack . 
 When you are defeated, you lose  half of your stack of  Fame  .

Draven.name: Rotating cutting diameter
Draven.description:
Gains  Rotating Slash Diameter , and within 6 seconds, the next normal attack will deal an additional  45 physical damage  ( 45 + 100% increased attack power ). 
 Rotating slash radius bounces back when it hits a target, and if Draven catches it, it will acquire this effect again. 
 Up to two effects of rotating slash diameter can be retained.

Draven.name: blood burning
Draven.description:
Attack speed increases by 20% and movement speed increases by 50% for 3 seconds. Movement speed returns to normal after  1.5 seconds . 
 If you catch the spinning axe, the cooldown of " Bloodburner " will be removed.

Draven.name: get rid of distractions
Draven.description: Throws an ax, dealing 75 physical damage  to the enemy, knocking them backwards, and applying a 25% slow effect for 2 seconds.

Draven.name: wheel of death
Draven.description:
Throws two giant automatic axes, dealing 200 physical damage  (200 + 130% increased attack power ). The ax returns to itself when it reaches the edge of the map, hits a champion, or is recast. 
 Each time you deal damage to a target, the damage is reduced by 8%, up to a maximum of 60%. Damage reduction resets when direction changes.

Gnar.name: Punsuko
Gnar.description:
When you deal or receive damage,  "Anger"  accumulates.  If you use a skill while "Anger"  is at its maximum, the skill will change and the next skill will transform you into Meganer for 15 seconds. 
 Miner: Movement speed is 0 (maximum 20) (increases according to level), range is 0 (maximum 150) (Increases according to level), attack speed increases by 0% (maximum 90%) (increases according to level). 
 Meganer: Basic physical strength  100  (maximum  850 ) (increases according to level), basic physical defense  4  (maximum  55 ) (increases according to level), basic magic defense increases by 4 (maximum 65) (increases according to level), basic attack power increases by 8 (maximum 50) (increases according to level). 
 When you deal or receive damage as a miner, you gain  3 "Rage"  (increasing at level 1/5/10) for the next 2 seconds. When you attack an enemy champion, you gain 2 "Rage" , and when you attack an enemy other than the champion, you gain 1 "Rage"  (increasing at level 1/5/10). 
 If you do not use a skill within 4 seconds after "Rage"  reaches its maximum, you will automatically transform. 
 If you do not deal damage or take damage for 13 seconds,  "Rage"  will gradually decrease 
. 
 After returning to normal form from Miner or Meganer, you cannot obtain  "Rage"  for 15 seconds. 
 Skill cooldowns in mini-naar and mega-naar states are the same except for  "Good luck" .

Gnar.name: boomerang
Gnar.description:
Fires a mini-boomerang that deals 83 physical damage  (5 + 125%AD) and inflicts 20% slow  for 2 seconds. The boomerang returns after hitting an enemy, dealing 50% damage to the second and subsequent targets. Each enemy can only be hit once. Catching a boomerang reduces the cooldown by 40%. 
 Throws a large megalith, dealing  127 physical damage  (40 + 140% AD) and inflicting  35% slow  for 2 seconds on the target and nearby enemies. If you pick up a boulder within 5 seconds, the cooldown will be reduced by 70%. 
 When the boomerang hits a champion,  "Rage"  (increases at level 1/5/10) is generated, and when it hits a target other than the champion,  "Rage"  (increases at level 1/5/10) is generated.  "Rage"  is only generated when each target is hit for the first time.

rows.label: ブーメラン基本ダメージ

Gnar.name: Good luck
Gnar.description:
Miner (passive effect): Every time a normal attack or skill hits the same enemy 3 times, (10 + 100%AD) and additionally deals  magic damage  of 6% of the target's maximum health, and increases  movement speed  by 20%  (depending on Gnar's level). This movement speed will return to normal over 3 seconds. 
 Mininar (active effect):  Attack speed  increases by  35%  for 6 seconds. 

 Meganer: Slams the area in front of you, dealing 107 physical damage (45 + 100%AD)  to those within the area, and stuns   for 1.25 seconds. 
 When releasing Meganer mode, obtain  increased movement speed  from the automatic effect of Good Morning. 

 Minner (passive effect) deals up to 300 damage to monsters.

Gnar.name: hopping
Gnar.description:
Minner: Jump to the specified point. If  lands on top of a unit , it will bounce again and move further  in the same direction once more . If the unit is an enemy, it deals  96 physical damage  ( 50 + 6% HP of your maximum health ), and gives  a slow effect of 80%  to the unit you step on for a short time. 
 Meganer: Jumps to the specified point and upon landing, deals  116 physical damage  ( 80 + 6% HP of your maximum health ) to surrounding enemies. Gives  80% slow effect  to enemies directly below when landing. 
 If Gnar transforms into Meganer using "Pyon Pyon", Meganer will bounce on the unit it lands on and move farther.

Gnar.name: Nah!
Gnar.description:
Minina  [Passive effect] : "Good day." movement speed increases to  35% . 
 Meganer: Knocks back surrounding enemies, deals  200 physical damage (200 + 50% increased attack power + 100% increased magic power) , and  applies a 45%  slow effect for 1.25 seconds. 
 The damage dealt by "Na!" increases  by 50% ,  deals 300 physical damage  to enemies knocked back by walls, and stuns them instead of slowing them.

Nasus.name: siphon strike
Nasus.description:
The next normal attack within 10 seconds will be  enhanced  and deal an additional 20 physical damage (20+0). 
 Killing a target with "Siphon Strike" permanently increases damage by 5. 
 Killing a champion, large minion, or large monster increases the damage of "Siphon Strike" by 14.

Nasus.name: wither
Nasus.description: For 5 seconds, reduces enemy movement speed by 35% and attack speed by 22.5%. During the duration of the effect, the movement speed slowing effect increases to 45%.

Nasus.name: spirit fire
Nasus.description: Creates a zone of flame and deals 55 magic damage (55 + 40%AP). The zone lasts for 5 seconds and deals 11 magic damage  (11 + 12% AP ) and reduces physical defense by 20% .

Nasus.name: Aspis's Wrath
Nasus.description:
Causes a powerful sandstorm, increasing 300  health , 40  physical defense  and 40  magic defense  for 12 seconds. During the effect period, deals  magic damage  equal to 3% (3% + 0.01%AP)  of physical strength to surrounding enemies. 
 During the effect time, the cooldown of " Siphon Strike " is reduced by 50%. 
 Sandstorm deals up to 240 damage per second.

Nami.name: ripple boost
Nami.description: Allied champions touched by Nami's skill have their movement speed increased by 65 (65+20%AP) for 1.5 seconds.

Nami.name: water prison
Nami.description: Splashes blisters, deals 75 magic damage  (75 + 50%AP), and knocks up  for 1.5 seconds .

Nami.name: the flow of the tide
Nami.description:
Releases a stream of water that bounces between allies and enemy champions three times. The water stream recovers 55 (55 + 30%AP)  of allies' health and deals 65 magic damage (65 + 50%AP)  to enemies. 
 Can only bounce back to the same target once. Each time it bounces, the amount of recovery and damage is reduced by 15% + 7.5% .

Nami.name: Tide user's blessing
Nami.description: For 6 seconds, one friendly champion's normal attacks are strengthened by 3 times, dealing an additional 25 magic damage (25 + 20%AP) and 15% (15 + for 1 second) Adds a slow effect of 5%AP).

Nami.name: Dance of the Sea God
Nami.description:
Sends out a wave that deals  (150 + 60%AP) magic damage ,  knocks up  for 0.5 seconds, and reduces movement speed by  50%. 
 The slow effect lasts  for 2-4 seconds  and increases depending on the distance the wave travels. 
 For allies touched by the waves, the effect of " Ripple Boost " will be doubled by .

Nilah.name: endless joy
Nilah.description:
When a normal attack becomes a critical hit, you recover health equal to 20% of the damage dealt. Excess healing amount is converted into a shield of the same amount of durability. This shield lasts for 6 seconds. 
 Critical attacks against monsters do not recover health.

Nilah.name: shapeless blade
Nilah.description:
Passive effect: Gain physical defense penetration equal to 35% of critical rate. 
 Activation effect: Strikes the whip of the blade straight, dealing 63 physical damage  (10 + 90%AD) to the enemy hit. Damage increases by 1%  for every 1% critical rate. 
 When "Shapeless Blade" hits an enemy, attack speed increases by  by 10%  and range increases by  by 125. Also, for 4 seconds, normal attacks will deal 100% physical damage  to enemies within a fan-shaped area, but damage to non-champions will be reduced by 80% . 
 If you use "Formless Blade" during "Pursuit", a wave will flow from behind you in your direction after dashing, dealing the same damage to all enemies hit. 
 Deals  25%  damage to monsters.

Nilah.name: veil of joy
Nilah.description: Shroud yourself in darkness for 1.75 seconds. While in this state, your movement speed increases by 15%, the  magic damage you receive  is reduced by 25%, and you avoid all normal attacks except for towers. If there are any friendly champions nearby, the closest friendly champion will gain the same effect, and the duration of the effect Neela gains will also be extended by 1 second.

Nilah.name: wander
Nilah.description:
Dash  a certain distance in front  and inflict 82 physical damage  (70 + 20%AD) to all  enemies it comes in contact with. 
  Enhanced  Normal attack  Reduces the cooldown of this skill by 1 second . Hitting an enemy champion reduces the cooldown by an additional 1 second  by . If it hits any unit,  this skill's cooldown is removed . 
 Cooldown cannot be removed again for 10 seconds. 
 If it does not hit a unit, it will immediately go on cooldown.

Nilah.name: Apoptosis
Nilah.description:
Swings a blade whip, continuously dealing 60 physical damage (60 + 140%AD)  over 1 second and reducing enemy movement speed by 10% for 3 seconds. 
Also, when pulling back the blade whip, it deals  125 physical damage (125 + 120%AD)  and pulls surrounding enemies towards you. Additionally, heals you and nearby allied champions by 20% (20% + 30% reduced recovery amount)  of the damage dealt to enemy champions. Excess health regeneration is converted into a shield that lasts for 6 seconds. 
Non-champion units recover 10%.

Nidalee.name: Product selection
Nidalee.description:
"Cougar's Heart"  starts the match at skill level 1. 
 Queen of the Jungle: Increases movement speed by 15% when in the bushes, and increases to 30% when facing enemy champions. This bonus lasts  for  for 2 seconds after exiting the bush. 
 Hunter's Mark:  When "Spear Throw"  or  "Tiger Pincer"  hits a champion or jungle monster, it becomes   "Marking"  for  for 4 seconds. While the enemy is  "marked" , it becomes  visible  and Nidalee's movement speed increases  by 15% .  If you are facing a "marked"  enemy, increase  by 30% . 
 Movement speed bonus stacks  two , with a total cap of  30% .

Nidalee.name: javelin throwing
Nidalee.description: Throws a spear and deals 90 magic damage (90 + 50%AP) . The damage increases depending on the distance of the spear, up to a maximum of  225 magic damage (225 + 125% AP) .

Nidalee.name: Tora pinch
Nidalee.description:
Places an invisible trap for 10 seconds. Enemies who step on the trap become visible and receive  magic damage  (10 + 4%AP) every second for 4 seconds. 
 Up to 4 traps can be set at the same time.

Nidalee.name: Exaltation
Nidalee.description: Recovers 40 health (40 + 30% AP)  to target. This recovery amount increases according to the target's missing health to  maximum health 80 (80 + 60% AP) , and  increases attack speed by 30%  for 7 seconds.

Nidalee.name: cougar heart
Nidalee.description:
Passive effect: 
 - In human form, applying " Marking " will remove the cooldown of this skill. 
- In Cougar form, damage to normal skills increases according to the level of this skill, and you gain 3 increased physical defense and magic defense  (1 + (1 x 9%) physical defense   + 3% magic defense ). 
 Human form (activation effect): Changes to human form, normal attacks become ranged, and activated skills are swapped. 
 Cougar form (activation effect):  Changes to cougar form , normal attack becomes  melee , and active skills are swapped.

Nunu.name: Call of the Freljord
Nunu.description:
Dealing damage to enemy champions, large monsters, and structures increases ,  attack speed by 40% , and  movement speed by 15%  for  for 4 seconds. 
 The nearby allied champion with the fastest attack speed gains  half the effect of this bonus . 
  cannot be activated on the same target for  for 8 seconds.

Nunu.name: Round bite
Nunu.description:
Bites the enemy, dealing 55 magic damage (55 + 65%AP + 6% increased health ) and increasing health (80 + 70% increased health  + 12%AP) Recover. If your health is below 50% of your maximum health, this recovery effect will be increased by 50%. 
 Deals  350 true damage  to minions and monsters instead.

Nunu.name: Extra large snowball!
Nunu.description:
Willump rolls a snowball, increasing in size and speed over 12 seconds . The snowball explodes when it hits an enemy champion, large monster, or wall, dealing 35-175 magic damage  (35 + 30%AP + 150%AP) to the enemy and knocking them up for 0.5-1.25 seconds, depending on the size of the snowball. 
 Reactivation: Releases a snowball and causes it to explode the first time it hits the enemy. 
 Removes any slow effects you are receiving when activated, and will no longer be affected by slow effects while rolling. 
 Deals 33.33% damage to minions and monsters.

Nunu.name: Snowball rapid fire
Nunu.description:
Chant for up to 2.5 seconds to throw a snowball, dealing  10 magic damage (10 + 5% AP) , and  inflicting a 20% slow effect  for 0.5~2.0 seconds. 
 At the end of the chant, Willump deals magic damage (3% + 0.008%AP to 15% + 0.04%AP)  equal to  3%~15% of the enemy's maximum health, and  applies a snare effect  for 0.5~1.5 seconds. Damage and snare duration increase in proportion to the number of snowballs that hit the target. 
 The final explosion deals up to  150 damage  to the monster, and  150% damage  to the monster.

rows.label: モンスターに対する最大ダメージ

Nunu.name: absolute zero
Nunu.description:
Gain a  shield  that absorbs 65 damage (65 + 180%AD + 35% bonus health ) and creates a blizzard for up to 3 seconds. Applies  50% slow effect  to surrounding enemies.  The slow effect increases up to 95% during the duration of the effect. 

When the chant ends, inflict 180-915 magic damage (180 + 50%AP + 275%AP) depending on the chanting time to surrounding enemies.

Nocturne.name: Dream cut
Nocturne.description:
Dream Slash: Every 12 seconds, the next normal attack is enhanced and attacks the target and surrounding enemies, dealing 65 physical damage (120%AD)  and recovering  health for each enemy hit by 16 (16% increased HP + 30%AD) . 
 Except for the main target, "Dream Slash" only deals 50%  damage to minions, and the amount of health recovered from minions is reduced by 50% . 
 "Dream Slash" has  critical judgment  for the main target. 
 Normal attacks reduce the cooldown of "Dream Slash" by  1 second , and if the target is a champion or monster, this reduction increases to  3 seconds .

Nocturne.name: hand of darkness
Nocturne.description:
Throws a shadow  claw  in the direction of the target, inflicting 70 + 85% attack power  damage, and leaves an "aftershadow"  in its path for 5 seconds. Enemy champions and large monsters hit by the claws also leave a trail of  "Aftermath"  when moving. 
 When standing on "Aftermath" , attack power increases by 20 and movement speed increases by 20% .

Nocturne.name: jet black book
Nocturne.description:
Passive: Attack speed is increased by 35%. 
 Activation effect: Creates a barrier that blocks the next enemy skill for 1.5 seconds. If you block a skill with this, the automatic effect of  "Evet Black Veil" will increase your attack speed by 70%  for 5 seconds, and  give a 20% slow effect  to surrounding enemies.

rows.label: 強化された増加攻撃速度

Nocturne.name: bottomless fear
Nocturne.description:
Passive effect: Increases movement speed by 90%  when facing an enemy affected by the fear effect. 
 Active effect: Shows the target a horrifying nightmare and deals 80 magic damage  (80 + 100% AP ) over 2 seconds. If the target does not move out of the effect area by the end of the effect time, the target will receive  Fear effect  and  30% slow effect  for 1.2 seconds.

Nocturne.name: baranoia
Nocturne.description:
Darkens the map for 6 seconds, reducing the field of view of all enemy champions and blinding everyone but themselves. Can be reactivated during the effect period. 
 Reactivate: Charges the enemy champion, dealing  150 physical damage   (150 + 120% increased attack power) . During this charge, it becomes unstoppable.

Norra.name: favorite trinket
Norra.description:
Trinket: 
Every 21 seconds (level), the next skill you use leaves a trinket on the battlefield for 4 seconds. 
When touched by an enemy champion, Trinket activates and fires a bullet of magical energy at the target, dealing 20 magic damage (15+5(Lv)+20%AP). 
Each time a normal skill hits a champion, the cooldown of this skill is reduced by 20%.

Norra.name: waves of memory
Norra.description:
Passive effect: This skill deals additional magic damage (+1% AP) equal to 1% to 2.5% of the target's maximum health to the enemy that has become gigantic with "Thread". 
Long press (active effect): Collects memories and applies a 20% slow effect to yourself. If you continue charging after reaching full charge, the slow effect will increase to 30% and you will be teleported slightly backwards even after firing. 
Release (active effect): Releases the collected memories, charges them, and fires a magic arrow in the specified direction. When a magic arrow hits an enemy champion, it stops and deals 60 magic damage (60+60% AP) to the enemy and surrounding enemies. 
Charging: 
- Nora can choose the direction in which she fires her arrows. 
- Arrow range increases depending on charge time. 
- Arrow damage increases with charge time, up to 140% (does up to 84 damage). 
- When fully charged, activates all nearby Triniquets to attack the first champion hit by the arrow.

Norra.name: To a place in the middle of nowhere
Norra.description:
Creates a circular magical portal at the specified location, dealing 65 magic damage (65 + 40% AP) to all enemies within the area and sending them to another dimension for 2.25 seconds. 

Enemies in another dimension: 
- Cannot attack or use skills, but can move. 
- Slowed by 80%. 

Enemies will be returned to their original location after 2.25 seconds.

Norra.name: Homecoming Thored
Norra.description:
Passive: When Trinket deals damage to a target, it applies Thread. 
Active effect: Creates portals at both ends of the specified horizontal area. After a short delay, intersecting "threads" are fired from the portal, dealing 70 magic damage (70 + 60% AP) and inflicting threads on all enemies in between. 
Targets marked as "thread": 
- Receive a 20% slow effect for 2 seconds. 
- Increases size for 4 seconds. 
Deals 115% damage to monsters. 
Deals 115% damage to minions.

Norra.name: Portalpalooza!
tags: 遠くにいる味方をサポート
Norra.description:
Generates a gigantic teleporting magical vortex that engulfs all units within range. Swapping from the edge of the circle to the other side will cause portals to appear at both ends and fire magic arrows from one end to the other. This can be done up to 4 times. The first enemy champion hit by a magic arrow is slowed by 80% for 0.5 seconds, and all enemies touched deal 100 magic damage (100 + 55%AP). 
The fourth magic arrow deals 40% additional magic damage.

Bard.name: traveler's call
Bard.description:
Ancient Bells: Get bonuses from chimes you collect by appearing on the map. Automatically collect surrounding chimes and receive the following bonuses: 
-  Movement speed when out of combat increases by 24% for 20 seconds (maximum 10 stacks, 150%) 
- 400 XP
-  Restores 12% of maximum mana  
 Chime remains there for 10 minutes. 
 After 5 minutes have passed from the start of the match, you will gain 20 experience points every minute. 

 Meep: Summons 1 Meep that follows you every 7 seconds (maximum 1). Meep strengthens the bard and gives additional effects depending on the number of chimes collected. 
- Consumes 1 Meep to strengthen normal attacks, dealing additional magic damage equal to 35 (35 + 40%AP), plus 12 (for every 3 chimes you own) . 
- If you have 3 chimes, give the enemy a slow effect of 25%  for 1 second . 
- If you have 9 chimes, it will also damage the surroundings and behind the target. 
- If you own 27 chimes, the area of ​​effect will further expand. 
 Appearance frequency, slow effect, and maximum number of meeps that can follow increase depending on the number of chimes collected.

Bard.name: laws of the universe
Bard.description:
Fires an energy bullet, dealing  80 magic damage (80 + 80% AP)  to the first enemy hit, and  inflicting a 60% slow effect  for 1.1 seconds. 
The energy bullet then continues traveling a short distance. If the energy bullet hits a second enemy or wall, it will stun the target  for  for 1.2 seconds. If the second enemy is hit, it will take the same damage as the first enemy.

Bard.name: relics of recovery
Bard.description:
Spawns a relic that restores health. The relic gradually grows and increases in power, reaching its maximum effect after 5 seconds, increasing the movement speed of the first ally it touches by 22.5% (22.5% + 0.05%AP) (for 1.5 seconds) and recovering at least 50 (50 + 30%AP) health. The relic will recover 100 (100 + 60%AP) health 5 seconds after it appears. 
 Charge: Can stack up to 2 charges. 
 Up to three relics can appear at the same time. Relics are destroyed if touched by enemy champions.

Bard.name: journey of the spirit
Bard.description:
A one-way magic tunnel appears in the surrounding terrain for  for 10 seconds . All nearby champions, friend or foe, can use the tunnel by tapping the tower button. 
 Allies move faster in tunnels than enemies by  by 50% .

Bard.name: tuning of fate
Bard.description: Fires magical protective energy in a certain area, causing all units and structures hit to become  time-stopped  for 2.5 seconds.  During the time stop  state, the target cannot be targeted in an invincible state and cannot take any actions.

Pyke.name: power of the sunken
Pyke.description:
Stores 10% (10 + 0.35% magic defense ) of damage received from champions. If there are two or more   enemy champions that can be seen around you, the storage rate increases to 50% (50 + 0.65% magic defense ). The upper limit of damage that can be accumulated 
 is  160  ( 65% physical strength ) or  160  +  800% increased attack power , whichever is lower). 

 When you disappear from the enemy's sight, you recover the accumulated damage as health. 
 
 Pike's  maximum health  does not increase, and  14 increased health  is converted to  1 attack power .

Pyke.name: bone skewer
Pyke.description:
Charge: Movement speed is reduced by 15%  for up to 3 seconds. The range increases for the first  0.8 seconds . 
 Release: Throws a harpoon and deals  130 physical damage   (130 + 60% increased AD) ,  gives   50% slow effect  for 1 second and attracts the target. If you release it immediately, it will strike you in front, dealing the same damage. 
 Deal  50% damage  to minions. 
 Deals  50% damage  to monsters. 
 If this skill is charged beyond its limit, the cooldown will be slightly removed and 50%  of the mana cost will be recovered.

Pyke.name: ghost water
Pyke.description: Becomes camouflaged for 5 seconds and increases movement speed by (40% + 200%AD). Movement speed gradually returns to normal during the duration of the effect.

Pyke.name: undertow of the dead
Pyke.description:
Dash  forward  and leave  ghost  on the spot. After 1 second, the ghost returns to Pike and deals  physical damage of  (120 + 100% bonus attack power) and stuns him  for  (1.5 + 1% bonus attack power) seconds. 
 Deals 50% damage to minions. 
 Deals 50% damage to monsters.

Pyke.name: underwater raid
Pyke.description:
Mark the specified point in an X shape and deal  the finishing blow to enemy champions whose  health is less than   (250 + 80% increased AD + 250% maximum health)  . 
 Champions other than champions with health equal to or higher than this value will receive  physical damage  equal to 50% of this value. 
 If you hit an enemy champion, blink to that location. 
 If you deal the finishing blow to an enemy champion  , you will be able to reactivate "Underwater Raid" for 1.5 seconds. 
 For each killing blow, Pike receives  100% of the bounty in gold . 
 If there is an ally who assists, the ally will receive  100% gold , and Pike will receive  160% gold  (up to  600 ). 
 When an ally kills within the X-shaped mark, Pike receives  160% gold  (up to a maximum of  600 ).

Heimerdinger.name: Hextech Affinity
Heimerdinger.description: Movement speed increases by 20%  when you are near friendly towers and turrets you have set up.

Heimerdinger.name: H-28G innovative gun
Heimerdinger.description:
Set up a turret. The turret gradually charges up and attacks surrounding enemies. The turret deals 5 magic damage (5 + 25%AP)  on hit, and when fully charged it fires a beam that deals 25 magic damage (25 + 55%AP) . 
 Three active "H-28G innovation guns" can be installed at the same time. When Heimerdinger leaves for a certain distance, the turret becomes dormant. 

 Upgrade! ! ! With technology expansion, this skill will be upgraded to  H-28G Super Cannon . 

H-28G innovative cannon stats:
Basic attack power: (110 (+ 3%AD + 45%AP))
Basic health: 10HP (+8%~50%AP depending on level)
Basic physical defense: 20~90 (depending on level)
 Deals 40% damage to monsters.
Additional damage taken from melee champions is 40%.

rows.label: 砲台のスキルダメージ

Heimerdinger.name: hextech small rocket
Heimerdinger.description:
Fires 5 rockets at once, dealing 60 magic damage (60 + 60%AP)  to the first enemy hit. Whenever a rocket hits a champion, nearby towers gain 20% charge . Additional rockets that hit the same champion or monster after the first hit will only deal  20% magic damage . This damage is increased  by 60%  against minions. 

 Upgrade! ! With technology expansion, this skill has been upgraded to Hextech Rocket Barrage.

Heimerdinger.name: CH-2 super electromagnetic grenade
Heimerdinger.description:
Throws a grenade that deals (70 + 60%AP) magic damage within the specified area and  inflicts a 35% slow effect  for 2 seconds. Additionally, the enemy in the center will be stunned  for  for 1.25 seconds. 
 If you hit a champion, the surrounding area will be charged to the maximum. 

 Upgrade! ! : With skill expansion, this skill will be upgraded to  CH3X type grenade .

Heimerdinger.name: Upgrade! ! !
Heimerdinger.description:
Active effect: The following normal skills are upgraded. 
 H-28Q Medium Rocket: 
 Sets up an upgraded turret for 10 seconds, dealing magic damage (80 + 35%AP) per 3 shots. When fully charged, increases to  100 magic damage (100 + 60%AP) . If it hits, it will slow you down for 1 second. 
 Hextech Rocket Barrage: 
 Fires multiple rockets in 4 bursts, each rocket dealing  35 magic damage (35 + 45% AP)  to the first enemy it hits. Rockets that hit the same champion or monster after the second hit only deal  25% magic damage  per shot. If 5 rockets hit the target, the damage will be further reduced. Rocket barrage deals up to 624 magic damage (624 + 175%AP)  to enemy champions or monsters. 
 CH-3X Super Precision Grenade: 
 Grenade bullet bounces and discharges 3 times, each dealing  100 magic damage (100 + 60% AP) . The area of ​​effect of stun and slow is expanded, and grenade bullets apply 40% slow effect  to enemies. 
 Reactivate: Cancel this skill.

Pantheon.name: mortal will
Pantheon.description: Using a normal attack or skill 5 times will strengthen the next normal skill.

Pantheon.name: comet spear
Pantheon.description:
Use with tap: Strike in front and deal 80 physical damage (80 + 120%AD) . The cooldown of "Comet Spear" is reduced by 50% . 
 Charge and use: Throw a spear and deal the same damage to the first enemy hit. Subsequent damage to enemies will be reduced by 50%. 
 If the target's health is less than  35% , "Comet Spear" becomes  critical  and deals  120 physical damage (120 + 180%AD) . 
Mortal Will : Deals an additional 30 physical damage (30 + 120%AD) . 
 Damage against minions is reduced by  by 20% . 
 Deals  110%  damage to monsters.

Pantheon.name: jumping shield
Pantheon.description:
Dash towards the enemy, stunning them for 1 second and dealing 70 physical damage (70 + 100%AD). 
 
 Mortal Will: The next normal attack will be  enhanced  and attack three times, dealing a total of  87 physical damage  ( 135% AD ).

Pantheon.name: Onslaught of Aegis
Pantheon.description:
For 1.5 seconds, blocks all damage from a certain direction except for the tower, and deals  64 physical damage  ( 100% AD ) to surrounding enemies. At the end, slam the front and deal  60 physical damage  ( 60%AD  +  150% increased attack power ). 
 Mortal Will: Increases movement speed by 60%  for 2.5 seconds when slamming the shield. 
 When moving in a direction other than the blocking direction, you will receive a maximum  50%  slow effect. 
 If activated again, it will end immediately. 
 Damage against minions is reduced  by 50% .

Pantheon.name: great star road
Pantheon.description:
Passive: Gain 10% Physical Defense Penetration. 
 Active effect: Jump high into the air and throw a spear from the sky, dealing  40 physical damage  (comet spear damage) and  applying a 50% slow effect  for 2 seconds. 
 Afterwards, it will fall to the specified location and deal  300 magic damage (300 + 100%) . 
 After activating this skill,  "Mortal Will"  becomes available immediately. 
 Damage is reduced by up to  50%  at the edge of the landing area.

Viktor.name: Glorious Evolution
Viktor.description:
Gain Hex Fragments for every enemy you kill: 
 - Gain 3  and  Hex Fragments for defeating minions or regular monsters. 
 - Obtain 5  hex fragments  by defeating epic monsters, artillery units, and super minions. 
- Gain 25  hex fragments when you get a kill or assist from a champion. 
 For every 100   hex fragments obtained, you can permanently upgrade the activation skill by  . 
 When all normal skills are upgraded, the hex core will be complete and " Arcane Storm " will be strengthened.

Viktor.name: power blast
Viktor.description:
Attack the enemy, dealing +45 magic damage  (45 + 30%AP), and gain a shield that absorbs up to 30 + 15%AP for  for 2.5 seconds . 
Next normal attack within 3.5 seconds deals 74 additional magic damage  (20 + 100%AD + 40%AP). 
 Upgrade - Turbo Charge: This skill's shield absorbs up to 50 damage  (50 + 25%AP) and increases  movement speed by 30%  for 2.5 seconds .

Viktor.name: gravity field
Viktor.description:
Develops a "gravity field" for 4 seconds, giving enemies within range a 25% slow effect . After a short while, the field will apply a stack of Gravitation  to the  target every 0.5 seconds. This stack can stack  up to  three times. 
 When 3 stacks are reached,  consumes all stacks  and  stuns the target for 1.5 seconds . Afterwards,  the target will no longer be subject to gravitation for a short period of time . 

 Upgrade - Slow: When "Power Blast", "Hextech Clay", and "Arcane Storm" first damage an enemy, give  an additional 20% slow effect  to the target.

Viktor.name: hextech ray
Viktor.description:
Burns the field in a straight line with a chaotic beam, dealing 75 magic damage  (75 + 30% AP ) to the enemy it hits. 
 Upgrade -  Blast Quasar : After a short while, an explosion will occur along the beam's trail, dealing 30 magic damage  (30 + 60% AP ). 

 How to operate: 
 Tap: Automatically search for and attack nearby targets according to the automatic aim setting. 
 Drag: Drag the skill button to set the starting point of the beam. The skill will then automatically search for nearby targets and attack them, depending on the auto-aim settings. 

 Precision Cast: 
 1. Drag the skill button to set the starting point of the beam. Hold it down until you are ready to use it. 
2. To confirm, tap the check mark in the top left, or wait until the time limit expires if the  Manual aim time limit  setting is enabled. To cancel, tap the "Back" button in the top left. 
3. Drag the skill button to aim the beam in the direction you want. Activates when you release your finger.

Viktor.name: arcane storm
Viktor.description:
Generates  "Arcane Storm" at the specified location for  5.5 seconds, deals  100  magic damage ( 100 + 60% AP ) to enemies within the area, and interrupts the skill the target was chanting. After that, the storm deals 50 magic damage (50 + 40% AP) to enemies within the area every second. 
 Drag the skill button after use to move the storm to another location. 
 Upgrade - Howl: Increases the movement speed of "Arcane Storm". Killing or assisting a champion strengthens the storm, extending its duration by  by 3.5 seconds  and increasing its area of ​​effect. Storm can be strengthened up to  five times . 
 The closer the storm is to Victor, the faster it moves.

Fiora.name: duelist dance
Fiora.description:
After 2 seconds (depending on Grand Challenge level), reveal the vital point of a nearby enemy champion. 
 When attacking the vital points, inflicts 3.5% (3.5% + 0.05% increase AD)  of the target's  maximum physical strength as  confirmed damage , recovers  45 physical strength (HP) , and (depending on Grand Challenge level)  increases movement speed by 30% . This movement speed will return to normal over 1.75 seconds. 
 After attacking one vital point or after 16.75 seconds, a new vital point will be revealed.

Fiora.name: fant
Fiora.description:
Dash towards the specified location and pierce the nearest enemy unit from where you moved with your rapier, dealing 75 physical damage (75 + 110% additional attack power) . When an attack hits a target, Fant's cooldown is reduced by 50%. 
 Phant prioritizes attacking  vital points  and skillable enemies, and applies  normal attack effect  to the target. 
 Deals 50% damage to monsters. Fants cannot damage towers.

Fiora.name: repost
Fiora.description:
Nullifies all damage and debuffs you receive for 0.75 seconds. After that, performs a charge in the specified direction, dealing 120 of  magic damage (120 + 100% AP)  to the first enemy champion hit, and reducing movement speed and attack speed by 50% for 1.5 seconds. 
 If you use "Riposte" to block movement, a stun effect will be applied instead of slow.

Fiora.name: blade work
Fiora.description: The next two normal attacks will be  enhanced  and will acquire  60% increased attack speed . The first normal attack gives  a slow effect of 30% for 1 second , but there is no critical hit and becomes  . The second normal attack always becomes  critical  and deals  170% physical damage .

rows.label: クリティカルダメージ

Fiora.name: grand challenge
Fiora.description:
Passive effect: The time required to reveal vital points is reduced by 0.25 seconds . 
 Active effect:  For 8 seconds , reveal all 4   vital points of an enemy champion, and gain  Duelist Dance  bonus movement speed while near them. 
If you attack all  four  vital points within 8 seconds , or if you attack one   or more before the enemy champion falls, After  2 seconds  to  5 seconds , self and nearby friendly champions'  health  recovers by 80 per  second  (80 + 60% additional attack power). This recovery time increases depending on the number of vital points attacked. 
If you attack all 4  vital points, you will inflict 14% of the target's maximum health as guaranteed damage.

rows.label: 急所可視化の時間短縮

Fizz.name: seat trident
Fizz.description:
Normal attack deals additional 24 magic damage  (24 + 45%AP) over 3 seconds. 
 Deals 90% damage to monsters.

Fizz.name: unit guest strike
Fizz.description: Dash past the target enemy, dealing 20 magic damage (20 + 60%AP)  and 3 physical damage (100%AD) , and applying normal attack effects.

Fizz.name: tearing waves
Fizz.description:
The next normal attack is  enhanced , causing water to spew out around the target, dealing 50  additional magic damage  (60 + 45%AP ), and inflicting " Seed Ridient " on the enemy hit. Normal attacks made with  and  within 5 seconds will deal  (10 + 40%AP) additional magic damage . 
 Killing a unit with the first normal attack reduces the cooldown of "Tearing Wave" to 1 second.

Fizz.name: play/trickster
Fizz.description:
Jumps to the specified point, rides  on the spear and becomes untargeted . After 1.2 seconds, jump from the spear and deal  80 magic damage (80 + 80% AP)  in a wide area and reduce enemy movement speed by 40%  for  2 seconds. 
 Reactivation: If you jump in the specified direction quickly, the damage range will be reduced and the enemy will no longer be slowed down.

Fizz.name: Phishing
Fizz.description:
Throws a fish in the specified direction and sticks to the first enemy champion it hits, making the target  visible .  After 2 seconds , the fish will summon a shark, knocking up the target   and knocking away surrounding enemies  . The longer the fish flies, the larger the shark it summons, deals 150-300 magic damage (150 + 60%AP + 300 + 120%AP)  to the enemy it hits, and reduces movement speed by 40% - 80%  depending on the size of the shark. 
 If the fish does not stick to the champion, it will bounce on the ground and attract sharks to the spot.

Fiddlesticks.name: harmless scarecrow
Fiddlesticks.description:
When you get a kill or assist from a champion, summon a " Substitute Doll " for  for 3 seconds . " Substitute Doll " automatically chases the nearest enemy champion, and when it catches up or the effect time ends, it explodes and inflicts  Fear effect  on all surrounding enemy champions. 
 Only one " Substitute Doll " can exist at a time.

Fiddlesticks.name: teller
Fiddlesticks.description:
Passive effect: If you damage an enemy with a skill while not being seen by the enemy for 2 seconds outside of combat or pretending to be a  "Substitute Doll" , apply  Fear effect  for 1.2 seconds. 
 Activation effect: Releases a frightening flock of crows, inflicts  Fear effect  for 1.2 seconds on the target it touches, and deals  magic damage equal to 4% of  reduced physical strength. This damage increases by  1.5%  for every  100 HP . Deals at least 45 damage . 
 If the target was previously under the  Fear effect , instead of applying the  Fear effect  again, the damage dealt will be increased by 200% . 
 The maximum damage dealt to monsters is 400.

Fiddlesticks.name: rich harvest
Fiddlesticks.description:
Chant to absorb the souls of surrounding enemies, dealing  60 magic damage (60 + 30% AP)  every second for 2 seconds, and at the last moment dealing additional damage  equal to  10% of the target's lost health. 
 What you gain from pain:  Recovers health  equal to 40% of the damage (calculated based on damage before mitigation). 
 While chanting, you receive  30%  slow effect. 
 You can end the chant early by reactivating it at any time. If Fiddlesticks is able to complete the cast without being interrupted, the remaining cooldown of this skill is reduced by  by 50% . 
 Health recovered for each type of target: 
 Champion:  40%  
 Minion:  15%  
 Monster:  45%  
 Monsters receive  160% damage . 
 Deals  50% damage  to minions.

Fiddlesticks.name: reaping
Fiddlesticks.description: Slash the specified area with a sickle, dealing  70 magic damage (70 + 50% magic attack power)  to enemies within the range, and  giving a 35% slow effect  for 1.25 seconds. Apply  silence effect  to enemies in the center.

Fiddlesticks.name: crow storm
Fiddlesticks.description: Chant for 1.5 seconds. Then, blink to the specified point and summon "Crowstorm" to deal 30 magic damage  (30 + 10% AP ) to surrounding enemies every 0.25 seconds for 5 seconds. "Crowstorm" deals up to 600 magic damage .

Vladimir.name: Crimson Covenant
Vladimir.description: Magic power  increases by the same amount as  4.5%  of  increased physical strength , and  physical strength  increases by the same amount as  140%  of  magical power  (both effects do not overlap with each other).

Vladimir.name: Vampire
Vladimir.description:
Absorbs the enemy's life force, deals  70 magic damage (70 + 60%AP) , and recovers  15 (15 + 35%AP) health . When this skill's cooldown ends, you will receive a stack of "Bloodthirst". When 
 reaches 2 stacks,  movement speed increases by 10% (changes at champion level 1/5/9/13)  for 0.5 seconds, and becomes " Crimson Impulse " for 2.5 seconds. Until this condition ends, or the stacks of "Bloodthirst " are gradually consumed. 
 " Crimson Impulse ": When in this state, the next "Vampire" used is strengthened,  deals 75% additional damage , and  recovers 30 (30 + 0% AP) + 170% of lost physical strength + 0% AP . Activating the skill consumes all stacks of " Bloodthirst " and ends the " Crimson Impulse " state. This enhanced skill will restore  health by 35%  if the target is a minion.

Vladimir.name: Swamp of Red Blood
Vladimir.description: Lose  20%  of your  health ,  dive into a pool of  blood for 2 seconds, and become  unable to target . Additionally, movement speed increases by  by 27.5% , and returns to normal after  for 1 second . While the pool of blood lasts, enemies within its range will be dealt  33 magic damage (20 + 2% of maximum health)  every  0.5 seconds, and will be slowed by  40% . You recover  physical strength  equal to 15% of the damage dealt.

Vladimir.name: blood flowing
Vladimir.description: Loses 2.8% of own health, charges for up to 1.5 seconds, and deals 350 magic damage  (20 + 35%AP + 2.5%HP of maximum health ) to surrounding enemies. The more you charge, the more damage increases  by 100% . If you charge for more than 1 second, the health cost will be maximized, but if  health  is less than  12% , you will not lose any  health  even if you charge. When charged for 1.5 seconds, your movement speed will be reduced by 20%, and enemies hit will be slowed by 40%.

Vladimir.name: Cursed Blood Vortex
Vladimir.description: Spreads a plague within a certain area, infecting enemies it touches for 4 seconds. The plague then explodes, dealing 150 magic damage (150 + 70%AP)  to the infected target. Also, during infection,  10% of the damage taken by the infected target will be dealt as additional magic damage  to that target. After 0.4 seconds, the first infected enemy champion heals Vladmir for 150 (150 + 70% AP) . Each subsequent infected champion recovers 40% health .

Hecarim.name: Warpath
Hecarim.description: Attack speed increases by   ( 12%  of  increased attack power ).

Hecarim.name: rampage
Hecarim.description:
Charges the activation for 0.75 seconds and increases the damage area. Activates automatically when fully charged, dealing 65 physical damage (5 + 110%AD + 35%AP) . 
 If you hit an enemy champion or large monster,  becomes a critical hit , deals  120% damage , increases your movement speed by  30% , and returns to normal over 3 seconds. Also,  "Rampage"  used within 8 seconds afterwards will be strengthened   and deal  120% damage . 
 Deal  60% damage  to minions.

Hecarim.name: soul drain
Hecarim.description:
For 4 seconds, increases physical defense  6  and magic defense  6 , and deals  12  magic damage ( 12 + 20% AP ) to surrounding enemies every 0.5 seconds. Recovers your physical strength by 5(5 + 1% of increased HP ) for each hit. 
 Also recovers physical strength equal to 20% of the damage dealt to the target (20% of the damage dealt + 0.02% of the increased HP ). 
 The amount of health recovered from damage to minions and monsters is reduced by  by 50% , and is capped at  90 .

Hecarim.name: charge
Hecarim.description:
Movement speed increases by 25%, increasing to 55% over 4 seconds. 
 If you perform a normal attack within 5 seconds, dash to the enemy, deal  5 (+30% additional AD)  physical damage, and knock them back. Additionally, it immediately chases down the enemy it knocks back. Enemies hit become visible. 
 While using Specter's Slaught, the remaining effect time of this skill does not elapse.

Hecarim.name: specter onslaught
Hecarim.description: Summon ghost knights and charge them, dealing 150 (150 + 100%AP) magic damage. Releases a shock wave at the end of the charge, and applies a  fear effect for 0.75 - 1.5 seconds depending on the distance of the charge.

Poppy.name: ambassador of steel
Poppy.description:
Every 12 seconds (◆), your next normal attack throws a buckler, increasing the range by 350 and dealing 20 additional magic damage  (AP). 
 Buckler bounces off the target and falls nearby for 4 seconds. If you pick it up, you will gain a  86 durability shield  ( 13% HP of maximum health ) (AP) for 3 seconds. 
 If the buckler kills the target, or if the target is killed before being hit, it will automatically return to you. Enemies cannot break the buckler by stepping on it.

Poppy.name: hammer shock
Poppy.description:
Brings down the hammer, dealing 50 (+90% increased attack power + 9% of target's maximum health) physical damage  and creating an area with unstable footing. 
 Unstable areas give  25% slow effect  to enemies. This area will explode after 1 second, dealing 50 (+90% increased attack power + 9% of target's maximum health) physical damage  again. 
 Damage based on physical strength is capped at 40 for each hit against monsters.

Poppy.name: steadfast
Poppy.description:
Passive effect: Physical defense increases by 12%, magic defense increases by 12%. If your health is less than 40%, this bonus will be doubled  to . 
 Activation effect: Increases movement speed by  by 40%  and creates a zone that stops surrounding enemies from dashing for  for 2 seconds . Enemies stopped in this zone will be dealt  95 magic damage (95 + 70%AP) ,  will be pinned ,  for 2 seconds , and will have a  25% slow effect .

Poppy.name: heroic charge
Poppy.description:
Charge towards the enemy, inflict 75 physical damage  (75% increased attack power ), and push them away. 
 If it hits the terrain, it will stun the target for  1.7 seconds  and will additionally deal  75 physical damage  ( 75% increased attack power ).

Poppy.name: Guardian's Hammer
Poppy.description:
Hold: Charges the hammer for up to 4 seconds and applies  15% slow  to yourself. 
 Release: Pulls the ground and creates a shockwave, dealing 200 physical damage  (200 + 90%AD) to the first enemy champion hit and surrounding enemies, knocking them back towards the Nexus, and making them untargetable while flying. Range and knockback distance increase with charge time. 
 Uncharged slam deals 100 physical damage  (100 + 45%AD) to the enemy and knocks them up for 1 second.

Volibear.name: merciless storm
Volibear.description:
Every time you deal damage with a skill or normal attack, attack speed increases by 5% (5% + 4% attack speed)  for 6 seconds. Maximum 5 stacks. 
 When 5 stacks are reached, Volibear's claws will ignite with lightning and deal an additional  11 (11[Level] - 11[AP] + 40%AP)  magic damage to the 4 enemies closest to you during normal attacks.

Volibear.name: onslaught of lightning
Volibear.description:
For 4 seconds, your movement speed increases by 10%, or 20% if you are heading towards an enemy champion. The first normal attack after activation deals  (15 + 100% increased physical damage) physical damage  to the target and stuns the target   for 1 second. 
 If the enemy receives the  immobilization effect  before the target is  stunned , the reduction in the effect time of "Lightning Onslaught" will be temporarily stopped.

Volibear.name: Slash of fury
Volibear.description:
Steps on the enemy and deals 67 physical damage  (5 + 100%AD + 6.5% increased HP ). If you step on a champion or large monster, you will be in the  "Ferocious"  state for 8 seconds. 
 If you use this skill while in the "Ferocious"  state, the damage will be  108 physical damage (8 + 160%AD +  Increases HP by 10.4% ) and recovers your physical strength by 20 (20 + 5% of decreased physical strength ). 
 This skill applies the effect during normal attacks. 
 Deals 80% damage to monsters.

Volibear.name: A blow of heaven
Volibear.description:
Summons a thundercloud and drops lightning, dealing magic damage equal to 80 + 50% AP  + 11%  of the target's maximum health, and inflicting 40% slow  for 2 seconds. 
 If you are within the area of ​​effect, you will receive a shield with a durability value of 97(75%) + 14% of your maximum health  for 2.5 seconds. 
 Damage to non-champions is capped at  150.

rows.label: モンスターに対する最大ダメージ

Volibear.name: the one who causes the storm
Volibear.description:
Transforms and jumps at the specified location, increasing  health ,  health  by 17, and range by 50 for 12 seconds. 
 Shatters the earth upon landing, disables surrounding towers  for 3 seconds , and deals  300 + 100% bonus AD  physical damage. Surrounding enemies receive  slow effect  of 50% . This effect takes  1 second to return to normal . Enemies directly below you receive physical damage of 300 + 100% bonus AD + 210%AP .

Maokai.name: magic sap
Maokai.description:
Every 24 seconds, your next normal attack will restore 30HP to your health. 
 When you use a skill or receive a skill from an enemy champion, the cooldown of this skill is reduced by 
 3 seconds.

Maokai.name: Thorn beating
Maokai.description:
Slams his fist on the ground to generate a shock wave, dealing  magic damage  equal to  (60 + 50% AP)  +  5%  of the target's maximum health, and inflicting  slow effect  for 0.25 seconds. Also knocks back nearby enemies. 
 Deals  120 additional damage  to monsters.

Maokai.name: Attack of the tree people
Maokai.description: Turns into a giant moving mass of roots,  becomes untargetable,  and dashes towards the target enemy champion. When reaching the target, inflicts  snare effect  of  and  60  magic damage ( 60  +  50% AP ) for  0.8 seconds. Deal  180% damage  to monsters.

Maokai.name: Throwing saplings
Maokai.description:
Throw saplings. The sapling will monitor enemies for 20 seconds where it falls. The sapling chases surrounding enemies, and when it reaches the enemy, it explodes, dealing  60 magic damage  ( 60 + 25% AP  +  6% increased HP ), and applying  30% slow  to surrounding enemies. 
 If placed in a bush, it will monitor for 30 seconds. When it reaches the target, the explosion becomes larger, dealing 200% magic damage , and giving the hit enemy a 30% slowing effect  ( + 1.5% HP increase  +  1% AP  for every 100 increase) for 3 seconds. 
Saplings deal 130%  damage to minions regardless of whether they are placed in bushes or not. 
 The sapling deals up to 300 damage  to monsters.

Maokai.name: captivity of the earth
Maokai.description: Summons a giant wave that moves slowly, deals 175 magic damage  (175 + 65%AP), and applies   and  snare effects  for 0.8 seconds to enemies it touches. The snare effect duration increases depending on the next movement distance. When this skill hits an enemy champion, your  movement speed increases by 40% . This movement speed gradually returns to normal over 2 seconds. This duration is refreshed when a new target is hit.

MasterYi.name: double strike
MasterYi.description: Every 4 consecutive normal attacks will result in 2 attacks, dealing 81 physical damage  (150%AD).

MasterYi.name: alpha strike
MasterYi.description:
No longer targeted, deals 53 physical damage (20 + 60%AD + 35%AP)  to 4 enemies. If there are no other targets, attack the previous target and deal 25% damage . 
 Normal attacks reduce the cooldown of "Alpha Strike" by  by 1 second . 
 Deals  105 additional damage  to monsters and minions. 
 Has a critical judgment, and when critical, deals  60% additional damage .

MasterYi.name: Meikyo water stop
MasterYi.description:
Chant for up to 4 seconds to gain 55% damage reduction effect  and recover 40 (+ 25%AP) health every second. For the first 0.5 seconds of chanting,  damage reduction effect increases to 90% . 
 The lower your physical strength, the more you recover, up to a maximum of 100%  of your physical strength.

MasterYi.name: Wuju style
MasterYi.description:
Passive effect: If "Wujuu Style" is not on cooldown, gain 5 attack power (8%AD) . 
 Active effect: For 5 seconds, normal attacks deal 30 (+25% additional AD)  additional true damage.

MasterYi.name: highlander
MasterYi.description:
Passive effect: When you get a kill or assist, the cooldown of  Clear Still Water  is  reduced by 90% , and the cooldown of other normal skills is reduced  by 70% . 
 Activation effect:  For 7 seconds , movement speed increases  by 35% , attack speed increases by  by 30% , and becomes immune to slow effects. Obtaining a kill or assist increases the duration of this effect by  by 7 seconds .

Milio.name: Fire up!
Milio.description:
Allied champions touched by Mirio's skill will deal  additional magic damage  equal to 10%  of  attack power with their next skill and normal attack, and will also deal  15 magic damage (13+2+20%AP)  over 1.5 seconds. 
 Burn damage does not stack even if hit multiple times.

Milio.name: ultra mega fire kick
Milio.description:
Kick a fireball, knocking back the first enemy hit. The bouncing fireball then jumps over the target and explodes, dealing 80 magic damage (80 + 80%AP) to surrounding enemies and applying a 40% slow effect (40 + 5%AP) for 1.5 seconds. 
 Fireball knockback distance increases for minions and monsters. Also, explosions caused by minions and monsters have a larger area of ​​effect.

Milio.name: healing bonfire
Milio.description:
Creates a "Healing Flame"  and gives you or your champion a  buff for  for 6 seconds. While  "Healing Flame"  is burning, use  "Fire Up!"  every  3 seconds . 
 Use on yourself: Increases range by  9%  and heals you and nearby allied champions by  80  ( 80 + 15%   Magic Power ) over time. 
Used on friendly champions: Chains you and the target, increasing range by 9%, and heals you and the target champion by 80 health over time (80 + 15%Magic Power ). When you use  "Warmth of Embrace"  or  "Breath of Life" , all effects of the skill will be shared with the target. 
 Reactivation: Select a new ally (inherits the remaining effect time of the first activation). 
 There is no limit to the distance of the chain that connects Mirio and his champion allies.

Milio.name: the warmth of a hug
Milio.description:
Surround yourself or your champions with protective fire, absorbing damage (60 + 30%) and increasing movement speed by 10% for 2.5 seconds. Shield and increased movement speed effects stack. 
 Gain 1 charge every 16 seconds  and can hold up to a maximum of 2 charges.

Milio.name: breath of life
Milio.description:
Release  "Healing Flame" wave  around you, remove   immobilizing effect  and  immobilizing effect  from surrounding ally champions, and reduce the target's health by  (150 + 50% AP) Recovers  and increases  65%  of action interference resistance  for  3 seconds. 
 Furthermore,  "Breath of Life"  cannot remove knockback and knockup effects. 
 Removal also applies to the  incapacitation effect  that Mirio receives.

Mel.name: scorching glow
Mel.description:
Every time you deal damage with a normal attack or skill, apply a stack of " Overwhelming " for 5 seconds and refresh the stack. 
 Overwhelm: 
- 60 (60 + 8%AP) + 3 (3 + Accumulates  magic damage  of 0.5%AP). 
- While the stack is applied, the enemy will be dealt the final blow when the accumulated damage exceeds the sum of the target's  shield  and  current health . 
 Bullet Rain: 
- After using the skill, the next normal attack will fire 3 additional projectiles. 
- Each projectile deals 3 magic damage  (3-33AD + 3%AP). 
- Additional projectiles stack up to a maximum of 9  . 
 When used on a minion, the first stack of " Overwhelming " only deals 60%  damage.

Mel.name: A flurry of brilliance
Mel.description:
Fires 7 projectiles in succession towards the specified location. Projectiles cause explosions around the designated location. 
 Each explosion deals  11 magic damage (11 + 6%AP) , up to a total of  77 magic damage (77 + 42%AP) . 
 When used on minions, deals  90%  damage.

Mel.name: refute
Mel.description:
Forms a barrier around itself. This barrier reflects enemy champion projectiles, makes you invincible for 1 second, and increases your movement speed by 30%. This movement speed returns to normal after 1 second. 
 The reflected projectile deals  40%  of the original damage as  magic damage . 
 Damage from buildings cannot be prevented. 
 The damage of the reflected projectile is calculated from the original user's basic stats, and the damage adjustment and magic defense penetration by the item are applied. 
 The original user's item effects are not applied.

Mel.name: sunshine willow
Mel.description:
Fires a glowing orb, inflicting  snare effect  and  55 magic damage  to enemies in the center for 1.2 seconds (55 + 50%  AP ). 
 The orb creates a hostile area around it, inflicting a 30%  slow  on enemies and dealing 20 magic damage  (20 + 5%  AP ) every second. 
 The slow effect and damage over time effect continue for 0.75 seconds even after the enemy leaves the orb's area of ​​effect. 
 Deals 75% damage when used on minions.

Mel.name: gold eclipse
Mel.description:
Passive effect: 
 "Overwhelm" damage increases. 
 Base damage:  60 magic damage (60 + 8% AP)  
 Additional damage:  3 magic damage per stack (3 + 0.5% AP)  
 
 Active effect: 
 Unleash your power against all enemies with "Overwhelm" and deal the following damage. 
 Base damage:  100 magic damage (100 + 25% AP)  
 Additional damage:  4 magic damage per stack (4 + 2.5% AP)  
 Cannot be used if the enemy champion does not have Overwhelm.

rows.label: 「黄金蝕」のスタックダメージ

Morgana.name: soul siphon
Morgana.description: Recovers  health  equal to 20% of damage dealt by skills to champions, large minions, and large monsters.

Morgana.name: dark bind
Morgana.description: Fires dark energy and inflicts  snare effect for 2 seconds  and  80 magic damage  ( 80 +  90% AP ) to the first enemy hit.

Morgana.name: shadow of agony
Morgana.description:
Curses a certain area for 5 seconds, dealing  magic damage (7 + 7% AP)  to enemies within the area every 0.5 seconds. 
 This damage increases  by up to 70%  depending on the target's reduced health. 
 Deals 195% damage to monsters. 
 Each time " Soul Siphon " is activated, the current cooldown of this skill is reduced by 3.5 seconds  to the maximum cooldown.

Morgana.name: black shield
Morgana.description: Creates a barrier around an allied champion for 5 seconds. The barrier absorbs 70 magic damage (70 + 50% AP) and prevents incapacitating effects while the shield is deployed.

Morgana.name: fetters of the soul
Morgana.description:
Morgana chains nearby enemy champions for 3 seconds, dealing  150 magic damage (150 + 70% AP)  and slowing them by  15% . 
 While the chain is maintained: 
- Visualize the object. 
- Movement speed increases by 10% while the target is within range. 
 
 Breaking the chain: 
 After 3 seconds, inflict  an additional 150 magic damage (150 + 70% AP)  and  stun effect for 1.5 seconds  on enemies who could not break the chain.

Yasuo.name: Ronin Road
Yasuo.description:
Unwavering Heart: ``Wave'' accumulates according to the distance traveled. You can check the amount of "wave" on the resource gauge. If you receive damage from a champion or monster while "Wave" is full, you will gain a  shield  that absorbs  115  of damage ( 115  +  Critical rate  1 hit  per 1% ) for 1 second. 
 Fortitude:  Critical rate  is doubled. 
 The  critical rate  that exceeds 100% is converted to  attack power , and  attack power  increases by  0.6  per 1%  critical rate .

Yasuo.name: unsheathed sword
Yasuo.description:
Charge  forward  and deal  81 physical damage (20 + 105%AD) . When you damage an enemy with a charge, you will receive a stack of  "Whirlwind" . With 2 stacks, generates  "Whirlwind"  when using  "Batto" .  "Whirlwind"  knocks up the enemy  . 

 If you tap while dashing "Kazesatsu no Kata" ,  "Batto"  will become a slash that cuts down the surrounding area. 

 "Unsheathed"  is treated as a normal attack, and in that case, there is a  critical hit ,  75% additional damage  is given, and  normal attack effect  is applied to all units hit. This skill's cooldown and casting time are reduced by attack speed.

Yasuo.name: wind killing wall
Yasuo.description: Creates a wall of 300 units that blocks all ranged enemy attacks for 4 seconds.

Yasuo.name: Wind mowing
Yasuo.description:
Dash through enemies and deal 70 magic damage (70 + 20%AD + 60%AP) . Each use increases the base damage of the next dash by  by 25% , up to a maximum of  by 50% . 
 Cannot be used against the same enemy for 7 seconds. 

 If you tap  "Natatou"  during this dash, you will unleash a slashing attack that cuts through your surroundings.

Yasuo.name: wailing demons
Yasuo.description:
Blinks to the knocked up enemy champion, dealing  250 physical damage (250 + 160%AD) , and knocks up all knocked up enemies within 
 range for an additional  for 1.3 seconds . 
 Furthermore, the wave accumulates to the maximum, but  all the whirlwind stacks are consumed . 

For the next 15 seconds, 40% physical defense penetration  will be applied on critical hits.

Yuumi.name: Cats are friends
Yuumi.description:
Passive effect: When a normal attack or skill hits a champion, you recover 67 health (67 + 25% AP). 
 If you stick to a friendly champion within 4 seconds, that champion will also recover the same amount of health ( cooldown 12 seconds ). 
 Bond of Friendship: While attached, gain friendship with that ally whenever that ally kills a champion or minion. The ally with whom you have the most friendships becomes your "best friend." 
 "Best Friend" Bonus: Skills gain additional effects while attached to "Best Friend".

Yuumi.name: Kimagure Missile
Yuumi.description:
Missile summon: Drag the skill button to control the missile. 
 Basic effect:  Deals 60 magic damage (60 + 20%AP) . 
 Sticking Bonus: If the missile takes more than 1 second to reach the target, the damage dealt increases to  100 magic damage (100 + 35%AP) . Additionally, for 1 second, the target is given a  45% slow effect  and becomes visible. 
 "Best Friend" Bonus: When a missile hits, always gives  slow effect . When a missile hits a champion, allies with Yuumi attached will deal  18 magic damage (18 + 5% AP)  as a normal attack effect for 5 seconds.

rows.label: 「ベストフレンド」ボーナス(基本ダメージ)

Yuumi.name: You & Me!
Yuumi.description:
"Best Friend" bonus (passive effect): While you are attached to "Best Friend", the  recovery effect and shield amount  you give will increase by 6% (+0.02%) AP additionally. 
 (Stick activation effect): Dash to an ally champion and stick to it. While you are stuck together, you will follow your partner's movements, and you will not be able to target anything other than the tower  . 
 If you receive the  immobilization effect , this skill will go on a cooldown of  for 5 seconds .

rows.label: 回復量とシールド増加

Yuumi.name: Baboon!
Yuumi.description:
For 3 seconds, acquires a shield with durability 85 (+30%)  and increases attack speed by 24% (+8%) . 
 While the shield lasts, your movement speed will further increase  by 20% . 
 If Yuumi is attached, the effect of this skill will be applied to that ally instead of yourself.

Yuumi.name: final chapter
Yuumi.description:
Chant for 3.5 seconds and fire 7 magic waves. 
 While they are attached, you can control the direction of the wave by dragging the skill button. 

 Deal 80 magic damage (80 + 15%AP)  to enemies (per wave): 
. 
For 1.25 seconds, the 10% slow effect  increases  by 10%  for each wave that hits. 

 Against friendly champions (per wave): 
 Heal 20 health (20 + 5% AP) . 
 Excess health recovery amount is converted into a shield instead. 

 "Best Friend" Bonus: 
 For "Best Friend", the amount of physical strength recovered increases to 26 (26 + 8%AP) . 

 Stacking wave damage: 
 Second and subsequent waves deal  20 magic damage (20 + 5% AP) . 

 Can move while chanting, and can use "You & Me!" and "Babun!".

rows.label: 以降のウェーブの基本ダメージ

Yone.name: Ghost hunting path
Yone.description:
Steel and Spirit: Every second normal attack deals 50% of the damage as  magic damage  instead. 
 Fortitude:  Critical rate  is doubled. 
 The  critical rate  that exceeds 100% is converted to  attack power , and  attack power  increases by 0.6 per 1%  critical rate .

Yone.name: Life-cutting knife
Yone.description:
Charges forward and deals 84 physical damage  (30 + 100% attack power ). When you damage an enemy with a charge, you will receive a stack of  "Whirlwind" . 2スタックで「斬命刀」使用時に前方にダッシュし、「つむじ風」を発生させて敵をノックアップする。 

「斬命刀」は通常攻撃扱いでクリティカル判定があり、その際は追加ダメージを与え、命中したすべてのユニットに通常攻撃時効果を適用する。 This skill's cooldown and casting time are reduced by attack speed. 
 Deals 65% damage to monsters.

Yone.name: Li Duan Dao
Yone.description:
Targets hit by the spirit sword will receive  physical damage  and  magic damage  equal to 25 + 11%  of the target's maximum health. 
 If the sweep hits an enemy, you will receive a  durability shield for 1.5 seconds (45 + 80% attack power) . 
 This shield amount increases  by 100%  when a champion is hit, and further increases by  by 40%  for each champion hit after the second. 
 Deal up to  60 physical damage  to minions. 
 Deals up to  30 physical damage  to monsters. 
 Cooldown and casting time are reduced by  Attack speed .

Yone.name: liberation of pure soul
Yone.description:
Dash forward and change into spirit form, leaving your body for 5 seconds. While in spirit form, your movement speed increases by 10% over the duration and marks champions you damage with normal attacks or skills. 

 When this skill ends, you will be returned to your body and deal 24% of the damage you dealt during the effect period to the marked enemy as guaranteed damage. 

 Reactivate: End this skill early.

Yone.name: Ming Feng flashes
Yone.description: Attacks all enemies in its path, dealing 244 (200 + 80%AD) physical damage  and  magic damage , then teleports behind the last champion it hits and pulls them towards you.

Ryze.name: ancient sorcery
Ryze.description: Maximum mana increases by 0% (10% mana). Skill deals additional damage according to  increased mana .

Ryze.name: overload
Ryze.description:
Passive: Using Rune Prison and Spell Flux resets the cooldown of Overlord and charges runes for 4 seconds (up to 2 runes). 
 Magic Blast (active effect): Releases a shock wave, dealing  70 magic damage (70 + 45% AP + 2% increased maximum mana)  to the first enemy hit. If "Flux" is applied to the target, consume it to increase the damage of  "Overlord" by 25% , and  "Flux"  will bounce back to nearby enemies. 
 Runic Haste (active effect): When two runes are charged, they release a charge and increase movement speed by 20%  for 2 seconds. 
 Deals  40%  damage to monsters.

Ryze.name: rune prison
Ryze.description:
Deals 70 magic damage  ( 70  +  4% increased AP  +  65% AP ) and  Gives a 50% slow effect  for 1.5 seconds. 
 If the target has " Flux ", consume it and "Rune Prison" will apply  Snare effect  instead of slow effect.

Ryze.name: spell flux
Ryze.description:
Fires an orb that deals  80 magic damage  ( 80 + 10% AP + 2% increased HP ) and applies "Flux"  to the target and surrounding enemies for  4 seconds. 
 If the enemy has already received "Flux", its effect time will be refreshed and the "Flux" will spread further.

Ryze.name: portal warp
Ryze.description:
Passive effect: Additional damage of "Overlord" to targets with "Flux" is increased by 50% . 
 Activation effect: Opens a portal at the specified location. After 2 seconds, all friendly champions and minions around the portal are teleported to the specified location and have their movement speed increased by  by 35%  for 2 seconds. 
 After teleporting, the cooldown of Rice's normal attacks is reset. If 
 himself receives a  immobilizing effect  or  movement hindering effect , such as  knockup ,  knockback , or  stun , the portal will be canceled.

Rakan.name: mysterious wings
Rakan.description:
Obtains a shield (31 + 80% AP) with 31 durability  every 35 seconds (cooldown). Performing a basic attack or using a skill on an enemy champion reduces this cooldown by  by  by 1 second. 

 "Leap of Love"  - Xayah and Rakan can join each other's recall. In that case, both players can start first or return to their spawn point at the end of the call.

Rakan.name: gleaming feathers
Rakan.description:
Throws a magic feather and deals 30 magic damage (90 + 60%AP) to the first enemy unit it hits. 
 If the feather hits an enemy champion or epic monster, it will heal you and nearby allies by 56 (50 + 6 + 70%AP)  after 3 seconds or when it touches you or an ally.

Rakan.name: A splendid appearance
Rakan.description: Dash to the specified location. Upon arrival, you will soar into the air and deal 0 magic damage (70 + 45% Magical Power)  to enemies, knocking them up for 1 second.

Rakan.name: battle dance
Rakan.description:
Fly to a friendly champion and apply a 50 durability shield (50 + 65% Magic Power ) for 3 seconds. After that, it can be used again for 5 seconds at no cost. 
 When used on Xayah, shield amount increases  by 25%  and cooldown is reduced.

Rakan.name: everyone is crazy about me
Rakan.description: Movement speed increases by 60% for 4 seconds. Inflicts 100 magic damage  (100 + 50%AP) and  charm effect  for 1 second to the enemy touched. This only occurs once  in  1 unit  . Applying a charm effect to an enemy champion increases Rakan's movement speed by  by 75%  once. Movement speed will gradually return to normal.

Lux.name: illumination
Lux.description: Skills that deal damage apply  Illumination  to the enemy for 5 seconds. The next normal attack or damage skill Lux performs on that target will enhance  Illumination  and deal  25.5 magic damage  ( 25.5  +  25% AP ).

Lux.name: light bind
Lux.description: Fires a ball of light in the specified direction, applying a snare effect to enemy champions and large monsters for 2 seconds, dealing 60 magic damage (60 + 70% AP). Applies a snare effect to up to 2 enemies. Minions and small monsters that touch the ball of light take 90% damage. However, illumination will not be applied and the snare effect will not be applied.

Lux.name: prism barrier
Lux.description:
Throws the staff in the specified direction, giving allied champions touched by the staff a  shield  that prevents 25 damage (25 + 18%AP) for 3 seconds. 
 Once the staff reaches its maximum range, it returns and grants allied champions an additional   shield  that prevents  (40 + 28% AP)  of damage.

Lux.name: singularity
Lux.description: Creates a zone of light that lasts for 5 seconds. If there is an enemy in the zone, it will explode immediately and deal 65 magic damage (65 + 55%AP) to the target. Additionally, applies a  30% slow effect  for 1.5 seconds.

Lux.name: final spark
Lux.description: Emits a beam of light in the specified direction, dealing 300 magic damage (300 + 75%AP)  to all enemies in a straight line.

Rammus.name: rolling armor giro
Rammus.description:
Gains movement speed  of 32 when out of combat. This movement speed increases to the movement speed  of  61 during " Rolling ". 
 If you do not take damage for 5 seconds and do not use skills, you will be out of combat.

Rammus.name: Rolling around
Rammus.description:
Gain up to 120% increased movement speed  over 6 seconds. 
 When you collide with an enemy, deal  80 magic damage (80 + 100%AD)  in a certain area, knock back the target and  apply a 40% slow effect  for 1 second. 
 When activated, " Hardens " is interrupted and goes on cooldown.

Rammus.name: become hard
Rammus.description:
Thorns: Normal attacks deal 17 additional magic damage (12 + 10%AP) . 
 Active effect: Takes a defensive stance for up to 6 seconds,  Physical defense increases by 66 (30 + 45% AR) ,  Magic defense increases by 27 (10 + 35% MR) . While curled up, the damage of "spikes" increases  by 40% , and also damages enemies who perform normal attacks against you. 
 Deals  175% damage  to monsters. 
 When activated,  "Gorogoro"  is interrupted and goes on cooldown.

Rammus.name: Vibrant
Rammus.description: Taunts  an enemy champion or monster for  1.25 seconds  and increases attack speed by  35%  for  5 seconds .

Rammus.name: Boom boom
Rammus.description:
Jumps into the air and then falls hard, dealing  75 magic damage (75 + 50% AP)  and causing aftershocks for 4 seconds. 
 Aftershock deals  30 magic damage (30 + 20% AP)  every second and  10% slow  effect. This slow effect stacks and increases up to 50%. 
 If used during "Korokoro", the effect of "Korokoro" will be applied to the center of the area of ​​effect when landing. 
 The range of "Dun-Dun" increases with movement speed. 
 "Dun-dun" damages buildings.

Rumble.name: Ponkotsu Titan
Rumble.description:
Heat is generated each time you use a skill. 
 For over 50 heats, you will be in the  "Danger Zone"  state, and your normal skills will gain additional effects. 
 When the heat reaches 150, the state will be  "Overheat!"  for 4 seconds. 

 Overheat! : You will be in a  silence state , but your attack speed will increase by 55%  (attack speed), your normal attacks will be strengthened, and you will receive an additional 5 (2.5 + 2.5AP + 20%AP)  +  Deals magic damage  equal to 5% of the target's maximum health. 
 If the target is a monster, the percentage damage will be capped at 65-150 (AP).

Rumble.name: spitfire
Rumble.description:
Sprays flame from a flamethrower, dealing magic damage equal to 120 (+ 110%AP) + 6%  of the target's maximum health for 3 seconds. Flamethrower deals 105% damage to minions. 
 Danger Zone: Instead, deals magic damage equal to  180 (180 + 165%AP) + 9%  of the target's maximum health. 
 If the target is a monster, the percentage damage will be  65-150  to  with a maximum of .

Rumble.name: junk shield
Rumble.description:
Activate the barrier device and obtain a shield with durability  82 (40 + 5% maximum health + 35% AP)  for 1.5 seconds and increase movement speed by  20%  for 1 second. 
 Danger Zone: Increases movement speed by  by 30%  and obtains a shield (60 + max health 9% + 52.5%AP)  with durability  123.

Rumble.name: electro harpoon
Rumble.description:
Fires a charged harpoon that deals  60 magic damage  ( 60 + 40% AP ), applies  30% slow  for 1.5 seconds, and reduces enemy's  magic defense  by  8%  for 4 seconds. 
 If you hit an enemy with this skill's  slow effect , the  slow effect  will increase to  45%  and  Magic defense  will decrease to  12% . 
Danger Zone : Harpoon instead deals 90 magic damage (90 + 60% AP ), and  Slow effect  and  Magic defense reduction effect  increase  by 50% . 
 Charge: Gain 1 charge every 6 seconds and can hold up to 2 charges.

Rumble.name: equalizer
Rumble.description:
Fires multiple rockets in a straight line, creating a fiery trajectory at the point of impact, dealing 700 magic damage  (700 + 200% AP ) for 5 seconds, and inflicting 45% slow  on enemies within the trajectory. 
 How to operate 
 Tap: Automatically search for and attack nearby targets according to the automatic aim setting. 
 Drag the skill button to set the starting point of the trajectory. The skill will then automatically search for nearby targets and attack them, depending on the auto-aim settings. 
 Precision Cast: 
 1. Drag the skill button to set the starting point of the trajectory. Hold it down until you are ready to use it. 
2. To confirm, tap the check mark in the top left, or wait until the time limit expires if  Manual Aim Time Limit  is enabled. To cancel, tap the "Back" button in the top left. 
3. Drag the skill button to set the end point of the trajectory. Activates when you release your finger. 
 Deals  30% damage  to monsters.

LeeSin.name: skill
LeeSin.description: When using the skill, the attack speed of the next two normal attacks within 3 seconds will be increased by 40%. The first normal attack recovers 20  Ki , and the second normal attack recovers half that  Ki .

LeeSin.name: sound palm
LeeSin.description:
Sound Palm: Fires an energy wave that deals 55 physical damage (55 + 100%AD) to the enemy and makes them visible. If you hit an enemy, you will be able to use  "Resonance Palm" for  for 3 seconds. 
 Resonating Palm: Dash to the enemy marked with "Sounding Palm" and deal  5-110 physical damage  ( 110 + 200% AD ) depending on the target's reduced health.

LeeSin.name: defensive pattern
LeeSin.description:
Defensive style: Dash to the specified location. If there are enemies nearby when you arrive at the specified location, you will receive a shield  of 80 (80 + 100% bonus AD) for  for 2 seconds. You can reactivate "Iron Will" within 3 seconds.
