 Each time you perform a normal attack, the cooldown of "Defensive Type" is reduced by  by 0.5 seconds . 
 
 Iron Will: The next two normal attacks are  enhanced , deal an additional  26 magic damage (26 + 40% AP) , and gain  16% Omnivamp .

LeeSin.name: gable
LeeSin.description:
Gable: Deals 90 magic damage (90 + 125% increase) to surrounding enemies and makes them visible for 3 seconds. If you hit an enemy, you can activate "Bound Legs" for 3 seconds. 
 Bind Legs: Slows enemies hit by "Gable" by 30% for 4 seconds. This slow effect gradually returns to normal.

LeeSin.name: dragon's anger
LeeSin.description:
Perform a powerful roundhouse kick to the enemy champion, dealing 100 physical damage  (100 + 180%AD  + 10% of the target's maximum health ) and knocking it back. 
 Enemies that come into contact with the knocked back target are knocked up for 1 second and receive  100 physical damage  ( 100 + 180%AD  +  10% of the target's maximum health ). 
 Deal up to 800 damage to monsters.

Riven.name: rune blade
Riven.description:
Riven's sword charges up to 3 times when using a skill. 
 Normal attack consumes charge and deals  15 additional physical damage (22%AD) . 
 Additional damage against buildings is reduced to  50% . 
 Additional damage against monsters is reduced to 65% .

Riven.name: broken wings
Riven.description:
Slash in the specified direction up to 3 times. Each time you slash, deal 66 physical damage (30 + 55%AD) to surrounding enemies. 
 The third slash cannot cross terrain and knocks up the enemy  for 0.5 seconds . 
 Tap to prioritize enemy champions and large monsters within range. 
 Deals  70% damage  to monsters.

Riven.name: Qigongha
Riven.description: Stuns surrounding enemies for 0.75 seconds and deals 5 physical damage (55 + 100%AD) .

Riven.name: bravery
Riven.description:
Dash in the specified direction and acquire a shield that absorbs 85 damage increase  (85 + 90%AD) for 2 seconds. 
 You cannot cross the terrain with ``Brave''.

Riven.name: Sword of the Outcast
Riven.description:
For 12 seconds, Riven's sword regenerates  attack power by 25% , the range of normal attacks and damage skills increases, and  "Wind Slash"  can be activated only once.  The cooldown of "Wind Slash", which can be activated every time you defeat a target, is reset and the skill's effect time is extended by 3 seconds (up to a maximum of 12 seconds). 
 "Wind Slash" : Fires a shock wave that deals 100 (100 + 60% increased physical damage)  - 300 physical damage (300 + 180% increased physical damage)  depending on the enemy's reduced health.

Lissandra.name: Obedience to Iceborne
Lissandra.description:
When Lysandra or a friendly champion gets a kill or assist from a nearby enemy champion, 
 the defeated enemy becomes an ice slave and chases down the living enemies. 
  Ice Slave  gives a  25% slow  to surrounding enemies, and shatters after 4 seconds, dealing  110 magic damage  ( 110 + 40% AP ).

Lissandra.name: ice shard
Lissandra.description: Throws an ice spear. The spear shatters when it hits an enemy, dealing  70 magic damage (70 + 70%AP)  and  inflicting a 20% slow effect  for 1.5 seconds. Enemies behind the target receive the same damage and slow effect.

Lissandra.name: ring of frost
Lissandra.description: Creates a zone of ice, applies a snare effect to enemies within the area for 1.25 seconds, and deals 55 magic damage (55 + 55% AP).

Lissandra.name: Gracial Albus
Lissandra.description:
First activation: Fires an ice claw forward, dealing 50 magic damage (50 + 40%AP)  to enemies it passes through. 
 Skills can be reactivated while the ice claws are progressing. 
 Reactivation: Teleports to the position of the ice claw, and the ice claw disappears.

Lissandra.name: frozen grave
Lissandra.description:
Summon dark ice on an enemy champion or yourself. For 3 seconds, dark ice spreads from the target, dealing  150 magic damage (150 + 75% AP)  and  30% slowing effect  to enemies touched. 
 Use on enemy: Cover enemy champion with dark ice and  stun them for 1.5 seconds . 
 Use on yourself: Cover yourself with dark ice,  become incapacitated for 2.5 seconds , and recover  200 stamina (100 + 40% AP) . This recovery amount increases 0%-100%  according to your  decreased physical strength . The amount of physical strength recovered reaches its maximum when your  physical strength  falls below 30%. 
 When using automatic aim, "Frozen Glaive" is automatically used on yourself.

Lillia.name: A branch that collects dreams
Lillia.description:
The skill grants "Dream Fragment" and deals magic damage (6% + 0.012%AP)  equal to 6% of  maximum health over 3 seconds. If the target is a large monster, it will recover  20 physical strength (20 + 6% AP)  over the duration, and if the target is a champion, it will recover  10 physical strength (10 + 15% AP) . 
 The damage dealt to jungle monsters by "Dream Fragments" during the effect period is capped at  60AP . 
 The physical strength recovery effect of "Dream Fragments" becomes  33% effective from the second body onwards . 
 "Dream Fragment" can only receive the health recovery effect from one monster at a time  .

Lillia.name: Blossoming wind
Lillia.description:
Passive effect: Every time a skill hits, ,  movement speed  increases by 4.5% (4.5 + 2%)  for 6 seconds. This effect stacks up to  4 times . 
 Active effect: Swings the ax and deals 35 magic damage  (35 + 40%AP), and additionally deals 35 true damage  (35 + 40%AP) at the edge of the area of ​​effect. 
 " Blossoming Wind " deals 110%  damage to monsters.

Lillia.name: Hey, it's dangerous!
Lillia.description:
Swing it wide and then attack, dealing 70 magic damage (70 + 35%AP) . The enemy in the center receives  140 magic damage (140 + 70%AP)  instead. 
 Deals 50% damage to minions.

Lillia.name: CoroCoro seeds
Lillia.description: Throws a seed, and when it hits an enemy, it deals  70 magic damage (70 + 45% AP) ,  gives a 40% slow effect  for 3 seconds, and makes  visible . If the seeds do not hit an enemy, they will continue to roll until they hit an enemy or a wall.

Lillia.name: dreamy lullaby
Lillia.description:
"Dream Fragment"  makes all enemy champions hit with drowsiness for  1.5 seconds , then the target falls asleep for  2 seconds . 
 When the target wakes up after receiving damage, it will receive an additional  100 magic damage  ( 100  +  40% AP ). 
 Drowsy units are slowed for the duration of the effect, and then fall asleep.  Units that fall asleep cannot move or take actions until they receive damage other than continuous damage from the enemy.

Lucian.name: two-handed pistol
Lucian.description:
After using the skill, Lucian's next normal attack within 3.5 seconds will be a double attack. 
 Second attack deals  35% physical damage (AD) . This damage increases to 100% against minions. The second attack is treated as another normal attack, applies  normal attack effect , and has  critical hit . 
 Vigilance: When a friendly champion grants  Health Recovery  or  Shield , or when enemy champions around you receive  Immobilization , your next two basic attacks deal an additional 26 magic damage (20 + 10% AP)  (up to 4 enhanced normal attacks can be stored).

Lucian.name: piercing light
Lucian.description: Emit a beam of light to the specified enemy unit, inflicting 80 physical damage  (80 + 65%  increased AD ) to enemy units in its orbit.

Lucian.name: Ardent Blaze
Lucian.description:
Fires energy bullets. The energy bullet explodes on hit or when it reaches its maximum range, dealing 75 magic damage (75 + 90% magic attack power)  to the enemy, briefly making it visible, and marking it for 6 seconds. 
 When you or an allied champion deals damage to a marked enemy, your movement speed increases by 65 for 1 second. 
 Lucien gains  Assault  when a friendly champion activates Mark.

Lucian.name: slide
Lucian.description:
Move quickly over short distances. 
 Each time the normal attack of " Two-Handed Pistol " hits an enemy, the cooldown is reduced by  by 1 second  (if it hits a champion, the cooldown is reduced by  by 2 seconds ).

Lucian.name: Two guns fired
Lucian.description:
Fires bullets at high speed for 3 seconds, dealing 35 physical damage (20 + 25%AD + 10%AP) to the first enemy hit, for a total of 755 physical damage. 
 " Slide " can be used even while "Two-shot strafe" is active. 
 If activated again, the rapid fire will be canceled. 
 "Two-shot strafe" deals 200%  damage to minions.

Lulu.name: Friendly Fairy Pix
Lulu.description:
Every time Lulu makes a normal attack on an enemy unit, Pix fires 3 beams, dealing a total of 12 magic damage (12+15%AP) . This beam is blocked by other units. 
 When Lulu uses other skills, Pix can  stick to other champions . If the target champion is an enemy, it becomes visible  and , and if it is an ally, supports its normal attack.

Lulu.name: shiny beam
Lulu.description: Lulu and Pix simultaneously fire a beam in the specified direction, dealing 50 magic damage  (50 + 30% AP) to the first enemy hit, and 70% damage to the second and subsequent enemies. Inflicts  80% slow effect  on hit enemies. This slow effect will revert over 2 seconds.

Lulu.name: prank
Lulu.description:
Pix creates a fairy ring that sticks to the first champion that enters it for 5 seconds and grants additional effects. 
 For allies: Increase movement speed by  20% (20 + 5% AP)  and attack speed by  25%  for 3.5 seconds. 
 For enemies:  Makes the enemy polymorph for 1 second , making them unable to use normal attacks and skills, and reducing the target's movement speed by 60 . (The target becomes visible while attached) 
 Pix's ring prioritizes enemy polymorphs over allies.

rows.label: 増加攻撃速度効果時間

Lulu.name: Pix, please!
Lulu.description:
Attach to target enemy or friendly champion for 5 seconds. 
  For allies   Grants a shield that absorbs ,  60 damage  ( 60 + 60% AP ) for 2.5 seconds. 
  If it is an enemy,   Deals 80 magic damage  ( 80 + 40% AP ), and gains  Vision  while attached.

Lulu.name: Be big!
Lulu.description:
Turns your champion into a giant monster, knocking up nearby enemies for 0.75 seconds. 
 The giant ally gains  + 500  additional health  (250 + 50% AP)  for 7 seconds and slows nearby enemies by 30%.

Renekton.name: control of passion
Renekton.description:
If you use a skill when you have 50 Fury  or more, that  Fury  will be consumed to obtain a strengthening effect. Enhanced skills do not generate  Fury . 
 Normal attack generates  5 Fury . If your health is below 50% , the  Fury  you obtain will increase by 50% . When out of combat,  Fury  decreases by 4 every second.

Renekton.name: meat cut
Renekton.description:
Deals 80 physical damage  (80 + 90% increased attack power)  to nearby enemies. 
 Fierce Recovery :
- Recovers 4 (+5% increased health)  health and gains 5 Fury  for each enemy hit. 
- If the enemy hit is a champion, you will instead recover 16 (+20% increased health)  health and gain 10 Fury . 
- Recovers up to 50 (50 + 25% increased health)  health each time you use a skill. Generate maximum  Fury  each time you use the 
 skill. 
  Rule of Passion : 
- Damage increases to  120 physical damage (120 + 135% increased attack power) . 
- Recover 12 (+15% increased health)  health each time you hit an enemy. 
- If the enemy hit is a champion, recovers 48 (+60% increased health)  health instead. 
- Recovers up to 200 (200 + 100% increased health)  health each time you use a skill.

rows.label: チャンピオンへの攻撃による回復
隣接1回あたりの最大回復量

Renekton.name: Metta slash
Renekton.description:
The next normal attack will be  enhanced  to attack twice, stunning you for 0.75 seconds and dealing 230 physical damage  (24 + 150% attack power ). 
 If this hits one or more enemy champions, gain 10 Fury. 
 
  Rule of Passion : Attacks 3 times, stuns for 1.5 seconds and deals  185 physical damage  (36 +  225% attack power ).

Renekton.name: slice and dice
Renekton.description:
Dash and deal 40 physical damage  (40 + 90% increase ) to enemies in your path. 
 Gain  5 Fury  per non-champion target hit, and  10 Fury  per champion. 

 If you hit one or more enemies, you can reactivate this skill once for 4 seconds. 

 Generate up to 10 Fury  each time you use the skill. 
 
 Rule of Passion: 
 Re-activated dash deals  70 physical damage  ( 70 + 135% increase ). 
 - Enemy champions hit have their  physical defense reduced by 25%  for 4 seconds. 
- If you hit one or more enemy champions, gain an additional 30 Fury  for 2 seconds.

Renekton.name: Sobek's wrath
Renekton.description: Gain 20 Fury  and 300 Health  for 12 seconds. After activation, gain 5 Fury  every second and deal 70 magic damage (70 + 20% AP)  to surrounding enemies.

Rell.name: battle cry of innovation
Rell.description:
Normal Attacks and Skills: 
 When you hit a normal attack or skill, remove  2.5%  and magic defense  2.5%  from the target for 5 seconds ( up to 12.5% ​​). Maximum stacks: 5 per target. 
 Adds  5 magic damage  ( 5% physical defense  +  5% AP ) as a normal attack effect. 
 
 Take away at least  1.5-3 physical defense and magic defense   (physical defense)   (magic defense) . 
 Cannot be taken from minions or epic monsters.

Rell.name: Broken Steel
Rell.description:
Protrudes a lance, deals 70 magic damage (70 + 50%AP) ,  stuns  for 0.65 seconds, and destroys all 
 shields. 
 Monster's shield is not destroyed.

Rell.name: Pheromacy: Attachment
Rell.description:
Horseback Swiftness (passive effect): 
 Movement speed increases by 15 while riding. 
 
 Ferromancy: Equip (active effect): 
 Releases the horse and charges, dealing  70 magic damage (70 + 50% AP) . Also knocks up  the enemy . Obtain a shield (30 + 13% maximum HP)  with durability value  116. This shield lasts until the horse is dismounted. After that, it becomes  Separate form  and becomes able to use " Pheromacy: Cavalry ".

Rell.name: Heavy spear thrust
Rell.description:
Increases the movement speed of yourself and nearby target friendly champions by 10%. If no targets are selected, this bonus is applied to the closest nearby friendly champion. 
 While facing a nearby friendly or enemy champion, this bonus increases to  25% for 3 seconds . 
 Rel's next normal attack or destructive impulse causes an explosion within a certain area, dealing  magic damage equal to 5.5% (+ 0.03%AP) of the target's maximum health . 
 Deals up to 150 damage (150-300) to monsters and structures.

Rell.name: magnetic wind current
Rell.description:
A burst of anger that draws nearby enemy champions towards you. 
 Continuous Attraction: While "Magnetic Air Current" is active, it will continuously pull surrounding enemies towards you, dealing  120 magic damage  ( 120  +  100% AP ) over 2 seconds.

Rengar.name: invisible assailant
Rengar.description:
If you are in the bushes or in  camouflage state , your next normal attack will pounce towards the target. If Rengar's  Ferocity  is lower than 4 and he does not receive  Ferocity  while attacking, he will gain  Ferocity  and 1 . 
 Bone-Fang Necklace: Increase  attack power  by  4%-20%  for each kill or assist from an individual enemy champion within 3 seconds. You can only receive this bonus once from each enemy champion. 
 - When using a normal skill,  Ferocity  increases by  1  (If you use  Fury , you must perform a  Enhancement  normal attack on the target to get this bonus). 
-  When Ferocity  reaches 4, the next normal skill will be  enhanced .  Using an enhanced  skill does not refresh the cooldown of its normal skill. 
-  When using an enhanced  skill, movement speed increases  by 30%  for 1.5 seconds (increases at level 1/6/11). 
- All  Ferocities  are lost 8 seconds after leaving the battle.

Rengar.name: frenzy
Rengar.description:
Attack speed increases by 40% for up to 2 attacks launched within 3 seconds. The first normal attack is  enhanced , deals  44 additional physical damage (40 + 5%AD) , and becomes  critical . 
 Rengar's  Critical rate  increases the damage of the first normal attack by  0%~55% , and reaches the maximum bonus damage at  100% critical rate . 
 Ferocity:  Attack speed increases by  45%  for 3 seconds when enhanced . The first normal attack deals an additional 65 physical damage (40 + 40%AD) . 
 Deals  60%  damage to the tower.

Rengar.name: roar of hunting
Rengar.description:
Let out a roar and deal 60 magic damage (60 + 80%AP), and recover health equal to 60% of the damage received within the previous 2 seconds. 
 Ferocity: Instead, deals 80 magic damage (80 + 80%AP), recovers health equal to 60% of the damage received within the previous 2 seconds, and removes all action-blocking effects on yourself. 
 When receiving damage from a monster, you will instead recover physical strength equal to 100%  of the damage taken.

Rengar.name: iron ball lasso
Rengar.description:
Throws a lasso, dealing  70 physical damage (70 + 70% increased AD)  and applying a 30% slow effect  for  1.75 seconds to the target hit. Also, the lasso makes the surroundings visible  for 2 seconds . 
 Ferocity:  Deals 65 physical damage (65 + 70% increased AD)  and applies snare effect  to the target for  1.75 seconds. Also,  visualizes the target and its surroundings for 2 seconds . 
 Iron Ball Lasso can be activated even when Rengar is jumping at him.

Rengar.name: hunting instinct
Rengar.description:
Increases movement speed by 40%  and makes the nearest enemy champion visible  for 12 seconds .  After 1 second , you will enter  camouflage state , and you will be able to attack the target with normal attacks even if you do not enter the bushes. 
 When you jump on an enemy champion,  lowers the target's physical defense by  16  for 4 seconds .

Warwick.name: eternal thirst
Warwick.description:
Inflicts an additional 12  magic damage  ( 12 +  20% increased AD  +  10% AP ) as a normal attack effect. 
 If your physical strength is less than  50%   HP , recover your physical strength equal to  100%  of the damage dealt.

Warwick.name: beast fang
Warwick.description:
Tap: Dash forward and bite the target enemy, dealing 70 (+90%AP) + magic damage  equal to 6% of the target's maximum health and recovering  health equal to 42.5% of the damage dealt. 
 Drag: Get behind the target and follow them. 
 Adds normal attack effect. If the target is a monster, this additional damage will be at the upper limit. 
 Deals  50% additional damage  to minions. Killing a minion reduces cooldown by  by 50% .

rows.label: モンスターに対する最大ダメージ

Warwick.name: blood trail
Warwick.description:
Passive Effect: Marks an enemy champion with  less than 50%  health, and when moving toward that champion, increases  movement speed by 40% , and increases  attack speed by 60%  against enemies with  less than 50%  health. For targets whose health is below 35% , these bonuses increase to 150% . 

 Active effect: Increases vision for a short time, ignores all terrain, senses all enemies within range on the map, and marks the nearest enemy champion for  for 8 seconds . Cannot be used while fighting a champion. 

 Only enemies whose health has been reduced to less than 50% by allies can be detected by automatic effects.

Warwick.name: roar of anger
Warwick.description:
First activation: Gain 35% damage reduction effect  for 2.5 seconds. When this effect ends, it will roar and give surrounding enemies a fear effect  for  for 1 second, forcing them to flee. At this time, the enemy receives a slow effect of  of 90% . 
 Reactivation: Skill ends early (damage reduction effect time does not become shorter). If you use this skill again within 1 second, the damage reduction effect will end immediately and the skill will not inflict  Fear effect  on the enemy. However, the cooldown is reduced by 45% .

Warwick.name: Zetsuroga continuous attack
Warwick.description:
Leap a long distance. This distance is proportional to your movement speed. Within 2.5 seconds after landing, the next normal attack  will be strengthened . 
  When an enemy champion is hit with an enhanced normal attack , it leaps to the target and  applies a suppression effect  for 1 second. During the effect period, perform  4 normal attacks , apply  normal attack effect 4 times , and deal  125 magic damage  ( 125 + 167% increase ). 
 Recovers  physical strength equal to  100% of all damage dealt while applying a suppression effect to the target.

Skarner.name: Threads of Vibration
Skarner.description:
Skarner's attacks, Shattered Earth, Upheaval, and Impale apply Quaking to enemies for 4 seconds (max 3 stacks).
At 3 stacks, Quaking deals 5%-10% max HP magic damage over its duration.
Deals 100-450 max damage to monsters.

Skarner.name: Shattered Earth
Skarner.description:
First Cast: Skarner rips a boulder from the earth, empowering his next 3 attacks. He gains 25% Attack Speed and deals 15 (+100% bonus AD)(+4% bonus HP) physical damage to nearby enemies.
The 3rd attack deals bonus physical damage equal to 9% max HP and slows by 40% for 1s.
Recast (Upheaval): Skarner throws the boulder. It explodes on the first enemy hit, dealing 15 (+100% bonus AD)(+4% bonus HP) + 9% max HP physical damage and slowing by 40% for 1s.

rows.label: モンスターに対する最大ダメージ

Skarner.name: Seismic Bastion
Skarner.description: Skarner gains a shield equal to 8% max HP for 2.5 seconds and causes an earthquake, dealing 50 (+80% AP) magic damage and slowing nearby enemies by 20% for 1s.

Skarner.name: Ixtal's Impact
Skarner.description:
First Cast: Skarner charges forward, ignoring terrain. If he collides with an enemy champion or large monster, he grabs them and carries them for the rest of the charge.
If he drags them into a wall, they take 102 (60 + 120% bonus AD + 6% max HP) physical damage and are stunned for 1.5s.
Recast: End the charge early.
Colliding with a wall reduces the cooldown by 35%.

Skarner.name: Impale
Skarner.description:
Skarner lashes his tails forward, dealing 150 (+100% AP) magic damage to the first 3 enemy champions hit and suppressing them for 1.5s.
Suppressed targets are dragged with Skarner.
If he hits at least one champion:
- Gains 40% Move Speed for 1.5s.
- If Shattered Earth is active, he immediately casts Upheaval.
